1.1: Chenje ndi kitabo cha maina gha lukolo lwa Yecho Kilichitu. Yecho Kilichitu akibha kibheluko cha Daude mulukolo lwa Ulahimo.
1.2: Ulahimo ajhakumpapa Isaka, Isaka ajhakumpapa Yakobu, Yakobu ajhakumpapa Yuda na akalongo mundo.
1.3: Yuda ajhakumpapa Pelese na Zela majhe gwabhe akibha Tamale, Pelese ajhakumpapa Hezilone, Hezilone ajhakumpapa Lame,
1.4: Lame ajhakumpapa Aminadabo, Aminadabo ajhakumpapa Nashone, Nashone ajhakumpapa Chelemane,
1.5: Chelemane ajhakumpapa Boaze. Na majhe mundo Boaze akemitwa Laabo. Boaze akibha tate mundo Obede na Luse akibha majhe mundo Obede. Obede ajhakumpapa Yese.
1.6: Yese ajhakumpapa munahota nkolongwa Daude. Daude ajhakumpapa Chelemane majhe mundo Chelemone akibha Batisheba mwikeghe jwa Uliya
1.7: Chelemane ajhakumpapa Leoboamo, Leoboamo ajhakumpapa Abiya, Abiya ajhakumpapa Asa,
1.8: Acha ajhakumpapa Yeochafate, Yeoshafate ajhakumpapa Yolamo, Yolamo ajhakumpapa Uziya,
1.9: Uchiya ajhakumpapa Yotamo, Yotamo ajhakumpapa Ahaze, Ahaze ajhakumpapa Ezekiya,
1.10: Ezekiya ajhakumpapa Manase, Manase ajhakumpapa Amone, Amone ajhakumpapa Yosiya,
1.11: Yosiya ajhakumpapa Yekoniya na akalongo mundo, gwenio ukibha machiko gha Akayahude pibhapelwikwa ku ughene mu kilambo chuku Babelone.
1.12: Akayahude pubhajhawila ku ughene ku Babelone, Yekoniya ajhakumpapa Sheyalutiele, Chelutiele ajhakumpapa Zelubabele.
1.13: Zelubabele ajhakumpapa Abiude, Abiude ajhakumpapa Eliyakimo, Eliyakimo ajhakumpapa Azole,
1.14: Azole ajhakumpapa Sadoke, Sadoke ajhakumpapa Akimo, Akimo ajhakumpapa Eliude.
1.15: Eliude ajhakumpapa Eleazale, Eleazale ajhakumpapa Matane, Matane ajhakumpapa Yakobu.
1.16: Yakobu ajhakumpapa Uchupo, ungana mundo Maliya majhe mundo Yecho jhuikemwa Kilichitu Nkomboche.
1.17: Bhahe, kukibha na ibheluko makome na ncheche kuhumii kwa Ulahimo ade kwa Daude pibhatoilwa ku ughene ku Babelone, ibheluko makome kome na ncheche kuhumii kwa Daude patoilwa ku ughene ade machiko gha Kilichitu Nkomboche. Kubhelukwa kwa Yecho Kilichitu Luka 2:1-7
1.18: Bhahe, kubhelukwa kwa Yecho Kilichitu kukibha naha, Maliya, majhe mundo, akibha nchumba mundo Uchupo. Nambo akibha amela kutama pamonga ngita munalome na mwikeghe, Maliya abhonikina na ndumbo kwa likakala lya Uhuke gwa Chapanga.
1.19: Nhwalo Uchupo akibha jwaumbone palonge jha Chapanga, akapahi ndeka kubhehe na hone palonge jha bhando, peniya ajhakuwacha kunneka kinyemela.
1.20: Pakibha ihwacha lilobhe lyenio, ntumiche jwa Bhambo jwa kunane kwa Chapanga ajhakumpitila mulughono, ajhakunnobholela, “Uchupo mwana gwa Daude, nkota kujhoghopa kuntolela Maliya abhehe nhwana gwino, nhwalo abhii na ndumbo kwa likakala lya Uhuke gwa Chapanga.
1.21: Nabhelukwa mwana munalome, na mwenga namupela liina lyake Yecho, jwenio ndi nabhaghombola bhando bhake mu uhakaho gwabhe.”
1.22: Bhahe, agha ghoha ghakapitile ili lilobhe lya Bhambo pililongila kwa kupete kwa nnondole,
1.23: “Dola, nchikana jwangakongana na munalome najhegha ndumbo, napapa mwana munalome, na bhene nabhampela liina lya Emanuele,” mana jhake, “Chapanga abhii pamo na twenga.”
1.24: Peniya, Uchupo pajhimwika mulughono ajhakuhenga ngita ntumiche jwenio jwa Bhambo channobholile, ajhakuntola Maliya, nhwana mundo ukajhake.
1.25: Nambo akagholwike nako ndeka ngita mundo na nhwana mundo ade Maliya papapita mwana munalome na Uchupo ajhakuntina liina lyake Yecho.

2.1: Yecho akabhelwike ku muche gwa ku Betelehemo ku kilambo chuku Yudeya, machiko gheniya Helode akibha Munahota nkolongwa. Bhando bhubhamanya ghughapala kupitila kwa kulolekeya ndondwa kuhumii kulipitila lyobha bhajhakuhika ku Yeluchalemo.
2.2: Bhajhakwakonya bhando, “Abhii kojhe mwana jwabhelwike abhehe Munahota Nkolongwa jwa Akayahude? Tuiwene ndondwa yake ikapitile kulipitila lyobha, na twenga tuhikite kunyinamila.”
2.3: Munahota nkolongwa Helode pajhohina gheniya, ajhakubhehe ngolongondi, jwenio pamonga na bhando bhoha bha ku Yeluchalemo.
2.4: Bhahe, Helode ajhakwakema pamonga akapiya matambiko bhakolo bhoha na bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo, ajhakwakonya, “Kilichitu Nkomboche abhelwike kojhe?”
2.5: Na bhene bhajhakunnyanguu, “Ku bomane ku Betelehemo, ku muche gwa ku Yudeya ndi nnondole akajhandike.
2.6: ‘Mwe bhando bha ku Betelehemo, kumuche nkate jha kilambo chuku Yudeya, mwenga machokombe ndeka pakate jhumanyikana hake ku Yudeya. Nhwalo kwino nahika kilongoche jwalongocha bhando bhango, bhu ku Ichilahele.’ ”
2.7: Peniya Helode ajhakwakema pakiyepela bheniya bhibhamanya ndondwa, ajhakwakonya lichaa lya ndondwa puipitila.
2.8: Peniya ajhakwalaghalikiya bhajhende ku Betelehemo alongila, “Nnyendengane mukalole kwa uchakaka malobhe gha kilemba chenie. Anda mupatite unetele na nenga helahela nyende nikanyinamile.”
2.9: Pubhajhomalila kunyokanikiya munahota nkolongwa, bheniya bhubhaimanyilila ndondwa bhajhakubhokangana. Kwa kuhechuka kwa kuibhona ndondwa yela ibhaibhonita kulihumii lyobha ngailongolila kujhenda nu kujhema panane pabhii mwana.
2.10: Pubhaiwene ndondwa hela, bhajhakuhanganila hake.
2.11: Bhahe, bhajhakujhingii munyumba, bhajhakummona mwana jhola pamonga na Maliya majhe mundo bhajhakutama makilikite kunyinamila. Peniya bhajhakudindula mahako ghabhe na kumpela hupo. Hupo ya chaabo na mahuta gha petelele gha manemane na ubane.
2.12: Chapanga ajhakwakanikiya mulughono bhakota kukelebhuka kabhele kwa Helode peniya bhajhakujhenda ukajha kwabhe kupete ndela jhenge. Kubhutukila ku Michile
2.13: Peniya akaghene bhala pubhabhokita, ntumiche jwa Bhambo jwa kunane ajhakumpitila Uchupo mulughono, ajhakunnobholela, “Jhimka mutole mwana pamonga na majhe mundo, mmutukile ku Michile. Ntame kwenio ade punipala kunnobholela, nhwalo Helode ipala kunkoma mwana jwenio.”
2.14: Peniya, Uchupo ajhakujhimuka na kuntola mwana pamonga na majhe mundo, ajhakubhoka kilo, ajhakujhenda ku Michile.
2.15: Ajhakutama kwenio ade Helode pajhomwika. Lilobhe lyenio lihengika kulihenga lilobhe lyahengita Bhambo kwa ndela jha nnondole lipitile, “Nankema mwana mundo kubhoke ku Michile.” Kukomwa kwa yana
2.16: Helode pabhang'ang'anwika kubhehe bhala bhubhamanya ndondwa bhatekunkoloha, ajhakuyoma hake. Ajhakulaghalikiya yana yoha inalome ku muche gwa ku Betelehemo na mupelemupele jhake bhubhabhii na yaka ibhena amu pahe jhake bhakomwe. Akatehi naha kubhoke machiko ghalobholilwa kuhumii kwa bhala bhibhamanye ndondwa.
2.17: Ndi ghatimile malobhe ghighalongilwa na jwakibha nnondole jwa Chapanga Yelemiya,
2.18: “Lilobhe lijhokanikike kwenio ku Lama, kulela kwa lipyanda na kujhemba mihambo jha malelo, Lahele ilelela yana yakwe, ipala ndeka kupepechwa, nhwalo bhoha bhawile.” Kukelebhuka ku Michile
2.19: Pajhomwika Helode, ntumiche jwa Bhambo Chapanga ajhakumpitila Uchupo mulughono kola ku Michile,
2.20: ajhakunnobholela, “Jhimka mutole mwana pamonga na majhe mundo, nkelebhuke kabhele ku kilambo chuku Ichilahele, mana bhala bhibhapala kunkoma mwana jwenio bhawile.”
2.21: Bhahe, Uchupo ajhakujhimka, ajhakuntola mwana pamonga na majhe mundo ajhakukelebhuka ku kilambo chuku Ichilahele.
2.22: Nambo Uchupo ajhakujhoha Alikaelo mwana gwa Helode abhujhii unahota gwa kilambo chuku Yudeya, ajhakujhoghopa kujhenda kwenio. Kabhele ajhakukanikiwa mulugwenio na kulobholelwa ajhenda ku Galilaya.
2.23: Ajhakujhenda kutama ku muche ghukemwa ku Nachalete. Ndi ghakatimile malobhe ghighalongilwe kwa ndela jha milondole, “Na jwenio nakemwa mundo jwa ku Nachalete.”

3.1: Machiko ghala Yohane Mbatichajhe ajhakujhenda na kutumbuu kutangacha kunjenga jha ku Yudeya.
3.2: Alongila, “Muuleke uhakaho gwino nhwalo unahota gwa kunane uheghalile!”
3.3: Jhonjo Yohane ndi jhola Isaya jwakibha nnondole akalongila panane jhake palongila, “Mundo jwailela kanonoha kunjenga, ‘Munenganikiye Bhambo pala papala kupeta, nnyoche ndela jhake.’ ”
3.4: Yohane akawalite ngobho ikatengenichwe kwa mangoma gha kinyama jwakemitwa ngamiya na luhunga lwa limbendela mukibhuno chake. Na kulye madidima na bhuche.
3.5: Bhahe, bhando kuhumii ku Yeluchalemo na kuhumii pande yoha ya ku Yudeya na chehemo yoha ya mupele jha lukemba lwa Yolodane bhajhakunnyendela,
3.6: pibhalongela bhene uhakaho gwabhe na jwenio Yohane ajhakwabaticha mulukemba lwa ku Yolodane.
3.7: Nambo ajhakwabhona Mapwalichayo na Machadukayo bhamahele bhitenda kunhikilila bhabatichwe, ajhakwalobholela, “Mangota kibheluko cha lijhoka! Bho, ghane jwapwepwile mihoto kulitila lilaka lya Chapanga lilihika?
3.8: Nnangiye kwa kuhenga kwino anda muulekite uhakaho.
3.9: Nkotoka kuwacha na kulonge, ‘Hoko gwito ndi Ulahimo!’ Ninobholela chakaka, jwenio Chapanga ahotola kughalambula maghanga aghagha na kubhehe yana ya Ulahimo.
3.10: Ngohe libhagho libhii pa libelengete lya nkongo, na nkongo ghoghoha gwangapambika uhohe naupengulwa na kutagwa ku mwotu.”
3.11: Nenga nibaticha kwa mache kulangiya ngita muulekite uhakaho. Nambo jwahika payeto jhango abhii na likakala kuliku nenga. Nenga nitope ndeka kujhegha maghubache ghake. Jwenio nabaticha kwa Uhuke gwa Chapanga na kwa mwotu.
3.12: Jwenio akamula kipalo mu lubhoko lwake cha kuhebhe ngano jhake, ngano jhamaha aibheka mu kikoko, na majhejheto naghajhochwa mwotu gwangahimika gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta. Yecho ibatichwa Maluku 1:9-11; Luka 3:21-22
3.13: Machiko gheniya Yecho ajhakubhoka ku Galilaya ajhakuhika kulukemba lwa ku Yolodane ajhakunnyendela Yohane abatichwe.
3.14: Nambo Yohane ajhakujhigha kunkanila alongila, “Bho, nhwalo ghane mwenga mihika kwa nenga? Nenga ndi jhunipalwa kubatichwa na mwenga?”
3.15: Nambo Yecho ajhakunnyanguu, “Nnyeketele ibhehe kwa ngoheno, nhwalo tupalwa kuhenga ghala ghapahi Chapanga.” Peniya Yohane ajhakujheketela.
3.16: Papa tugha pabatichwa Yecho, ajhakubhoka umache, papalapala kunane kumahunde kujhakudinduka ajhakubhona Uhuke gwa Chapanga ujhakuhuluka ngita ngunda na kutolela panane jhake Yecho.
3.17: Lilobhe likajhokanikike kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga lilongila, “Jhonjo ndi mwanango jhunimpahile, anganichwe na mwenga.”

4.1: Peniya uhuke gwa Chapanga ujhakunnongocha Yecho ade kunjenga ajhighanikilwe na Limbembela.
4.2: Ajhakuleka kulyegha pajhomolila machiko makome ncheche muhe na kilo, peniya ajhakubhona njala.
4.3: Bhahe, Limbembela lijhakuhika na kunnobholela, “Anda chakaka mwe ma mwana gwa Chapanga, longela maghanga agha ghabhehe mabumunda.”
4.4: Yecho ngajhangwila, “Ijhandikwe mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga, ‘Mundo nalama ndeka kwa mabumunda tugha, kwa lilobhe lililongelwa na Chapanga.’ ”
4.5: Peniya Limbembela ajhakuntola Yecho ade ku Yeluchalemo, ku muche gwa nyahinyahi gwa Chapanga, ajhakummeka ku lulegheleghe lwa Nyumba jha Chapanga,
4.6: ajhakunnobholela, “Anda mwenga mwana gwa Chapanga, kiponeya pahe, mana ijhandikwe mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga, ‘Chapanga nalaghalikiya akatumiche bhake bha kunane kwa Chapanga, nabhantola mu mabhoko ghabhe, nkotoka kukochoka mulighanga.’ ”
4.7: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Ijhandikwe mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga, ‘Nkotoka kunyigha Bhambo, Chapanga gwino.’ ”
4.8: Ndi Limbembela lijhakuntola ade kululegheleghe lwa kitombe kitandamaho, ajhakunnangiya unahota gwoha gwa pannema na ukolo gwake.
4.9: Ajhakunnobholela, “Nanipela henge yoha anda undamile makilikite na kunnyinamila.”
4.10: Peniya, Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Bhokela oko Limbembela ijhandikwe mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga. Namunyinamila Bhambo Chapanga gwino na kunhengela jwenio kanjika chake.”
4.11: Bhahe, Limbembela lijhakunneka Yecho, na akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga bhajhakuhika, kunhengela. Yecho itumbuu lihengo lyake ku Galilaya Maluku 1:14-15; Luka 4:14-15
4.12: Yecho pajhohina ngita Yohane atabhitwe mukipungo ajhakujhenda ku Galilaya.
4.13: Ajhakubhoka ku Nachalete, kujhenda ku Kapelenaumo, muche ghubhii mupele jha mbwane jha ku Genechalete, mupakane mwa kilambo cha Zabulone na Nafutale, ajhakutama kwenio.
4.14: Lende litendika lilobhe lela lilongilwa na Isaya, jwakibha nnondole jwa Chapanga litimile,
4.15: “Ku kilambo chuku Zabulone na ku kilambo chuku Nafutale, kujhendelela mumbwane kwiye jha lukemba lwa ku Yolodane, ku Galilaya, ku kilambo cha bhando bha ilambo henge!
4.16: Bhando bhubhatamita palubhendo bhaluwene lumule lukolongwa. Nabhabhehe bhubhatamita ku kilambo cha lubhendo na kiyeka cha kuwegha, lumule lwamulikile.”
4.17: Kuhumii machiko gheniya Yecho akatumbwii kubhola atangicha, “Muuleke uhakaho gwino nhwalo unahota gwa kunane uheghalile!” Yecho abhakema bhapyeya homba ncheche Maluku 1:16-20; Luka 5:1-11
4.18: Yecho pakibha atyangita mupele jha lilabha lya ku Galilaya, ajhakwabhona akalongo bhabhele bhapyeya homba, Simone jwakemwa Petile na Anduleya nnongo gwake bhakibha bhapyeya homba kwa lwaho mulilabha nhwalo bhakibha bhapyeya!
4.19: Bhahe, ajhakwalobholela, “Ungengame, na nenga nanimmola kwapyeya bhando kwa Bhambo ngita hele chimupyeya homba.”
4.20: Papalapala bhajhakuleka lwaho lwabhe na kunkengama.
4.21: Ajhakujhenda palonge pandina, ajhakwabhona akalongo bhange bhabhele. Yakobu na Yohane, yana ya Zebedayo. Bheniya bhakibha nkate jha mungalabha pamonga na tate gwabhe Zebedayo, bhakibha bhitengenecha lwaho lwabhe, bhahe, Yecho ajhakwakema.
4.22: Na bhene bhajhakuileka ngalabha pamonga na tate gwabhe, bhajhakunkengama. Yecho ilamicha bhibhalwalwa Luka 6:17-19
4.23: Yecho akibha ijhenda kila chehemo jha ku Galilaya, ajhakubhola munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude na kutangacha Malobhe gha Mbone gha Unahota gwa Chapanga. Ajhakulamicha ulwalo ghoghoha ghubhakibha nabho bhando.
4.24: Bhando bhubhatamita kilambo choha chuku Siliya pibhajhoha gheniya. Bhibhalwalwa bhoha na bhando bhubhabhii na ulwalo na bhando bhibhalaghita. Bhibhachikilwe na michuka, bhubhabhii na kihinduhindu na bhando bhubhalemile bhakapelikwe kwa jwenie, na bhoha bhajhakulama.
4.25: Bhando bhamahele bhajhakunkengama, kuhumii ku Galilaya, na Dekapoli mana jhake miche kome, na ku Yeluchalemo, na ku Yudeya na kwiye jha lukemba lwa ku Yolodane.

5.1: Yecho pabhonita lilongo lya bhando, ajhakuhobhoka ku kitombe na kutama. Bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunkengama,
5.2: na jwenio ajhakutumbuu kwabhola. Kuhanganila kwa uchakaka Luka 6:20-23
5.3: “Bhina mota bhala bhubhahii akahocho bha ku mwojho nhwalo unahota gwa Chapanga ndi gwabhe.
5.4: Bhina mota bhubhabhii ngolongondi, nhwalo nabhahangana.
5.5: Bhina mota bhibhatokomile, nhwalo nabhapata kilambo.
5.6: Bhina mota bhubhabhii na njala na nyota jha kuhenga ghapala Chapanga, nhwalo Chapanga nabhatenda bhajhukute.
5.7: Bhina mota bhubhabhii na kiya kwa bhange, nhwalo nabhabhonelwa kiya.
5.8: Bhina mota bhubhabhii na mwojho gwa mbone nhwalo nabhamona Chapanga.
5.9: Bhina mota bhubhaleta uteeke, nhwalo nabhakemwa bhana bha Chapanga.
5.10: Bhina mota bhibhapata malagho kwa kuhenga ghapala Chapanga, nhwalo Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga ndi gwabhe.”
5.11: Bhina mota mangota anda bhando bhannighite na pubhapala kung'aha na kuwalongela ilebhe lyanganandela kwa nhwalo gwa nenga.
5.12: Unhanganile na nchobhele nhwalo ndweko jhino ndi ngolongwa kunane kwa Chapanga. Peniya ndi chibhang'ahite milondole bhubhakibha kabula jhino. Mwinyo na lumule Maluku 9:50; Luka 14:34-35
5.13: “Mangota ndi mwinyo gwa pannema. Nambo mwinyo anda uhobhite kunogha kwake naulekelwa nike unoghe kabhele unogha ndeka kabhele, utagwa panja na kutimbwa na bhando.
5.14: “Mangota ndi lumule lwa pannema! Muche ghuchengwite panane jha kitombe uhotondeka kukihiya.
5.15: Abhii jhe mundo jwahoto jwapamba kolobohi na kugubikila kibhegha, nambo ubheka panane jha kinala jhalangalile bhoha bhubhabhii nkate.
5.16: Helahela lumule lwino lwalangalile palonge jha bhando bhaghabhone mahengo ghino gha mbone, bhannombwe Tate gwino jwa kunane.” Mabholo gha Malaghalikilo
5.17: “Ihikite jhe kubhoha Malaghalikilo gha Chapanga ghampekii Mucha na mabholo gha milondole bha Chapanga. Ihikite kughatenda ghapitile chakaka.
5.18: Ninnobholela chakaka, ade peniya kunane kwa Chapanga na nnema naghapeta, kibhii jhe hilu kichokombe chochoha chikibhokechwa mu Lilaghalikilo chikipala kuhobholela ade ghatimila ghoha.
5.19: Bhahe, mundo jhojhoha jwakanwa kunyeketela hilu nhilo nchokombe ghubhii mu Malaghalikilo ghoha, na kwabhola bhange kuhenga yenio, jwenio nabhaha nchokombe hake munahota nkolongwa gwa kunane kwa Chapanga. Nambo jhola jwajhokanikiya na kwabhola bhange bhatende yenio, nabhaha nkolongwa munahota gwa Chapanga.
5.20: Ndi nhwalo ninongelile, mijheketela na kuhenga ghapala Chapanga kuliku chibhatenda bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo na Mapwalichayo, anda nahajhe nanyingii ng'o munahota gwa Chapanga.” Mabholo gha kukanikiya lilaka Luka 12:57-59
5.21: “Nnyohine njwe bhando bha makacho bhakalobhalilwe, ‘Nkotoka kukoma! Nambo mundo jwakoma chakaka na jwenio nahadabulwa.’
5.22: Nambo nenga ninobholela, jhojhoha jwanyomela nnongo mundo, chakaka nahadabulwa. Jwapucha nnongo natakalilwa pa nyumba jha mihalo. Jwankema nnongo mundo ‘Kupumbumuka.’ Itope kujhingila mu mwotu gwa machiko ghoha.
5.23: Bhahe, anda mpelike litambiko lino palonge jha kachangwale ka litambiko na peniya nkombwike anda nnemwihine na nnongo gwino,
5.24: Lileka hote litambiko lino palonge jha kachangwale, nnyenda hote mukajhelane na nnongo gwino, peniya nkelebhuka na mpiye litambiko lino.”
5.25: “Nnyelelane na jwatakalile kajhombe pumubhehe undela kujhenda ade pa Bwalo jha mihalo. Chakaka jwatakalile jwino nampeleka kwa jwajhokanikiya mihalo, na jwenio nnyomola mihalo napeleka kwa akakomana ngondo, na mwenga natabhwa mukipungo.
5.26: Ninnobholela chakaka, namoke jhe mwenio ade nkung'unde chente jha kujhomolekeya.” Mabholo gha kukanikiya ngongola
5.28: Nambo nenga ninobholela, kila mundo jwanolekeya mwikeghe kwa kumpala, atei ngongola ku mwojho gwake.
5.29: Bhahe, anda liho lino lya ngejha lihobhiche, mulibhohe na kulitaghii kutale. Mbaha kwino kihobhelele kipande chimo cha payegha, kuliku yegha jhoha kutagwa mu mwotu gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
5.30: Anda lubhoko lwino lwalelo luhobhecha, muluhekete na kulutaghii kutale. Mbaha kwino kuhobhecha kilebhe chimo cha yegha, kuliku yegha kujhingii mu mwotu gwangahimika gwa machiko ghoha.” Mabholo gha kukanikiya kulekana. Matei 19:9; Maluku 10:11-12; Luka 16:18
5.31: “Nikanobholile njwe, mundo jhojhoha, ‘Jwanneka nhwana mundo ipala anyandikila baluwa jha kunneka.’
5.32: Nambo nenga ninnobholela, mundo jhojhoha jwaneka nhwana mundo na kutolela, nambo kwa nhwalo jha ughone, antenda atende ngongola, na munalome anda antolile mwikeghe jwenio, jwenio atenda ngongola.” Mabholo gha kukanikiya kulapila
5.33: “Kabhele mukajhohine kubhehe bhando bha makacho bhakalobholilwe, ‘Nkotoka kutwekula kilapo chino, ipalwa mukihenge kilapo chino palonge jha Bhambo.’
5.34: Nambo nenga ninobholela, mwangalapanikii ng'o hilu kwa kunane kwa Chapanga, nhwalo ndi kigoda cha unahota gwa Chapanga,
5.35: amu kulapa kwa nnema, nhwalo ndi kigoda chake cha kujheghemekeya makongono, amu ku Yeluchalemo, nhwalo ndi muche gwa mu Nahota nkolongwa.
5.36: Nkotoka kulapanikii kwa muto gwino, nhwalo mihoto ndeka kulitenda lijhunjo limo kubhehe liuho amu lipile.
5.37: Anda nnongi, ‘Chakaka,’ bhahe ibhaha ‘Chakaka,’ na pumulongela, ‘Nahi jhe,’ bhahe ibhaha chakaka ‘Nahi jhe.’ Chochoha chikichocha hena kihuma kwa jhola jwanganandela.” Mabholo gha kukanikiya kulepechela Luka 6:29-30
5.38: “Nnyohine ghalongelwa, ‘Liho kwa liho, lino kwa lino.
5.39: Nambo nenga ninnobholela, nkotoka kulepechela kwa mundo jwanganandela. Anda mundo anapwile mbalamande litama lyuulelo lapu, mughalambukile na lenge.
5.40: Anda mundo atakalile pa nyumba jha mihalo kupala kutola ngobho hino, munekele atole na likote lino.
5.41: Anda mundo achokolikiye nghegha nhigho gwake kilomita jhimo, nnyeghe jhenge ibhele.
5.42: Jwannyopa mupela, nkotoka kughalambukila kihogho jwapala kujhahika kilebhe.’ ” Mapale bhibhanchimwa Luka 6:27-28,32-36
5.43: “Nnyohine bhando bhakilongila, ‘Mupale nnyino, na kunchimwa likoko lino.’
5.44: Nambo nenga ninnobholela, mwapale akamakoko bhino na kwajhopela bhala bhubhang'aha mangota,
5.45: naha namaha yana ya Tate gwino jwabhii kunane kwa Chapanga, nhwalo jwenio ubhalangalila lyobha bhando bhanganandela na bhambone, na kwakomela hula bhando bhambone palonge jha Chapanga na bhanganandela.
5.46: Bho, nanyambulila ndweko ghane kwa kwapala tugha bhabhala bhala bhubhampala mangota? Kibhii jhe! Nhwalo hilu bhiakatola kode bhatenda gheniya!
5.47: Anda mwajhambwiche akalongo bhino tugha, bho, mutenda kilebhe chamaha kuliku bhando bhange? Hilu bhando bhangaumanya Chapanga bhene utenda helahela.
5.48: Bhahe, mipalwa nkota kupongokewa chochoha kuhenga gha mbone ngita Tate gwino jwa kunane chatenda gha umbone.”

6.1: “Mukilolekehe nkotoka kuhenga mahengo ghamaha palonge jha bhando nhwalo mipala ntondobheywa na bhando. Anda nahajhe, Tate gwino jwabhii kunane kwa Chapanga napela ndeka ndweko.”
6.2: “Anda mwatangatile akahocho, nkotoka kwalobholela bhando. Nkotoka kutenda ngita jwakitenda jwaumbone ndi chibhatenda munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude na mundela bhapala bhando bhakwehe. Ninnobholela chakaka, bheniya bhapatite njwe ndweko yabhe.
6.3: Nambo mwenga pumuntangatila nhocho, mutangatile changamanya mundo jhojhoha.
6.4: Mmohe utangatilo gwino changamanya bhando, na Tate gwino jwanolekeya kumwojho, nampela ndweko.” Mabholo gha kunyopa Chapanga Luka 11:2-4
6.5: “Pumunyopa Chapanga, nkotoka kubhehe anda bhando bhubhakitenda bhambone. Bhene upala kujhema kunyopa munyumba jha kukonganikii na mu malekano gha ndela bhabhonekane na bhando. Ninnobholela chakaka, bheniya bhapatite njwe ndweko yabhe.
6.6: Nambo mwenga pumunyopa Chapanga, nnyingile ku chumbe chino, na mpogheke nnyango gwino, peniya munyope Tate gwino jwangabhonekana, na jwenio Tate gwino jwalola ghumuhenga ghala kwa kinyemela ghughabhii nkate jha mwojho, nampela ndweko.”
6.7: “Pumunyopa, nkotoka kuchobhela chobhela ngita bhando bhangaumanya Chapanga. Bhene bhahambuka kubhehe Chapanga nabhajhokanikiya nhwalo gwa kulonge malobhe twe ghangabhehe gha mbone.”
6.8: Nkotoka kuhwanana na bheniya, Tate gwino amanye chimipala kabula munatumbu jhe kunyopa.
6.9: Bhahe, naha ndi chimipala kulonge piminnyopa Chapanga. Tate gwito jhumii kunane kwa Chapanga, Liina lino lilombwe.
6.10: Unahota nkolongwa gwino uhike. Limipala lihengeke pannema ngita kunane.
6.11: Mutupele chakulyegha chito cha kila lichiko.
6.12: Mutulekekehe uhakaho gwito, ngita twenga chitwalekekeya bhibhatulemwihe.
6.13: Nkotoka kutujhingiya mu majhighanikilo, nambo mutukombole na jhola jwanganandela. Nhwalo unahota ndi gwino, na likakala na ukolongwa kwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
6.14: Nhwalo anda twalekekekiye bhange bhubhalemwite, Tate gwito jwa kunane kwa Chapanga nanekekeya na mangota hele.
6.15: Nambo anda mwalekekiye ndeka bhando, na Tate gwino nanekekeya ndeka. Mabholo gha kukihibhilikiya kulyegha
6.16: “Pumukihibhilikiya kulyegha, nkotoka kubhehe ngita bhibhakitenda bhando bhambone. Bhene ukekenala kumiho jhabhe bhabhonekana palonge jha bhando bhatei kukihibhilikiya kulyegha. Ninnobholela chakaka, bhene bhalepitwe njwe ndweko jhabhe.
6.17: Nambo mwenga pumukihibhilikiya kulyegha, npakala muto gwino mahuta, na kumiho jhino nkuhe mache,
6.18: mundo jhojhoha ankotoka kumanya nnekite kulyegha, nambo umanyikane Tate gwino jwaghabhona kwa kinyemela. Na Tate gwino jwalolekeya ghughabhii nkate, nahupa. Kihukilo kunane kwa Chapanga Luka 12:33,34
6.19: “Nkotoka kukibhekela kihukilo pannema pano, umeya uhoto kuhangabhana, bhibhakwatula ujhingii na kukwatula.
6.20: Nambo mukibhekele kihukilo chino kunane kwa Chapanga umeya na ukungo uhoto jhe kuhangabhana, hilu bhibhakwatula bhajhingii jhe kukwatula.
6.21: Nhwalo pala pukibhii kihukilo chino, ndi pupala kubhehe mwojho gwino. Liho ndi lumule lwa yegha Luka 11:34-36
6.22: “Liho lino ndi kolobohi jha yegha. Anda liho lino lyambone, yegha jhino jhoha naibhaha lumule.
6.23: Nambo anda liho lino libhoho, yegha jhino jhoha naibhaha lubhendo. Bhahe, anda lumule lulubhii nkate jhino ndi lubhendo, lono ndi lubhendo lwa kujhoghoha hake! Mundo jwabhii na ilebhe mbwee Luka 16:13; 12:22-31
6.24: “Abhii jhe mundo jwahoto kwahengela akanahota mabhele. Nhwalo nachimwa jhumo na kupala jhola jhubhele, amu nanyeketela na jhumo na kupucha jhonge. Muhoto jhe kunhenge Chapanga na ilebhe pamonga.
6.25: “Ndi nhwalo ninobholela, nkotoka kubhehe na kiholo natulya nike na natunywegha ipala ughome. Amu ngobho imipala kwa nhwalo gwa yegha jhino. Bho, yakulyegha ndi kilebhe kikolongo kupeta ughome? Na yegha, bho, chi kupeta kwa ngobho?
6.26: Mwalolekehe ijhune ya kumanyahe bhimicha ndeka hilu kuhuna amu bhakwete jhe kikoko. Pamonga na gheniya, Tate gwino jwa kunane kwa Chapanga nanicha. Bho, mangota bhamaha ndeka kuliku yenio ijhune?
6.27: Bho, ghane pakate jhino jwabhii na kiholo hake jwahoto kukijhonjekeya machiko gha ughome gwake?
6.28: “Kwa nhwalo gwa ngobho mubhehe na kiholo? Mughalolekehe malobha gha kumanyahe chighahalalila. Ghihenga jhe lihengo hilu kuloka ngobho.
6.29: Nambo ninobholela chakaka, hilu Solomone jwenio na ilebhe yake yoha akapatite jhe kuhwalichwa mbone ngita lilobha limo.
6.30: Bhahe, anda Chapanga ulihwalicha naha lihamba lya mughonda deleno libhii na kilabho jhake ulitagha pa mwotu, bho, mangota nantendela jhe kupeta peniya? Mangota bhando bhumii na kihobholelo chandina!
6.31: “Bhahe, nkotoka kubhehe na kiholo, ‘Natulya nike, natunywa nike, natuhwala nike!’
6.32: Nhwalo gheniya ghoha bhando bhangaumanya Chapanga bhang'ahikila gheniya. Tate gwino jwa kunane kwa Chapanga amanye kubhehe mighana ilebhe yenio yoha.
6.33: Nambo mupalahe hote Unahota gwa Chapanga na ghapala ghoha na gheniya ghoha nanyonjekewa.
6.34: Bhahe, nkotoka kubhehe na kiholo na ilebhe ya kilabho, kilabho ibhii na ilebhe yake. Malola gha lichiko limo ghakwela kwa lichiko lyenio.

7.1: “Nkotoka kwahadabuu bhange, na mangota nahadabulwa na Chapanga,
7.2: nhwalo chimahadabula bhange, ndi mangota nanhuadabulilwa kipemo cheche, chimwapemela bhange, ndi Chapanga nanhadabulila kwino.
7.3: Bho, nhwalo gwa nike mukibhona kipalamande chikibhii muliho lya nnongo gwino, nambo mulibhona jhe lijhola lilibhii muliho lino?
7.4: Amu mihoto bhole kunongolela nnongo gwino, Nnongo, denda nimohe lipande muliho lino, kongo nkwete lijhola muliho lino?
7.5: Mwenga mukitenda mundo jwaumbone! Mulibhohe hote lijhola lilibhii muliho lino na peniya ndi nanola telatela na kuhoto kubhoha lijhola lilibhii muliho lya nnongo gwino.”
7.6: “Nkotoka kwapela ghimbwa ilebhe ya Chapanga, bhahoto kughalambuka na kukachulana mangota amu nkotoka kwataghii magholobhe lwambo ya lulo bhahoto kughatimbatimba kwa magholo ghabhe. Nnyope na mpalahe na nkong'onde litangala Luka 11:9-13
7.7: “Nnyope na mangota napelwa, mupalahangane nampata, nkong'onde litangala na mangota nadindulilwa.
7.8: Nhwalo gwenio mundo jhojhoha jwajhopa upelwa, na mundo jhojhoha jwapalaha napata, na jwakong'onda litangala nadindulilwa.
7.9: Bho, abhii jhojhoha pakate jhino jwanyopa mwana mundo libumunda, na jwenie napela lighanga?
7.10: Amu bho, anda anyopite luhomba, nampela lijhoka?
7.11: Anda yenio bhahe, mangota pamonga na gwanganandela gwino, mimanya kwaipela yana hino yambone, chakaka Tate gwino jwa kunane kwa Chapanga natenda kuchocha kwa peniya. Nabhapela ghambone bhala bhibhannyopa.”
7.12: “Ghoha ghumipala bhando bhantendele mangota, mwatendele bheniya helahela. Naha ndi chililonge Lilaghalikilo lya Chapanga lyakampekiye Mucha na mabholo gha milondole bha Chapanga.” Litangala likombaho Luka 13:24
7.13: “Nnyingile kwa kupete nnyango nkombaho. Kwa nhwalo ndela jhilongocha mukuwegha ndi ngolongwa, na litangala lya kujhingilila mwenio ndi ngolongwa, bhubhajhenda ndela jhenie bhabhii twe.
7.14: Nambo ndela jhijhenda mughome gwa machiko ghoha ndi ngombaho, na litangala lya kujhingilila hele likombaho, ndi bhando bhandina tugha bhihoto kuimanya ndela jhene.” Nkongo na uhohe gwake Luka 6:43-44
7.15: “Mukilolekehe na milondole bhuwange. Bhene uhika kwino bhabhonekana ngita mambelele kwa panja, nambo kwa nkate mamehe.
7.16: Namamanya kwa mahengo ghabhe. Bho, bhando upochomola mahuku mu mikongo jha mibha, amu ntine mu mikwanga?
7.17: Bhahe, nkongo gwambone upambika uhohe gwa mbone, na nkongo gwanganandela upambika uhohe gwanganandela.
7.18: Nkongo gwamaha uhoto ng'o kupambika uhohe gwangamanyika, hilu nkongo gwangamanyika uhoto jhe kupambika uhohe ghambone.
7.19: Kila nkongo gwangapambika uhohe gwambone naupengulwa na kutagwa pamwotu.
7.20: Kwa ngoheno, namamanya kwa mahengo ghabhe.” Nimanyite jhe mangota Luka 13:25-27
7.21: “Chi kila mundo jwangema, ‘Bhambo, Bhambo,’ najhingila Munahota nkolongwa gwa kunane kwa Chapanga, nambo jhola tugha jwahenga ghala ghapala Tate gwango jwabhii kunane kwa Chapanga.
7.22: Bhando bhamahele nabhanongolela lichiko lela lya luhadabulo, ‘Bhambo, Bhambo!’ Kwa liina lino tukatangiche malobhe ghino, na kwa liina lino tukabhengite michuka na kuhenga ikangacho twe.
7.23: Peniya nanikanila, ‘Niumanyingine ng'o mangota, mmokengane palonge jhango, mangota bhumutenda mabhoho.’ Mapunde bhabhele bhubhachenga Luka 6:47-49
7.24: “Bhahe, kwa kila mundo jwajhokanikiya malobhe ghango na kughahenge lihengo, ahwanana na mundo jhuna malango, jwachengite nyumba jhake panane jha lindalabho.
7.25: Hula ijhakukoma, ngemba ijhakutwelela, kimbonga kijhapogha na kuhinyuanyua nyumba jhene. Nambo nyumba jhene ikagwii jhe nhwalo ikachengwite panane jha lindalabho.
7.26: “Nambo mundo jhojhoha jwajhoha malobhe ghango changaghahenge lihengo, nalandana na mundo jwapumbumwike jwachengite nyumba jhake panane jha ncheke.
7.27: Hula ijhakukoma, ngemba ijhakuheluka mache, kimbonga kijhakunyuanyua nyumba jhene, na nyumba jhene ijhakugwegha, na kugwegha kwenio kujhabhehe kukolongwa.” Ukindendeke gwa Yecho
7.28: Yecho pajhomolila kulonge malobhe gheniya, lilongo lya bhando bhajhakukangacha kwa mabholo ghake.
7.29: Nhwalo akibha jhe anda bhabhola bheniya bha malaghalikilo, nambo abholita ngita jhuna ukindendeke.

8.1: Yecho pahelila ku kitombe, lilongo likolongwa lya bhando lijhakunkengama.
8.2: Bhahe, akahikite mundo jhuna malohe, akanyinamile alongila, “Bhambo, anda uhoto kunyelebhula, unyelebhulajhe!”
8.3: Yecho ajhakuhatambuu lubhoko lwake na kumpapaha na kulonge, “Nipala! Nnyelebhuke.” Papa mundo jwenio ajhakulama malohe gwake.
8.4: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakunnobholela, Dolokeya, “Nkotoka kunobhole mundo jhojhoha, nambo nnyende mukakilangiye kwa mupiya litambiko jwa Chapanga, na mpeleke litambiko lino kwa nhwalo gwa kujhelebhuka kwino ngita chalaghalikiye Mucha nhwalo gwa kwalangii bhando bhoha nnamite.” Kihobholelo cha kilongoche jhumo jwa ku Loma Luka 7:1-10
8.5: Yecho pajhingila kubomane jha ku Kapelenaumo, nkolongwa jwa akakomana ngondo jhumo jwa ku Loma ajhakunyendelela Yecho na kumpembelekeya antangatile.
8.6: Alongila, “Bhambo, ntumiche gwango agholwike unyumba, atengwike yegha na yegha jhoha ibhina.”
8.8: Jwenio nkolongwa jwa akakomana ngondo ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, itope ndeka mwenga kujhingila nkate jha nyumba jhango. Nambo unnobholele lilobhe tugha, na ntumiche jwango nalama.
8.9: Nhwalo nenga mii mundo pahe jha ukindendeke gwa bhange, ngwete akakomana ngondo pahe yango. Anda ninnobholile jhumo, ‘Jhenda!’ Na jwenio ujhenda, na ninnobholela jhonge ‘Ika!’ Na jwenio uhika. Anda ninnobholile ntumiche gwango, ‘Nhwenge lende.’ Na jwenio uhenga.”
8.10: Yecho pajhohina malobhe gheniya, akakangiche hake, ajhakwalobholela bhando bhubhakibha bhankengima, “Ninnobholela chakaka, nanapatajhe kulola mundo jhojhoha ku Ichilahele jhuna kihobholelo ngita chenje.
8.11: Bhahe, nalobholela bhando bhamahele nabhahika kuhumii kulipitii lyobha na kulitipikii lyobha, na bhene nabhatama pa unyagho gwa kulyegha pamonga na Ulahimo, Isaka na Yakobu mu Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga.
8.12: Nambo bhala bhubhapalwa kubhehe mu Unahota gwono ndi bhataghwii panja, kulubhendo, kweno nabhalela na kuyagha mino.”
8.13: Peniya Yecho ajhakunnobholela nkolo jwa akakomana ngondo jweno, “Nnyende kajha, na ibhehe ngita chimuhobholela.” Ntumiche gwake ajhakulama lichaa lelela lela. Yecho ilamicha bhando bhamahele Maluku 1:29-34; Luka 4:38-41
8.14: Yecho ajhakujhenda ukajha kwa Petile, ajhakunkola nkoano mundo mwikeghe Petile agholwike pakindanda, itenda kupyopa hake.
8.15: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakumpapaha majhe jwenio lubhoko, na ulwalo ukannekekiye, ajhakujhema na kutumbuu kwatelekela.
8.16: Pikihikita kimiye, bhakannetile bhando twe bhubhakibha na michuka, na jwenio, kwa malobhe ghake, ajhakubhenga michuka jhene. Ajhakwalamicha bhando bhoha bhubhalalwita.
8.17: Akatei gheniya ghighalongilwa na nnondole Isaya ghatimile, “Jwenio atoile malola ghito, agheghite malola na malwalo ghito.” Bhibhatope kubhehe bhabholwa Luka 9:57-62
8.18: Yecho pabhonita lilongo lya bhando lintindile, ajhakwalobholela, bhabholwa bhake bhajhende kwiye jha lilabha.
8.19: Mmola jhumo jwa Malaghalikilo akanyendile Yecho, akannobholile, “Mmola, nenga naninkengama mwenga kokoha kola kumijhenda.”
8.20: Yecho akannyangwile, “Mabweya ghabhii na mikwembe jhabhe na ijhune ibhii na mihuhe jhabhe, nambo Mwana gwa Mundo akwete ndeka pakujhebhelekeya lubhaho lwake.”
8.21: Peniya mundo jhonge pakate jha bhabholwa bhake ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, nnyende hote kunchika tate gwango.”
8.22: Nambo Yecho ajhakunobholela, “Ungengame! Mwaleke bhubhawile bhachikane bhubhawile chika.” Yecho ipwatalila kimbonga Maluku 4:35-41; Luka 8:22-25
8.23: Yecho ajhakujhingii mungalabha, na bhabholwa bhake bhajhakujhenda pamonga na jwenio.
8.24: Peniya kijhakupeti kimbonga kikolongwa mulilabha, matuhe gha mache ghajhatumbu kuyekelela ngalabha. Yecho akibha agholwike lugwenio.
8.25: Bhabholwa bhakannyendile Yecho, bhajhakunyimuha bhalongila, “Bhambo, mutukombole, tuwegha!”
8.26: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mangota bhumii na kihobholelo chandina, bho, nhwalo gwa nike mijhoghopa?” Bhahe, akajhinwike, ajhakukipwatalila kimbonga na matuhe gha mache ghala gha mulilabha lela ghajhakubhehe njelembo na teeke.
8.27: Bhando bhakakangiche hake, bhalongila, “Bho, ojho mundo ghane ade kimbonga kinnyeketela?” Yecho abhalamicha bhando bhabhele bhina michuka Maluku 5:1-20; Luka 8:26-39
8.28: Yecho akahikite ku kilambo cha bha Gelache kwiye jha lilabha, na kwono bhando bhabhele bhubhakibha na michuka bhakakonganiki nako bhahumila ku mambe. Bhando bheniya bhakibha bha kujhoghoha hake, abhii jhe mundo jwahotwila kupete ndela jhene.
8.29: Na bhene bhakatumbwii kulalama, “Mipala nike kwa nenga mwenga Mwana gwa Chapanga? Bho, uhikite kutung'aha kongo lichiko linahika jhe?”
8.30: Pahina na peniya pakibha na lilongo likolongwa lya magholobhe ghighaluchitwa.
8.31: Peniya michuka ikampembelikihe Yecho, “Anda mipala kutubhoha, bhahe, mutulekekehe tughajhingii magholobhe ghala.”
8.32: Yecho akabhalobhalile, “Chakaka, nnyendengane.” Peniya bhajhakubhoka kwa bhando bheniya, na kughajhingii magholobhe. Lilongo lyoha lya magholobhe lijhakutilila muluhelelo na kutumbukila mulilabha na kuhobholela mwenio.
8.33: Bhalucha magholobhe bhajhakutila na kujhenda kubomane. Kwalobholela bhando malobhe ghoha na mambu ghighapitile bhando bhala bhubhakibha na michuka.
8.34: Bhahe, bhando bhoha bha muche ghola bhajhakubhoka, bhakanyendilii Yecho, na kumpembelekeya, abhoke mu kilambo chabhe.

9.1: Yecho pakwelita mungalabha, ajhakujhomboka lilabha na kuhika mumuche gwake.
9.2: Peniya bhando bhakannetile mundo jhumo jwatengwike yegha, aghonikichwe mu nchekacheka. Yecho palolita kihobholelo chabhe, ajhakunnobholela mundo jwatengwike, “Kangamala mwanango! Nnekekiwe uhakaho gwino.”
9.3: Bhabhola bhange bha Malaghalikilo gha mucha bhange bhakatumbwi kupwepwelana, “Mundo ojho innigha Chapanga!”
9.4: Yecho akamanye chibhahola, akalongi, “Nhwalo ghane mihwachila ghanganandela kumiojho jhino?
9.5: Nike chikijhojwike kulonge, ‘Uhakaho gwino ulekekiwe,’ amu kulonge, ‘Nnyeme ntyange?’
9.6: Bhahe, nipala umanye, Mwana gwa Mundo akwete ukindendeke pannema gwa kwalekekeya bhando uhakaho.” Peniya ajhakunnobholela mundo jwenio jwatengwike, “Jhimuka, tola nchekacheka gwino, nnyende ukajha kwino.”
9.7: Mundo jwenio jwakatengwike akajhinwike, akajhawii ukajha.
9.8: Bhando bhoha pa lilongo lyenio pibhalolita gheniya, bhajhakukangacha na kujhoghopa, bhajhakunnomba Chapanga jwabhapekiye bhando ukindendeke gwa kuhenga gheniya. Yecho inkema Matei Maluku 2:13-17; Luka 5:27-32
9.9: Yecho ajhakubhoka peniya, na pabhokita, akamwene mundo jhumo jwakemitwa Matei, atamite munyumba jha kulepe kode. Bhahe, Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Hika ungengame.” Matei akajhemite, ajhakunkengama.
9.10: Yecho pakibha ukajha kwa Matei, na atamite pahe kwa nhwalo gwa kulyegha, bhibhalepecha kode bhamahele na bhibhahenga mabhoho bhakahikite na kutama pamonga na jwenio na bhabholwa bhake.
9.11: Mapwalichayo pibhalolita gheniya, bhajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Nhwalo ghane mmola gwino ilyegha pamonga na bhibhalepecha kode na bhibhahenga uhakaho?”
9.12: Yecho ajhakwajhoha, akalongi, “Bhando bhangalwalwa bhipala ndeka nng'anga, bhibhimpala ndi bhala bhibhalwalwa.
9.13: Bhahe, mukakibhole mana jha malobhe agha, ‘Nipala kiya, na chi litambiko.’ Nakahikite jhe kwakema bhando bhambone palonge jha Chapanga, nambo bhina uhakaho.” Mabholo gha kupunga kulyegha Maluku 2:18-22; Luka 5:33-39
9.14: Peniya, bhabholwa bha Yohane Mbatichajhe bhakannyendile Yecho, bhakankonyite, “Twenga na Mapwalichayo tipunga kulyegha mala jhamahele, bho, nhwalo ghane bhabholwa bhino bhipunga ndeka?”
9.15: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Bho, bhando bhibhalalikwe kuunyagho gwa ndowa ipalwa kubhehe ngolongondi na peniya nnyinamwale abhii pamonga na bhene? Ihoto ndeka kupunga! Nambo lichiko libhii kuhika nnyinamwale nabhoka pakate jhabhe, peniya ndi nabhapunga kulyegha.
9.16: “Bhando bhibheka ndeka kibhambo cha ngobho yono na kuchonolela mukindukotuko. Nhwalo kindukonduko chenie naijwepula ngobho jha makacho, na pala pupakibha pajwepwike napajhonjekeka.
9.17: Hilu bhando bhibheka ndeka divaye yono mulihako lya makacho lya limbendela. Anda bhatehi naha, lihako lyenio nalijwepuka na divaye naijhitika, na lihako yenio lya limbendela nailola. Bhando bhibheka divaye yono mulihako liyono, na yoha ibhena, lihako lya limbendela na divaye, naibhaha njelembo.” Nchikana jwawile na majhe jhumo jwalwalwa Maluku 5:21-43; Luka 8:40-56
9.18: Yecho palongila gheniya, nkolo jhumo Uyahude akahikite, akannyinamile na kulonge, “Nchikana gwango ahwii ngohengohe. Nambo chonde, tijhende ukamekele lubhoko lwino na jwenio nalama.”
9.19: Yecho ajhakulongohana na bhabholwa bhake, bhajhakunkengama helahela.
9.20: Majhe jhumo, atehila kulwalwa ulwalo gwa pihe kwa yaka kome na ibhele, ajhakunkengama Yecho chakuyeto, akapapihe lilombolo lya ngobho jhake.
9.21: Ajhakukilobholela hote akahwachii ku mwojho gwake, “Anda mbapihe tugha ngobho jhake namaha njelembo.”
9.22: Bhahe, Yecho paghalambwika ajhakumona, ajhakunnobholela, “Nchikana gwango nkangamale mwojho, kihobholelo chino kinnamiche.” Nchikana jwenio akalamite papa peniya.
9.23: Peniya Yecho akajhingii munyumba jha munahota jhola. Na kwabhona pibhahonita itolilo na lilongo lya bhando bhibhalela kongo bhayolayola pahe,
9.24: alongila, “Mmokangane pamba! Nchikana jhonjo ahwii ndeka, agholwike tugha.” Na bhene bhajhakunheka.
9.25: Bhahe, lilongo lya bhando pibhabhokita, Yecho akajhingii nkate, akankamwii nchikana jhola lubhoko, na jwenio ajhakujhema.
9.26: Malobhe gheniya ghajhakupechangana pa kilambo choha. Yecho abhalamicha bhangalola bhabhele
9.27: Yecho pibhabhokita peniya, pakibha ijhenda, bhangalola bhabhele bhajhakunkengama bhalalima, “Mwana gwa Daude, umonele kiya!”
9.28: Yecho pajhingila munyumba, bhando bhabhele bheniya bhajhakunnyendela, na jwenio ajhakwakonya, “Bho, minnyeketela ngita nihotola kunamicha?” Na bhene bhakanyangwile, “Chakaka, Bhambo.”
9.29: Peniya, Yecho akapapihe miho ghabhe, alongila, “Na ibhaha kwino ngita chimuhobholela.”
9.30: Miho ghabhe ghakadindwike. Na jwenio Yecho ajhakwakanakiya kwa lilaka, “Nkotoka kunnobholela mundo jhojhoha kilebhe eche.”
9.31: Nambo bhene bhakabhokangine, na kughatangacha malobhe gha Yecho mu kilambo chela choha. Yecho innamicha mundo jwangalongela
9.32: Bhando bhala pubhabhokingina, bhando bhange bhajhakunnetela Yecho mundo jhumo jwangalongela nhwalo akibha na nchuka.
9.33: Papa peniya nchuka ghola pubhohitwa, mundo jwenio jwakibha ilonge ndeka akatumbwii kulonge kabhele. Bhando bhakakangiche na kulonge, “Lijhambu ngita elele likapiti ndeka mu Ichilahele!”
9.34: Nambo Mapwalichayo bhakibha bhalongila, “Abhenga michuka kwa likakala lya nkolo gwa michuka.” Yecho abhabhone kiya bhando
9.35: Yecho akatyangile miche jhoha na muchenda, ajhakubhola munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude ajhakutangacha Malobhe gha Mbone gha Unahota gwa Chapanga na kulamicha ulwalo gwoha na kwabhokeha bhando malagho ghabhe.
9.36: Bhahe, pabhabhonita bhando ibhogha ibhogha, ajhakwabhone kiya nhwalo bhakibha bhatotokile na bhabhii na bhoghohe ngita mambelele ghangabhehe na nnuchajhe.
9.37: Peniya ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Mahuno ghamahena, nambo bhahenga mahengo bhandina.
9.38: Bhahe, munnyope nkolo mahuno abhalete bhahenga mahengo ahuna mahuno ghake.”

10.1: Yecho ajhakwakema pamonga bhabholwa bhake kome na bhabhele, na kwapela ukindendeke gwa kubhenga michuka na kulamicha ulwalo na malagho ghoha.
10.2: Maina gha akatenga bheniya kome na bhabhele ndi ghanga: Simone jwakemitwa Petile na unung'una mundo Anduleya, na Yakobu mwana gwa Zebedayo, na Yohane nnongo mundo,
10.3: Filipu na Batulomayo, na Tomache na Matei jwalepicha kode, na Yakobu mwana gwa Alufayo, na Tadayo,
10.4: Simone mundo jwakikengelela kilambo chake, na Yuda Sikaliyote jwanyambila Yecho. Yecho abhatuma bhabholwa bhake kome na bhabhele Maluku 6:7-13; Luka 9:1-6
10.5: Yecho ajhakwatuma na kwapela ukindendeke bhabholwa kome na bhabhele bheniya, ajhakwalaghalikiya, “Nkotoka kujhenda kwa bhando bha ilambo henge. Hilu nkotoka kujhingii miche jhojhoha jha bha Samaliya.
10.6: Nambo mwajhendelele bhando bha ku Ichilahele, nhwalo bhabhii ngita mambelele ghighahobhalile.
10.7: Pumajhendelela mwatangachila naha, ‘Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga nheghelile.’
10.8: Mwalamiche bhibhalwalwa na mwayokeche bhubhawile na mwalamiche bhubhabhii na malohe na muhibhenge michuka. Mupatite jhajhe na mangota ntende jhajhe.
10.9: Nkotoka kughegha mu mahako ghino chaabo amu mbijha amu matobholo gha shaba.
10.10: Nkotoka kughegha lihako lya mwanja amu ngobho ya kujhangangana amu maghubache amu nkongocho. Nhwalo jwahenga lihengo atope malepo ghake kwa kila lichiko.”
10.11: “Pumujhingi pamuche amu chenda jhojhoha, mpalahe mundo jwapala kumpokela, na mangota ntame kwa jwenio ade pumubhokangana kwenio.
10.12: Pumujhingii nkate mwajhambuche akolo muche, mwalobholela, ‘Uteeke ubhehe pa nyumba jhenjeno.’
10.13: Anda akolo muche gwenio nabhapokela mangota, uteeke gwino utame nako, nambo nabhampokejhe bhahe, uteeke gwenio naghumujhila mabhene.
10.14: Bhahe, anda mundo jhojhoha akanile kupokela amu kunyokanikiya mangota, pumubhoka munyumba jhene amu muche gwenio, nkung'unde lutukunda lulubhii mumagholo ghino.
10.15: Ninnobholela chakaka, lichiko lya Chapanga lya luhadabulo, muche gwenio nahubhaha mumalagho makolonga kuliku ghighapatite bhando bha ku Sodoma na ku Gomola! Malagho ghughahika kwa bhabholwa Maluku 13:9-13; Luka 21:12-17
10.16: “Ngoheno mukilolekeye, nitumangana mangota ngita mambelele pakate jha mamehe. Nkola malango ngita lijhoka na ntokomala ngita ngunda.
10.17: Mukilolekehe na bhando, nhwalo nabhatakalila panyumba jha mihalo na kunkenyuu yato munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude.
10.18: Nabhampeleka palonge jha ilongoche na akanahota kwa nhwalo jha nenga, kwa kwalobholela malobhe gha mbone, helahela kwa bhando bha ilambo ahenge.
10.19: Bhahe, pubhantakalila munyumba jha mihalo, nkotoka kubhehe na kiholo nanongila kilebhe ghane amu nanongela kwa ndela ghane, lichiko lyenio pulipalakuhika, namolwa gha kulonge.
10.20: Nhwalo mangota nanongela jhe kilebhe, nambo Uhuke gwa Tate gwino ghubhii nkate jhino ndi nalongela.
10.21: “Nnongo nanyambila nnongo mundo akomwe na tate nanyambila mwana mundo, na yana yenio hele nabhakachulana akatate bhabhe na kwakoma.
10.22: Bhando bhoha nabhanchimwa mangota kwa nhwalo gwa unnyeketile nenga. Nambo jhola jwapala kuhimbilila ade kujhomolela jwenio naghombokoka.
10.23: Bhando bhubhang'aha mmuche ghumo, ntilile muche ghonge. Ninobholela chakaka, nanyomolele jhe kuntindila mumiche jhoha jha ku Ichilahele kabula jha Mwana gwa Mundo anahika.
10.24: “Mmolwa ampeta ndeka mmola gwake, hilu ntumiche apeta jhe nkolo gwake.
10.25: Nambo ikwela kwa mmolwa kulandana na mmola mundo na kwa mmanda alandana na nkolo mundo. Anda bhankemite nkolo jwa nyumba, Belechebule, bho, nabhankema jhe bhando bhange bhubhabhii munyumba jhene mahina ghanganandela kupeta lyenele? Ghane jwakulendemwa Luka 12:2-7
10.26: “Bhahe, nkotoka kwajhoghopa bhando. Kilebhe chochoha chikiyekelilwe nakiyekulilwa, na kila kilebhe chikihihitwe nakibhaha mbegha.
10.27: Ghala ghunitangachila mulubhendo, mughalonge pakalamuhe na lininnobholila panga bhando mulilongele palonge jha bhando.
10.28: Nkotoka kwajhoghopa bhala bhibhahoto kukoma yegha, nambo bhahoto jhe kukoma uhuke, mbaha kunyoghopa jhola jwahoto kukoma yegha pamonga na uhuke na kuntaghii pa mwotu gwa machiko ghoha gwangahimika.
10.29: Iyebhelele ibhele uchuluchwa kwa chenti jhimo jhandina. Nambo hilu jhumo pakate jhabhe agwejhe pahe changamanya Tate gwino.
10.30: Nambo kwa mangota, jwenio abhalinge majhunjo ghughabhii umuto gwino.
10.31: Ngohe, nkotoka kujhoghopa, nhwalo mangota bhambone kupeta iyebhelele twe! Kujheketela na kunkana Kilichitu Luka 12:8-9
10.32: “Mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketela nenga palonge jha bhando, na nenga hele naninyeketela palonge jha Tate gwango jwabhii kunane.
10.33: Nambo mundo jhojhoha jwangana palonge jha bhando, na nenga hele nanikanila palonge jha Tate gwango jwabhii kunane kwa Chapanga. Mpechangano Luka 12:51-53; 14:26-27
10.34: “Mwangahambuka hikite pannema pano kuleta uteeke. Nenga hikite jhe pano kwatenda bhando bhatame kwa uteeke, nambo kuleta ngondo.
10.35: Nhwalo hikite kuleta bhulo pakate jha mundo na tate mundo, na nchikana na majhe mundo pakate jha nkohano na nkohano mundo mwikeghe,
10.36: na makoko bha mundo ndi bhando bha ukajhake.
10.37: “Jhola jwampala tate mundo amu majhe mundo kuliku nenga, jwamaha ndeka kubhehe mmolwa gwango. Mundo jwampala mwana amu nchikana kuliku nenga, jwamaha ndeka kubhehe mmolwa gwango.
10.38: Mundo jhojhoha jwanga ghegha nchalaba gwake na kungengama jwamaha ndeka kubhehe mmolwa gwango.
10.39: Nhwalo mundo jhojhoha jwaupala kulonda ughome gwake, nauhobhecha. Nambo jwauhobhecha ughome gwake kwa nhwalo gwa kunyeketela nenga naukombola kabhele. Ndweko kwa bhibhannyeketii Yecho Maluku 9:41
10.40: “Mundo jhojhoha jwampokela mangota, ambokela nenga helahela. Na jwenio jwambokela nenga ampokii jhola jwandumita.
10.41: Mundo jwapokela nnondole jwa Chapanga, nhwalo ndi nnondole jwa Chapanga, napokela ndweko jha ulondole gwa Chapanga. Mundo jwampokela mundo kwa nhwalo jwambone palonge jha Chapanga, napokela ndweko jha mundo jwambone palonge jha Chapanga.
10.42: Ninnobholela chakaka, mundo jhojhoha jwampela kimiche jha mache mahihimo kwa jhumo jwa bhando bhamba bhangamanyikana kwa nhwalo ndi mmolwa gwango, chakaka napokela ndweko yake.”

11.1: Yecho pajhomolila kwapela bhabholwa bhake kome na bhabhele malaghalikilo, ajhakubhoka peniya, akajhahwii kubhola na kwatangachila bhando Malobhe gha Mbone mu miche jhibhii pahina.
11.2: Yohane Mbatichajhe pakibha mukipungo akajhohine ghala ghahengita Yecho Kilichitu. Bhahe, Yohane akabhatumite bhabholwa bhake,
11.3: bhankonye, “Bho, mwenga ndi jhola jwahika, amu tunnendele jhonge?”
11.4: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Nnyendengane mukannobholele Yohane ghala ghumujhoha na kughabhona.
11.5: Bhangalola bhilola, bhubhalemile bhityanga, bhina na malohe bhilamichwa, bhangajhoha bhijhoha, bhubhawile bhiyokechwa na akahocho bhatangachilwa Lilobhe lya Mbone.
11.6: Jhuna mota mundo jhola jwanganeka kunyeketela nenga.”
11.7: Bhahe, bhabholwa bha Yohane pubhabhokita, Yecho akatumbwii kulongelela lilongo lya bhando malobhe gha Yohane, mkajhahwii kulola nike kola kunjenga? Bho, mukapaile kulinga matete ghighanyuha nyuha upepo?
11.8: Bhahe, mukajhawile kulola nike? Bho, Nnyahwila kunninga mundo jwawalite ngobho ichuluchwa kwa mbijha yamahele? Bhando bhibhahwala ngobho ya mbone utama munyumba jha unahota.
11.9: Nambo, unnobholele nike chimukajhawile kulinga? Bho, nnondole jwa Chapanga? Tela, chakaka jwenio ndi nkolongwa kupeta nnondole jwa Chapanga jhumoyobhalile.
11.10: “Yohane ndi jwalongelwa mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga, Chapanga alongila, ‘Dolokeya, nenga nintuma jumbe gwango alongolele, jwenio natengenecha ndela jhino.’
11.11: Ninobholela chakaka, pakate jha yana yoha ya bhando, anahwahi jhe kutama jwabhii nkolo kuliku Yohane Mbatichajhe. Peniya jhola jwabhii nchokombe munahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga, ndi nkolongwa kuliku jwenio.
11.12: Kuhumii mu machiko gha Yohane Mbatichajhe ade deleno, Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga ukanwa kwa makakala, na bhando bhubhabhii na bhulo na makakala bhijhigha kuupoka kwa likakala.
11.13: Mabholo ghoha gha milondole bha Chapanga na Lilaghalikilo lya Chapanga lyapekiwe Mucha ade lichiko lya Yohane, ghoha ghakalotile unahota gwa Chapanga.
11.14: Anda mihoto kujheketela ghanga, bhahe, Yohane ndi Eliya jwahika.
11.15: Jwabhii na machikilo gha kujhoha na ajhohe!
11.16: “Bhahe, nikihwananicha kibheleko chenje na kilebhe ghane? Ngita yana ikibha itamite pa liguliho, bhibhakibha bhilongehana kibhogha chimo na chenge.
11.17: ‘Ahona ng'oma nambo mukina ndeka! Tujhembite mihambo jha ungolongondi nambo mukalelite jhe!’
11.18: Kwa nhwalo Yohane akahikite, ajhakupunga kulyegha anywila ndeka divaye, na bhene bhalongila, ‘Achikilwe nchuka.’
11.19: Mwana gwa Mundo akahikita, alila na kunywegha, na bhene pibhalongila, ‘Nnolokehe hojho, kuhapatika na kulobhela, nkoche jwa akatola kode na bhibhabhii na uhakaho. Nambo malango gha Chapanga ghalangiwe ndi ghambone kwa mahengo ghake.’ ” Bhando ya miche yangajheketela Luka 10:13-15
11.20: Peniya Yecho akatumbwii kwapwatalila bhando bha miche jhela jhakahengite ikangacho yamahena mwenio, bhando bhake bhakapahi ndeka kuleka uhakaho.
11.21: “Nanola choto mwa Kolazine! Nanola choto mwenga mwa Betisaida! Nhwalo ikangacho itendika kwino, ngahitendika ku Tilo na ku Sidone, kuhumii makacho bhando bhake ngabhatumbwile kuwala ngobho ya majafafa na kutama paliho kulangiya bhamujhii Chapanga!
11.22: Peniya, ninobholela, lichiko lya luhadabulo, mangota napata malagho makolongwa kuliku bhando bha ku Tilo na ku Sidone.
11.23: Mwenga, ma Kapelenaumo! Bho, namukikweya ade kunane kwa Chapanga? Oko naha ndeka, nabhahuluha ade ku kilambo cha bhando bhubhawile! Ngita ikangacho ihengika kwino ngaitendika kola ku Sodoma, muche gwenio na ngaubhii ade deleno.
11.24: Nambo ninnobholela, bhando bha ku Kapelenaumo lichiko lya luhadabulo nabhapata luhadabulo lukolongwa kuliku bhando bha ku Sodoma.” Nhwike kwa nenga mupomolele Luka 10:21-22
11.25: Machiko ghagha Yecho akalongile, “Nichengula mwe mwa Tate, Bhambo jwa kunane kwa Chapanga na pannema, kwa nhwalo mwahihite bhubhabhii na malango na bhando bhubhachomite malobhe ghanga na kwayekulila yana ichokombe.
11.27: “Tate gwango ambekiye ilebhe yoha. Abhii ndeka jwaumanya Mwana nga Tate mundo, na abhii jhe jwaumanya Tate mundo nga Mwana na jhojhoha jwampahile mwana uyekulila.
11.28: “Hike kwa nenga mabhoha bhumilagha na kutotokela na mihigho, na nenga nanimpomoha.
11.29: Mukikonge lingolengole lyango, mukibhole kwa nenga, nhwalo nenga ndi natokomaho na natembekeho gwa mwojho, na nanintenda mupomolele miojho jhino.
11.30: Bhahe, lingolengole nimpela ndi lijhebhejhaho, na nhigho gwango nnyojhoho.”

12.1: Mu machiko gheniya, Yecho akibha ityanga mu mighonda jha ngano Lichiko lya Kupomolela. Bhahe, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakubhona njala, bhakatumbwii kutwekula manjwanjwane na kuyoghola ngano, bhakalile mbejho yake.
12.2: Mapwalichayo pibhalolita gheniya, bhajhakunnobholela Yecho, “Dolokeya, bhabholwa bhino bhihenga kilebhe chamaha jhe kuhenga Lichiko lya Kupomolela.”
12.3: Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Bho, mukachomitejhe ghahengita Daude pamonga na ajhake pibhakibha na njala?
12.4: Jwenio akajhingii mu Nyumba jha Chapanga na kulyegha mabumunda ghighapihitwe kwa Chapanga. Jwenio na bhajhake bhakakanikiwe kulye mabumunda gheniya nhwalo mabumunda gheniya ghalilwa na akapiya matambiko tugha.
12.5: Amu bho, nchomite ndeka mukitabo cha Malaghalikilo ngita Lichiko lya Kupomolela akapiya matambiko mu Nyumba jha Chapanga chakaka utwekula malaghalikilo gha Lichiko lya Kupomolela, nambo bhiholelela ndeka ngita bhalemwa.
12.6: Bhahe, ninnobholela pamba abhii nkolongwa kuliku Nyumba jha Chapanga.
12.7: Anda umanye mana jha malobhe agha, ‘Nipala kiya na chi litambiko,’ nga mwahadabwii ndeka bhando bhanga ulemwa.
12.8: Peniya Mwana gwa Mundo abhii na Uhotolo panane jha Lichiko lya Kupomolela.” Mundo jwatengwike lubhoko Maluku 3:1-6; Luka 6:6-11
12.9: Yecho akabhokite peniya, akajhahwii munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude.
12.10: Mwenio kukibha na mundo jhumo jwatengwike lubhoko. Bhahe, bhando bhakankonyite Yecho, “Bho, ndi mbone kunnamicha mundo Lichiko lya Kupomolela?” Bhankonyita naha bhapaliya ndela jha kuntakalila.
12.11: Nambo Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Tulonge jhumo gwino abhii na limbelele lyake litumbukii mulibhomba, bho, nalipalaijhe na kunhobhola mulibhomba mu Lichiko lya Kupomolela?
12.12: Nambo, mundo abhii nkolongwa kuliku limbelele! Bhahe, ndi mbone kuhenga ghamaha Lichiko lya Kupomolela.”
12.13: Peniya akannobhalile mundo jhola, “Hatambula lubhoko lwino.” Akahatambwile, na lujhakubhehe njelembo ngita longe lola.
12.14: Bhahe, Mapwalichayo bhakapitite panja, bhajhakupalaha ndela jha kunkoma Yecho. Ntumiche jwahaghulilwe na Chapanga
12.15: Nambo Yecho akamanye lilobhe lyenio, ajhakubhoka peniya. Bhando bhamahele bhajhakunkengama, akalamiche bhibhalwalwa bhoha,
12.16: ajhakwapwatalila bhakotoka kwalobholela bhando malobhe ghake.
12.17: Ateila naha ghala ghighalongilwe na Chapanga kwa ndela jha nnondole Isaya ghatimile.
12.18: “Dolokeya ntumiche gwango jhunihagwile, jhunimpala na jwandenda hangane hake mumwojho. Naniubheka Uhuke gwango panane jhake, na jwenio nalobholela bhando luhadabulo lwango pannema gwoha.
12.19: Nabhaha ndeka na mitaho hilu kuchobhela, hilu lilobhe lyake nalijhokanikika jhe mundela.
12.20: Nnahe gwayaghike naudenyuka ndeka, hilu utambe ghuhuka lyoi nauhima ndeka, ade nahenga luhadabulo lwa chakaka.
12.21: Bhahe, bhando bhoha bha nnema nabhanhobholela jwenio.” Yecho na Beelzebule Maluku 3:20-30; Luka 11:14-23
12.22: Peniya Yecho bhakannetile mundo jhumo jwangalola na akibha ahotwila jhe kulonge nhwalo akibha na nchuka. Yecho akannamiche ngahotwila kulonge na kulola.
12.23: Lilongo lyoha lya bhando likakangiche na kulonge, “Bho, pange jhonjo ndi Mwana gwa Daude?”
12.24: Nambo Mapwalichayo pibhajhohina gheniya, bhalongila, “Mundo ojho ibhenga nchuka kwa uhotolo gwa Belezebule, nkolo jwa nchuka.”
12.25: Yecho akamanye mahola ghabhe, ajhakwalobholela, “Unahota nkolongwa ghoghoha ghola anda upechengine gwene kwa gwene na kubhehe ibhogha ibhogha gwihoto ndeka kujhema, na bhando bha nyumba jhimo na muche ghoghoha amu nyumba jhojhoha chiibhaghanike ibhogha ibhogha jhiipengana, naugwaha.
12.26: Anda Limbembela abhenga michuka jhake, napengelela jwenio. Bhahe Unahota gwake naujhema bho?
12.27: Mangota milonge nibhenga nchuka kwa likakala lya Belezebule, bho, bhabholwa bhino bhabhenga kwa likakala lya ghane? Nhwalo bhando bhino mabhene nabhahadabula mangota.
12.28: Nambo anda nibhenga nchuka kwa likakala lya Uhuke gwa Chapanga, bhahe, umanye Unahota nkolongwa gwa Chapanga uhikite kwino.
12.29: “Amu ihoto bho mundo kujhingii nyumba jha mundo jhuna likakala na kumpoka ilebhe yake, changa ntabha hote mundo jwenio jhuna likakala? Peniya ndi ihoto kumpoka ilebhe yake.
12.30: “Mundo jhojhoha jwangalongohana na nenga, jwenio angana nenga, mundo jhojhoha jhola jwangalundika pamonga na nenga, atenda kupechengana.
12.31: Nhwalo gwenio, ninobholela, bhando nabhalekekewa uhakaho ghoghoha na maligho ghabhe ghoha, nambo nabhalekekewa ndeka uhakaho gwa kunnigha Uhuke gwa Chapanga
12.32: Mundo jhojhoha jwalongela lilobhe lya kunkanila Mwana gwa Mundo jwenio nalekekewa. Nambo mundo jhojhoha jwalongela lilobhe lya kunkanila Uhuke gwa Chapanga, nalekekewa ndeka pannema pano, hilu kwa nnema ghola ghuhika. Nkongo na uhohe gwake Luka 6:43-45
12.33: “Na nkongo gwamaha upambika uhohe gwamaha, na nkongo gwanganandela upambika uhohe gwanganandela. Nkongo umanyikana kwa uhohe gwake.
12.34: Mangota kibheluko cha lijhoka! Mihoto bho kulonge malobhe ghambone na kongo mangota mwanganandela? Mundo ulonge ghala ghughatwelile kumwojho.
12.35: Mundo jwa mbone ubhoha malobhe ghambone mu kihukilo cha mwojho gwake, na mundo uhakaho ubhoha malobhe mahakaho kuhumii mu kihukilo cha mwojho gwake.
12.36: “Bhahe, ninnobholela, lichiko lya luhadabulo bhando nabhapalwa kujhangula kila lilobhe lyanganandela lyalongila.
12.37: Peniya kwa malobhe ghino nannyeketelwa, na kwa malobhe ghino nauhadabulwa kubhehe na nnemwite jhe.” Kupala ikangacho Maluku 8:11-12; Luka 11:29-32
12.38: Peniya bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo na Mapwalichayo bhakannobhalile Yecho, “Mmola, tupala kulola ikangacho kuhumii kwino.”
12.39: Yecho akajhangwii, “Kibheluko cha bhando cha machiko ghanga chikibhii kibhoho na changannyeketela Chapanga! Mipala ikangacho, napelwa ng'o nambo napelwa ikangacho ya nnondole Yona.
12.40: Nhwalo Yona akapipikiye machiko matato muhi na kilo mulutumbo lwa luhomba nkolongwa, na Mwana gwa Mundo natama nkate jha mumambe machiko matato.
12.41: Bhando bha ku Ninabhe nabhajhema mulichiko lya luhadabulo, na bhene nabhalongela kibheleko chenje kibhii na ulemwa. Nhwalo bhando bha ku Ninabhe bhakaulekite uhakaho pubhajhohina ghighatangichwa na Yona, na kubhehe peniya abhii nkolongwa kupeta Yona!
12.42: Kwa lichiko lya kilongoche mwikeghe, jwahumile ku Cheba, najhema na kwahadabula bhando bha kibheleko chenje bhalemwite, nhwalo jwenio ahumila kutale na kujhenda kujhokanikiya malobhe gha malango gha nkolongwa Chelemane, na pamba abhii munahota nkolongwa kupeta Chelemane. Kubhujhilwa na nchuka Luka 11:24-26
12.43: “Nchuka anda abhengitwe kwa mundo, ityangatyanga kunjenga kujhomo ipalaha pa kupomolela anda apakolihi jhe.
12.44: Ukilongelela, ‘Nangelebhuka kajha jhango kuhumila.’ Nambo piibhujha na kukolela ndopo, ipyaghilwe na kukilimwa mbone,
12.45: Ujhenda kwatola michuka bhange chaba, bhanganandela kuliku jwenio, bhoha uhika na kunnyingii mundo jwenio. Na mundo jwenio ubhehe jwanganandela kuliku chakibha makacho. Ndi naibhaha kwa bhando bhamba bhanganandela.” Majhe na akalongo mundo Yecho Maluku 3:31-35; Luka 8:19-21
12.46: Yecho pajhendilila kulonge na lilongo lya bhando majhe na akalongo bhake bhakahikite na kujhema panja, bhipala kulonge na jwenio.
12.47: Bhahe, mundo jhumo ajhakunnobholela, “Majhe gwino na akalongo bhino bhabhii panja, bhipala kulonge na mwenga.”
12.48: Nambo Yecho akannyangwii mundo jwenio, “Majhe gwango ndi ghane? Na akalongo bhango ndi akina ghane?”
12.49: Peniya akahatambwii lubhoko lwake kwa bhabholwa bhake, alongila, “Bhamba ndi majhe gwango na akalongo bhango!
12.50: Peniya mundo jhojhoha jwahenga lyalipala Tate gwango jwabhii kunane kwa Chapanga, jwenio ndi nnongo gwango na nnombo gwango na majhe gwango.”

13.1: Lichiko lelelalela, Yecho akapitite munyumba jhela, akajhahwii kutama paupele jha lilabha.
13.2: Ibhogha ikolongwa ya bhando ijhakuntindila peniya Yecho ajhakukwela mungalabha, jhakatamite. Bhando bhoha bhajhakujhema muupele jha lilabha,
13.3: Yecho ajhakwabhola na kwalobholela mambu ghamahele kwa nnandanikiho. “Unyokanikiye! Mundo jhumo akajhahwii kumicha mbejho.
13.4: Pamichita mbejho, mbejho henge ikahikii pandela, ijhune ijhakuhika na kuhonyola.
13.5: Henge ikaponi mu ekendo undope ukibha ndeka gwamahele. Ijhakumela kajhombe kwa nhwalo undope ukibha ndeka gwamahele.
13.6: Lyobha lijhakubhala, ijhakutinika, kwa nhwalo mikegha jhake ikajhabhulile jhe pahe, mbejho yela ijhakulelebhala.
13.7: Henge ikaponikiye mumikongo jha mibha, ikakolitejhe nhwalo ikahindamine mbejho ikapambike jhe.
13.8: Henge ikaponikihe mu undope ghubholile, mbejho ijhakumela na kupambika. Henge ipambika mbejho makome kome, henge makome chita na henge makome matato.
13.9: “Jwabhii na machikilo gha kujhoha na ajhohe!” Nhwalo gwa kulonge kwa milandanikiho Maluku 4:10-12; Luka 8:9-10
13.10: Bhabholwa bhake bhakanyendile Yecho na kunkonya, “Nhwalo ghane milonge na bhando kwa milandanikiho?”
13.11: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mangota mpatite kumanya chile jha Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga, nambo bheniya bhayekulilwe ndeka.
13.12: Peniya, jwabhii na kilebhe napelwa nachochokewa, nambo jhola jwangakola kilebhe, hilu chela chabhii nacho napokwa.
13.13: Ndi nhwalo nilonge nabho kwa milandanikiho, nhwalo bhilolekeya nambo bhilola ndeka, bhijhokanikiya nambo bhijhoha ndeka, hilu bhibangatuka ndeka.
13.14: Kwa bhene ghatimile ghighalongilwa na nnondole Isaya. ‘Kujhoha nabhajhoha, nambo nabhabangatuka ndeka. Kulola nanlola, nambo nannoli ndeka.
13.15: Peniya malango gha bhando abhabha ghahubhite, bhahibhite machikilo ghabhe, bhadindite miho ghabhe. Anda nahijhe, ngabhalolite kwa miho ghabhe, ngabhajhohine kwa machikilo ghabhe, ngabhamanyite kwa malango ghabhe, na kung'alambukila, nenga, nganalamiche.’
13.16: “Nambo mina mota mangota, nhwalo miho ghino ghilola na machikilo ghino ghijhoha.
13.17: Ninnobholela chakaka, milondole twe na bhando bha Chapanga twe bhakapahile kughabhona ghala ghumujhokanikiya, bhakaghawene ndeka, na kughajhokanikiya ghala ghunyokonikihe, nambo bhakajhohine ndeka. Yecho ichimulila mana jha nnandanikiho gwa mmicha mbejho Maluku 4:13-20; Luka 8:11-15
13.18: “Bhahe, mangota nnyokanikiye na kukibhola kwa nnandanikiho ogho gwa mmicha mbejho.
13.19: Bhando bhubhajhokanikiya malobhe gha Unahota gwa Chapanga changamanya, ngita mbejho ikaponii mundela, Jwanganandela uhika na kutola chela chikimichitwe kumiojho gwabhe.
13.20: Mbejho hela iponi mukihekendo, nnandanikiho gwa mundo jwalijhoha lilobhe na kulipokela kwa kuhangana.
13.21: Nambo nhwalo akwete jhe mikegha lilobhe lijhingii jhe mumwojho na ulikamulila pandina tugha, patendelwa ghanganandela kwa kung'ahika kwa nhwalo gwa lilobhe lyenio, papa peniya ulileka kulihobholela.
13.22: Mbejho hela ikaponikiye pakate jha mikongo jha mibha, nnandanikiho gwa mundo jhulijhoha lilobhe lyenio, nambo kiholo cha ughome gwito na kupala kubhehe na ilebhe mbwee, ulipopoteka lilobhe lyenio, na mundo uhenga jhe ghaghapala Chapanga.
13.23: Mbejho hela iponi mu undope ghubholile nnandanikiho gwa mundo jhulijhoha lilobhe na kupambika uhohe, jhumo makome kome, jhonge makome chita na jhonge matato.” Nnandanikiho gwa manyahe gha kung'onda
13.24: Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhando nnandanikiho ghonge, “Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga ulandine na mundo jwamichite mbejho jha mbone mughonda gwake.
13.25: Nambo bhando bhakibha bhagholwike, makoko bhake bhajhakuhika, ajhakumicha mbejho ya manyahe ilandana ngita ngano pakate jha ngano, na kubhoka.
13.26: Bhahe, mbejho ikamelite na kutumbuu kubheka njechele, manyahe ghajhakutumbuu kubhonekana.
13.27: Akatumiche bha nkolo nghonda bhakannyendilile, bhajhakunnobholela, ‘Munahota, chi ukamichite mbejho yambone mung'onda gwino. Ngohe manyahe ghahumii kojhe?’
13.28: Jwenio akajhangwii, ‘Akamakoko atendite naha.’ Bhahe, akahenga mahengo bhajhakunkonya, ‘Bho, mipala tujhende tukatupule?’
13.29: Jwenio akajhangwii, ‘Nahijhe, pumutupula manyahe, mutupu na ngano.
13.30: Ghaleka ghakole pamonga ade muda gwa mahuno. Muda gwenio nanalobholela bhibhihuna. Tupula hote manyahe mughatabhe ibhogha ibhogha ya kujhochwa mwotu. Nambo nhunangane ngano mukabheke mukikoko.’ ” Nnandanikiho gwa mbejho jha aladale Maluku 4:30-32; Luka 13:18-19
13.31: Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhando nnandanikiho ghonge, “Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga ulandine na mbejho ya aladale yatoii mundo jhumo, akamichite kunghonda gwake.
13.32: Yene njokombe kuliku mbejho yoha, nambo anda imelite ubhehe mikolonga kuliku mbejho yoha, ukola na kubhehe nkongo, peniya ijhune ya kunane uhika na kuchenga mihuhe mu mandabhe ghake.” Nnandanikiho gwa ngedule Luka 13:20-21
13.33: Yecho akabhalobhalile nnandanikiho ghonge, “Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga ulandine na ngedule yakatoii majhe jhumo, akahangaline na ukobha mikambo mibhele na nucho, ukobha ghoha ujhakututa.” Kuhenga kwa milandanikiho Maluku 4:33-34
13.34: Yecho akabhalobhalii bhando gheniya ghoha kwa milandanikiho jhamahena. Akabhalobhalii ndeka chochoha changa longe kwa milandanikiho.
13.35: Akatei naha, lilobhe lilongilwa na nnondole litimile, “Nanongela nabho kwa milandanikiho, naninnobholela mambu kuhumii mukupanganwa kwa nnema.” Yecho ichimulila nnandanikiho gwa manyahe munng'onda
13.36: Yecho ajhakwatabhuka bhando bhala, akajhingii munyumba. Bhabholwa bhake bhakanyendelile, bhakannobhalile, “Mutulongelele nnandanikiho gwa manyahe gha munng'onda.”
13.37: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mmicha mbejho jha mbone ndi Mwana gwa Mundo.
13.38: Nghonda ghola ndi nnema. Mbejho yela yambone ndi bhando bhala Unahota ndi gwabhe. Nambo maghogho ghala ndi bhando bha Limbembela.
13.39: Likoko jwamichita manyahe ndi Limbembela. Mahuno ndi pala nnema puupala kupehekeya, bhibhahuna ndi akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga.
13.40: Ngita chibhajhola manyahe na kujhocha pamwotu, na ibhaha ndi pala puupala kuupehekeya nnema,
13.41: Mwana gwa Mundo nabhatuma akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga makaponge kuhumii mu Unahota gwake bhala bhoha bhibhatenda bhando bhahenge uhakaho, na bhoha bhibhahenga uhakaho,
13.42: kwataghila mu litanule lya mwotu lipela, na kwenio nakubhaha kulela na kuyagha mino.
13.43: Peniya bhando bha Chapanga nabhang'anyima ngita lyobha mu Unahota gwa Tate gwabhe. Jhuna machikilo na ajhohe! Nnandanikiho gwa ilebhe ichuluchwa kwa mbijha twe hihihitwe
13.44: “Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga ulandine na kihukilo cha ilebhe ichuluchwa kwa mbijha yamahele ihihitwe kunng'onda. Mundo jhumo akaiwene, ajhakuhiya kabhele. Akahangine hake ajhakujhenda kuchulucha yoha yakibha nako, akahemele nng'onda ghola. Nnandanikiho gwa lulo
13.45: “Peniya, Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga uwanine na jwachulucha ilebhe jwapalaha lulo jha mbone hake.
13.46: Peniya papatita lulo jhimo halanao hake, akajhahwii, akachulwiche yoha jwakibha nayo, ahemelele lulo jhene. Nnandanikiho gwa lwaho lwa homba
13.47: “Helahela, Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga ulandine na lwaho lutaghitwe mulilabha, na kujhonja homba kila namuna.
13.48: Lwaho lujhakutwelela, bhibhahutita lwaho kulilabha, bhakatamite, bhakahagwile homba yamaha bhakabhekite mu itandabhala yabhe, na yanganandela bhajhakutagha.
13.49: Ndi naibhaha pala pupala kupehekeya kwa nnema. Akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga nabhajhenda, nabhataghila paupile bhando bhaghanandela na kwabheka paupele bhando bhambone,
13.50: na kwataghila bheniya bhanganandela mu litanule lya mu mwotu lipela. Kwenio nabhalela na kuyagha mino.” Kilebhe kiyono na kilebhe cha makacho
13.51: Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Bho, umanyite mambu agha ghoha?” Bhakannyangwii, “Chakaka.”
13.52: Jwenio ajhakwalobholela, “Mmola jwa lilaghalikilo jwabhii mmolwa gwa Unahota gwa kunane kwa Chapanga, ihwanana na nkolo nyumba jwaibhoha mu kihukilo chake ilebhe iyono na ilebhe ya makacho.” Yecho ikanwa ku Nachalete Maluku 6:1-6; Luka 4:16-30
13.53: Yecho pajhomolila kulonge milandanikiho jhene ajhakubhoka peniya,
13.54: ajhakukelebhuka ku muche gwake. Kwenio akibha abholita bhando munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude. Bhando bhubhajhohina bhakakangiche na bhakalongii, “Bho, mundo jhonjo apatite kojhe malango ghanga na ikangacho yenio?
13.55: Bho, ojho chi mwana gwa mmacha mikongo? Bho, majhe mundo chi ikemwa Maliya, na akalongo mundo chi Yakobu na Uchupo na Simone na Yuda?
13.56: Akalombo mundo bho, chi bhoha bhabhii pamba pamonga na twenga? Bhahe, apatite kojhe agha ghoha?”
13.57: Bhahe, bhajhakunkanila. Nambo Yecho akalobholii, “Nnondole ajheketelwa koha, nambo ilendemwa ndeka ku kilambo chake, na ukajhake!”
13.58: Kwa nhwalo bhakibha jhe na kihobholelo, Yecho akatei jhe ikangacho twe peniya.

14.1: Machiko gheniya, Helode jwakibha kilongoche jwa ku Galilaya akajhohine malobhe gha Yecho.
14.2: Bhahe, ajhakwalobholela akatumiche bhake, “Mundo ojho ndi Yohane Mbatichajhe, ayokite kuhumii kubhawile, ndi mana likakala lya ikangacho lihenga lihengo nkate jhake.”
14.3: Helode ndi akibha ankamwii Yohane akankongite minyololo na kummeka mukipungo kwa nhwalo gwa Helodiya, unhwana gwa Filipu, nnongo mundo
14.4: Nhwalo gwa kukamulwa kwa Yohane Mbatichajhe akibha annobholile Helode, “Chi mbone kutama na mwikeghe jwenio!”
14.5: Helode akapahi kunkoma Yohane, nambo akajhogwipe bhando nhwalo bhakajheketile Yohane ndi nnondole gwa Chapanga.
14.6: Nambo mu machiko gha kubhelukwa Helode, nchikana jwa Helodiya ajhakukina palonge jha akaghene. Helode ajhakuhanganila hake.
14.7: Ade akalaghine kwa kulapanikiya kumpela nchikana chochoha chapala.
14.8: Na jwenio kwa kunyokanikiya majhe mundo, ajhakujhopa, “Mbela pambano pano muto gwa Yohane Mbatichajhe mukipalo.”
14.9: Munahota nkolongwa Helode ajhakubhehe ngolongondi hake, nambo nhwalo gwa kilapo chake palonge jha akaghene, akalongile nampela.
14.10: Bhahe, Helode akantumite mundo mukipungo kunheketa muto gwa Yohane.
14.11: Muto gwake ukaletitwe mukipalo, bhakampekihe nchikana jhola, na jwenio akampelikile majhe mundo.
14.12: Bhabholwa bha Yohane bhakahikite, bhajhakutola yegha jhake, bhakajhahwii bhajhakuchika umambe. Peniya bhakajhahwii kunnobholela Yecho. Yecho abhapela chakulya bhando elufo nhwano Maluku 6:30-44; Luka 9:10-17; Yohane 6:1-14
14.13: Yecho papatita lilobhe lyenio, ajhakubhoka peniya kwa ngalabha, ajhakujhenda panga bhando. Nambo bhando bhakapatite malobhe, bhajhakunkengama kwa magholo kuhumii mumiche yabhe.
14.14: Bhahe, Yecho pahulwika kumbwane, ajhakubhona lilongo likolongwa lya bhando, lijhakwabhone kiya, ajhakwalamicha bhibhalwalwa.
14.15: Pukihikita kimiye, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunnobholela Yecho, “Pambano tubhii panjenga, lichaa lya muhe lipetite. Bhahe, mwatabhuke bhando bhajhende muchenda bhakahemele yakulyegha.”
14.16: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Bho, nhwalo gwa nike bhajhende? Mwapele mangota yakulyegha.”
14.17: Nambo, bhene bhakannobhalile, “Tukwete mabumunda nhwano tugha na homba ibhena.”
14.19: Ajhakwalobholela bhando bhatame mu manyahe. Peniya Yecho akatoi mabumunda ghala nhwano na homba ibhele, ajhakulola kunane kwa Chapanga, ajhakunchenguu Chapanga. Peniya ajhakumetula na kwabhaghanichila mabumunda gheniya, akapekii bhabholwa bhake, na bhene bhakapekii bhando.
14.20: Bhando bhoha bhakalile, na kujhukuta. Peniya, bhabholwa bhajhakujhola mahighiliko, bhakatwelii ichukilo kome na ibhele.
14.21: Bhando bhubhakalile bhakibha akanalome elufo nhwano changabhalangila akakeghe na yana. Yecho ityanga panane ya mache Maluku 6:45-52; Yohane 6:15-21
14.22: Peniya, ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake bhajhingile mungalabha, bhalongolele kwiye jha lilabha, jwenio akibha atabhuka ibhogha ya bhando.
14.23: Pajhomolila kwatabhuka bhando, ajhakuhobhoka ku kitombe kanjika chake kunnyopa Chapanga. Pukihikita kimiye, jwenio akibha kwenio kanjika chake,
14.24: peniya ngalabha jhela ikibha pakate jha lilabha na upepo nkolongwa uteila kuinyuanyua.
14.25: Pukubhandikila kuchegha, Yecho ajhakujhenda kwa bhabholwa bhake kongo ityanga panane jha mache.
14.26: Bhabholwa bhake pibhanolikiya panane jha mache bhajhakujhoghopa hake, bhalongila “Ndi lihoka!” Bhajhakuchobhela kwa bhoghohe.
14.27: Peniya, Yecho akalongi nabho, “Tama nuu, ndi nenga. Nkotoka kujhoghopa!”
14.28: Petile ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, chakaka anda mwenga, dongela ndyange panane jha mache hike kwino.”
14.29: Yecho akalongii, “Chakaka, uhike.” Bhahe, Petile akahulwike kuhumii mungalabha, akatyangite panane jha mache, kunkengama Yecho.
14.30: Nambo pabhonita kimbonga chela, akajhogwipe, ajhakutumbula kumilwa, ajhakunonoha lilobhe, “Bhambo, ung'ombole!”
14.31: Peniya, Yecho akahatambwile lubhoko lwake na kunkamuu na kunnobholela, “Mwenga mmii na kihobholelo chandina! Nhwalo ghane mmii na kiholo?”
14.32: Peniya bhajhakuhobhokela mungalabha, na pajhakubhehe njelembo.
14.33: Bhoha bhubhakibha nkate jha ngalabha bhakannyinamile, bhalongila, “Chakaka mwenga ndi ma mwana bha Chapanga.” Yecho ilamicha bhibhalwalwa ku Genechalete Maluku 6:53-56
14.34: Bhajhakujhomboka lilabha, bhajhakuhika ku kilambo cha ku Genechalete.
14.35: Bhando bha kwenio pibhakammanye, bhakapechengine malobhe imbokotole yoha muchenda jhene. Bhahe, bhakannetile Yecho bhibhalwalwa bhoha,
14.36: bhajhakumpembelekeya abhalekekehe bhibhalwalwa kwa kwapapaha tugha lilombolo lya ngobho jhake. Bhoha bhibhakampapiye bhakalamite.

15.1: Peniya Mapwalichayo na bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo kubhoke ku Yeluchalemo bhajhakunnyendelela Yecho na kunkonya,
15.2: “Bho, nhwalo gwa nike bhabholwa bhino bhaghakengama ndeka malaghalikilo ghutupokii kuhumii kwa akahoko bhito? Bhakuha jhe mabhoko chipalwa kabula jha kulyegha!”
15.3: Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Bho, mangota nhwalo gwa nike mughajhokanikiya jhe malaghalikilo gha Chapanga na mikengama mabholo ghino mabhene?
15.4: Chapanga akalongii, ‘Majhokanikiye tate gwino na majhe gwino,’ na ‘Na jwanigha tate mundo amu majhe mundo, nabhankoma.’
15.5: Nambo mangota mibhola, anda mundo akwete kilebhe chikihoto kuntangatila tate mundo amu majhe mundo, nambo alongela, ‘Kilebhe chenje nikipiya kwa Chapanga,’
15.6: bhahe, ndi ipalwa ndeka kabhele kuntangatila tate mundo kwa kilebhe chenie. Naha ndi chimulipucha lilobhe lya Chapanga kwa kukengama mabholo ghino mabhene.
15.7: Mangota mukitenda bhando bhaumbone! Ghalongila Isaya akalondwi mangota ngita chajhandike, ‘Bhando bhamba bhajhekete kwa milomo jhabhe tu, nambo miojho jhabhe ibhii kutale na nenga!’
15.8: Isaya akalondwi mangota ngita chajhandike, ‘Bhando bhamba bhajhekete kwa milomo jhabhe tu, nambo miojho jhabhe ibhii kutale na nenga.
15.9: Kunyinamila kwabhe ndi kwa jhajhe, nhwalo bhabhola mabholo gha bhando ngita ndi malaghalikilo ghango!’ ” Ilebhe intenda mundo akanwe palonge jha Chapanga Maluku 7:14-23
15.10: Bhahe, Yecho akalikemite kabhele lilongo lya bhando ajhakwalobholela, “Unyokanikiye na umanye kwa malobhe ghunipala kunnobholela!
15.11: Kilebhe chikinyingii munnomo mundo kihoto jhe kuntenda mundo akoto kujheketelwa palonge jha Chapanga. Nambo chela chikimpita pannomo gwake ndi chikintenda akoto kujheketelwa palonge jha Chapanga.”
15.12: Peniya bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunyendelela Yecho na kunkonya, “Bho, umanyite Mapwalichayo bhahyomita kwa nhwalo gwa malobhe ghenagha?”
15.13: Nambo Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Kila changamichwa na Tate gwango jwa kunane kwa Chapanga, nakitupulilwa.”
15.14: “Mwaleke! Bhene bhangalola na ilongoche yangalola. Na jwangalola antandaha jwangalola nnyake, bhoha nabhatumbukila mulibhomba.”
15.15: Peniya Petile ajhakulonge, “Mutulobholele mana jha nnandanikiho ghongo.”
15.16: Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Bho, na mangota helahela mwamela umanyingine ndeka ghangano?
15.17: Umanyingine ndeka kubhehe kilebhe chalyegha mundo kupete pannomo ujhenda kulutumbo na kujhenda ku cholo?
15.18: Nambo mambu ghighapita munomo ghahuma kumwojho, na yenio ndi ghintenda mundo akoto kujheketelwa palonge jha Chapanga.
15.19: Nhwalo nkate jha mwojho gwa mundo upita mawacho mabhoho gha kukoma na ngongola malobhe gha kupala kutenda ngongola na mwihe na kulonge uwange na maligho.
15.20: Ilebhe yenio ndi intenda mundo akoto kujheketelwa palonge jha Chapanga. Nambo kulyegha changakuha mache mu mabhoko kuhoto jhe kuntenda mundo akanwe palonge jha Chapanga.” Kihobholelo cha majhe jhumo Maluku 7:24-30
15.21: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakubhoka peniya na kujhenda ku kilambo chuku Tilo na ku Sidone kutama.
15.22: Peniya majhe jhumo Nkanane jwa ku kilambo chenie ajhakunnyendelela Yecho kongo nganonwiya lilobhe, “Bhambo, Mwana gwa Daude ungolele kiya, nchikana gwango ang'ahika na nchuka!”
15.23: Nambo Yecho akajhangwi jhe lilobhe. Bhahe, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunyendelela Yecho na kunnobholela, “Munnobholele abhoke nhwalo atenda kutukengamila kengamila kongo atenda kuchobhela.”
15.24: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ndumitwe tugha kwa bhando bha kilambo chuku Ichilahele, bhubhabhii ngita mambelele ghighahobhalile.”
15.25: Nambo majhe jhola ajhakutama makilikite palonge jhake Yecho na kunnobholela, “Bhambo, undangatile!”
15.26: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Yamaha ndeka kutola chakulya chibhalye yana na kukitaghii ghimbwa.”
15.27: Majhe jhola ajhakulonge, “Chakaka Bhambo, gheniya ghumulongela gha chakaka. Nambo ghimbwa ilyegha imbolopolo igwegha kuhe pa mecha ya nkolo gwabhe.”
15.28: Peniya Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Mwe majhe, kihobholelo chino kikolonga. Itendeka kwino ngita chinyopite.” Nchikana jwake ajhakubhehe njelembo chaa jhejhe. Yecho ilamicha bhando bhamahele
15.29: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakubhoka peniya na kujhenda mupele jha lilabha lya ku Galilaya, na kukwela pakitombe na kutama pahe.
15.30: Peniya lilongo lya bhando lijhakunyendelela, bhakampelikile bhando bhangalongela na bhibhalemile na bhangalola na bhilemi yegha na bhando twe bhubhabhii na ulwalo. Bhajhakumekela palonge jha magholo ghake, na jwenio Yecho ajhakwalamicha.
15.31: Bhahe, lilongo lela lya bhando lijhakukangacha pubhalolita mundo jwangalongela atenda kulonge na bhubhalemile bhabhe njelembo na bhangalola na bhene bhalola. Na bhene bhajhakunnomba Chapanga jwa bha Ichilahele. Yecho abhalicha bhando bhange elufo ncheche Maluku 8:1-10
15.32: Peniya Yecho ajhakwakema bhabholwa bhake na ajhakwalobholela, “Nakole kiya bhando bheniya, hena, bhatamite na nenga kwa machiko matato changalyegha. Nipala jhe bhabhoke changalyegha, bhihoto kuhindukii undela kujhenda ukajhabhe.”
15.33: Bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunkonya, “Tubhii palundwanga pamba, bho, ghane natupela chakulyegha cha kukwela lilongo lene?”
15.34: Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Bho, nkwete mabumunda malenga?” Bhene bhajhakujhanguu. “Ghabhii mabumunda chaba na homba yandina njokonjoko.”
15.35: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwalobholela, mwatamike bhando pahe.
15.36: Peniya Yecho ajhakutola mabumunda ghala na homba njokonjoko hela, ajhakunchenguu Chapanga, ajhakumetula na kwapekeya bhabholwa bhake bhaghabhanichile bhando bhala.
15.37: Bhoha bhakalile na kujhukuta. Peniya, bhabholwa bhajhakujhola mahighiliko, bhajhakutweleya ichukilo chaba.
15.38: Bheniya bhubhalila bhakibha akanalome elufo ncheche, changabhalangila akakeghe na yana.
15.39: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwatabhuka bhando na ajhakujhingii mungalabha kujhenda ku kilambo chuku Magidane.

16.1: Bhahe, Mapwalichayo na Machadukayo bhajhakunyendelela Yecho, kwa bhajhakunnyigha bhapata nginyililo kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga.
16.2: Nambo Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Pulitipika lyobha mangota mulonge, ‘Deleno nakubhaha kwa mbone nhwalo mahunde ndi makele.’
16.3: Lukela mulonge, ‘Nahikoma hula nhwalo kumahunde kubhii pyuu na kabhele mahunde ghabhii tyoo!’ Bhahe, mangota umanyite hake kulolekeya chula jha kunane na kumanya ghighapala kupitila. Nambo umanyite jhe ikangacho ya machiko ghanga.
16.4: Bhando bha kibheluko changanandela na changaumanya Chapanga, kipala kulola nginyililo? Nambo nakilangiwa ndeka nginyililo! Nga jhela jha nnondole jwa Chapanga Yona.” Bhahe, bhajhakunneka akijhendele. Ngedule jha Mapwalichayo na Machadukayo Maluku 8:14-21
16.5: Peniya bhabholwa bhake pajhombwika kwiye jha lilabha, bhajhakujhehwa kughegha mabumunda.
16.6: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mukilolekehe na ngedule ya Mapwalichayo na Machadukayo!”
16.7: Bhabholwa bhake bhajhakutumbula kukonyana bhene chika, “Alongila naha nhwalo tujhewite kughegha mabumunda.”
16.8: Bhahe, Yecho akamanyite chibhaholela, ajhakwalobholela, “Mangota bhumii na kihobholelo chandina, nhwalo ghane bhikonyana pakate jhino nhwalo gwa kupelulwa mabumunda?
16.9: Bho, mwamela munabangatuka ndeka? Bho, nnyehwite pimaghanicha mabumunda nhwano ghala na kwalicha bhando elufo nhwano? Bho, mahighililo ghake ghakatwelile ichukilo ilenga?
16.10: Amu mabumunda chaba ghala ghikabhaghulilwe bhando elufo ncheche, bho, mukatweli ichukilo ilegha ya mahighiliko?
16.11: Bho, nhwalo ghane mibangatuka ndeka, ninongelela jhe mangota malobhe gha mabumunda, nambo ninnobholela mukilolekeye na ngedule ya Mapwalichayo na Machadukayo!”
16.12: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhala bhajhakubangatuka abhalobholila bhakilolekehe chi na ngedule jha mabumunda, nambo mabholo gha Mapwalichayo na Machadukayo. Yecho ndi Mwana gwa Chapanga Maluku 8:27-30; Luka 9:18-21
16.13: Yecho pahikita ku muche gwa ku Kaisaliya jha ku Filipu, ajhakwakonya bhabholwa bhake, “Bho, bhando bhinkema bhole Mwana gwa Mundo?”
