20.15: Bhahe, bhajhakunhutila panja jha mighonda jha michabibo, bhajhakunkoma.” Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwakonya bho, nkolo ng'onda nabhatenda nike bhubhajhahike mighonda bhala?
20.16: “Nahika na kwakoma bhubhalema bhala, na kwapekeya bhange ng'onda gwenio.” Na bhando pubhajhohina ghenagha, bhajhakulonge, “Naha ndeka, gheniya ghakotoka kupitila!”
20.17: Nambo Yecho ajhakwalolekeya na kwakonya, “Bho, Majhandiko ghanga gha Chapanga mana jhake nike? ‘Lighanga lilikanwitwe na bhibhachenga, ngoheno ndi lighanga likolongwa lya nchinge!’
20.18: Mundo jhojhoha anda agwelile panane jha lighanga lyenio naheketwa imbembela imbembela, na lighanga lyenio anda ligwelikile mundo jhojhoha naliyogha yoghoyogho.” Lilaghalikilo lya kupiya kode kwa Kaichale Matei 22:15-22; Maluku 12:13-17
20.19: Bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo na Akapiya matambiko bhakolo, bhapata bhankamulikii papa, nhwalo bhakamanye apiita nnandanikiho gwenio gwakochita kumwojho. Nambo bhajhogwipa bhando.
20.20: Bhahe, bhajhakupalaha lichaa lya mbone. Bhajhakwatuma bhando bhakitende bhaumbone kwa chwinda, bhanyonje Yecho kwa machwale, na bhahoto kunkamula na bhapeleke kwa munahota nkolongwa jwa ku Loma.
20.21: Bhando bhala bhajhakunkonya Yecho, “Mmola, tumanyite chimulongela na mibhola ilebhe ya uchakaka, hilu miningukiya ndeka mundo pamiho, nambo mibhola kwa uchakaka ndela jha Chapanga.
20.22: Bhahe, tunkonye, bhole yamaha amu yamaha ndeka kulepa kode kwa munahota nkolongwa jwa ku Loma liina lyake Kaichale?”
20.23: Nambo Yecho akamanye nginyika yabhe, ajhakwalobholela,
20.24: “Unangiye chente jha mbijha. Bho, chula jhenje na liina limulihwene lya ghane?” Ngabhanyangwila, “Ndi Kaichaile nkolongwa jwa ku Loma.”
20.25: Peniya Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Chikibhii cha nkolongwa jwa ku Loma munekele jwenio nkolongwa jwa ku Loma, na chikibhii cha Chapanga munekele jwenio Chapanga.”
20.26: Bhakannyonjite ndeka kwa lilobhe lyolyoha kuhumii palonge jha bhando. Na bhajhakukangachwa nako majhangulo ghake. Libholo lya kuyoka Matei 22:23-33; Maluku 12:18-27
20.27: Machadukayo bhange, bhilongela bhubhawile nabhayoka ndeka, bhajhakunnyendelela Yecho na kunkonya,
20.28: “Mmola, Mucha akatujhandikile, ‘Anda nnongo jwa mundo awile na annekite nhwana mundo changa mwana, ipalwa nnongo mundo amujhila nawela jwenio, apapila yana nnongo mundo.’
20.29: Bhakibha akalongo mundo chaba. Jhola jwakutumbula ajhakubhujhila lipwela lela na paligha kuwegha changaleka mwana.
20.30: Jhubhele kubhelukwa, na jwenio ajhakumujhila lipwela lela, ajhakuwegha changa mwana hele,
20.31: Peniya jwa utato jhola ajhakumujhila lipwela lela, helahela akampapii jhe mwana, bhoha chaba bhakawile, changapapa yana.
20.32: Kukutila kwake, mwikeghe jhola na jwenio helahela ajhakujhomoka.
20.33: Ngohe bhole, machiko gha kuyokechwa pughapala kuhika, mwikeghe jwenio nabhaha nhwana gwa ghane? Nhwalo bhoha chaba bhakantolile.”
20.34: Yecho ngabhajhangwila, “Bhando bha nnema ghongo bhitolela na kutolelwa.
20.35: Nambo kwa bhala Chapanga abhabhone bhihoto kujhingii munnema ghuhika na muyokecho nabhatolela jhe amu kutolelwa.
20.36: Chakaka, nabhawe ndeka kabhele, nhwalo nabhalandana na akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga, bheniya ndi yana ya Chapanga, nhwalo bhayokichwe kuhumii kubhawile.
20.37: Nambo kulonge kuyoka kwa bhando bhubhawile na bhene nabhayokichwa, Mucha akatulongalile mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga. Pa kiheghejha chikijhakita mwotu, ajhakulonge Bhambo Chapanga ngita, Chapanga jwa Ulahimo na Chapanga jwa Isaka na Chapanga jwa Yakobu.
20.38: Bhahe, jwenio Chapanga jwa bhando bhubhawile ndeka, nambo jwenio ndi Chapanga jwa bhando bhibhabhii na ughome nhwalo bhilama na jwenio.”
20.39: Bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo bhange bhajhakulonge, “Mmola, nnongii hotuhotu hake!”
20.40: Na bhene bhakajhighite jhe kunkonya machwale ghange. Kilichitu mwana jwa ghane? Matei 22:41-46; Maluku 12:35-37
20.41: Peniya Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Bhando bhilonge bhole, Kilichitu ndi mwana gwa Daude?”
20.42: “Nhwalo Daude jwenio alongii mbone mukitabo chake cha Zabule, ‘Bhambo akannobholile Bhambo gwango, Ntame mu lubhoko lwango lwalelo,
20.43: ade nabheke makoko bhino pahe jha makongono ghino ngita kigoda cha kujheghemekeya makongono.’
20.44: Anda Daude ankema jwenio, ‘Bhambo,’ ngohe nahibhaha bhole Kilichitu kubhehe Mwana mundo?” Yecho na bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo Matei 23:1-36; Maluku 12:38-40
20.45: Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, palonge jha bhando bhoha,
20.46: “Mukichunge na bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo, upala kupetapeta kongo bhakiwalile makanjo matandamaho na kujhambuchwa kwa kutembekewa mumaghuliho, na kutama migoda ya utembekeho munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude, helahela bhipala kutama migoda ya utembekeho ya muunyagho gwa kulyegha.
20.47: Na kwajhibhila akakeghe akanawela, na kukikopokeya kwa kukitenda bhaumbone, kongo bhakilangiya kwa bhando kunnyopa Chapanga kwa malobhe gha mahena. Bheniya nabhahadabulwa kupeta bhange!”

21.1: Yecho palolokiya kulingukiya ajhakwammona mundo jwabhii na ilebhe yamahele palekila mbijha mukichukilo chu kubheke litambiko pa Nyumba jha Chapanga.
21.2: Helahela ajhakummona majhe jhumo nawela, nhocho ajhakupiya chente ibhele ya mbijha.
21.3: Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Ninnobholela chakaka, nawela jwenio, apihite kuliku bhange.
21.4: Nhwalo bhoha bhapihite kubhoka mu majhonjekeko ghabhe, nambo majhe hojho nhocho akung'winde yoha yabhii nako.” Yecho ilonge chipalwa kutilulwanwa kwa Nyumba jha Chapanga Matei 24:1-2; Maluku 13:1-2
21.5: Bhabholwa bhange bhalongila panane jha Nyumba jha Chapanga, chichengwite kwa maghanga ghambone, helahela bhalongila matambiko ghighapihitwa na bhando kwa Chapanga. Nambo Yecho ajhakulonge,
21.6: “Ghanga ghoha ghubhaghabhona, machiko ghabhikuhika, libhiijhe hilu lighanga lilipala kuhighalika panane jha lenge, kila kilebhe nakiyangabhanwa.” Malagho na lung'ahe Matei 24:3-14; Maluku 13:3-13
21.7: Bhahe, bhando bhajhakunkonya Yecho, “Mmola, naghapitila legha mambu ghanga? Bho, na nginyililo ghane jhipala kulangiya kuhika kwino?”
21.8: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Mukilolekeye bhakotoka kunkopokeya. Nhwalo bhamahele nabhahika kwa liina lyango, nabhalongela, ‘Jwenio ndi nenga!’ Na ‘Machiko ghala ghabhandikile!’ Nambo mwangakengama.
21.9: Bhahe, pumipala kujhoha malobhe gha ngondo na lihangambwela, mangajhoghopa, nhwalo ilebhe yenio naitumbula kupitila, Nambo kujhomokela kwake kwamela.”
21.10: Peniya Yecho pajhendilila kulonge, “Kilambo chimo na akakomana na bhando bha kilambo chenge, na unahota nkolongwa ghumo naukomana na unahota ghonge.
21.11: Napapitila mindimilo mikolongwa pannema na njala na malwalo. Naghapitila mambu gha kujhoghopwa na nginyililo ngolongwa kunane kwa Chapanga.
21.12: Nambo naghalapiti hote jhe gheniya, nabhankamula na kuung'aha na kupelekangana mu Nyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude na kutabhangana mukipungo, nabhampeleka palonge jha akanahota na ilongoche, kwa nhwalo gwa liina lyango.
21.13: Jhenje ndi pwache jha kwalangiya Lilobhe lya Mbone bheniya.
21.14: Nambo nkotoka kubhehe na kiholo ku mwojho nanongela nike kabula jha kukikengelela.
21.15: Nhwalo namwete naninpela malobhe gha kulonge na malango. Hilu makoko bhino nabhahotola ndeka kukwima na kukana ghala ghumulongela.
21.16: Mangota nanyambilwa na akatate bhino na akalongo bhino na akakoche bhino, na bhange pakate jhino nabhakomwa.
21.17: Bhando bhoha nabhanchimwa mangota nhwalo gwa liina lyango.
21.18: Nambo, hilu lijhunjo limo lya pamuto gwino nalihobhelela ndeka.
21.19: Kwa kuhimbilila kwino namukombola ughome gwino. Yecho alonge kutilulwana kwa Yeluchalemo Matei 24:15-21; Maluku 13:14-19
21.20: “Pumpala kwabhona akakomana ngondo bhautindile muche gwa ku Yeluchalemo, umanya kubhehe machiko ghabhandikile gha kutilulwana kwake.
21.21: Peniya bhando bhubhabhii ku Yudeya bhabhutikila ku kitombe na bhando bhibhabhii pakate jha muche bhatilila panja jha muche na bhando bhibhabhii kunghonda bhakotoka kujhingila ku bomane.
21.22: Nhwalo machiko gheniya ndi machiko gha kuhadabulwa, ghoha ghighajhandikwe mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghalenganike.
21.23: Nakole kiya bhubhii na ndumbo na bhibhajhongecha kwa machiko gheniya! Nhwalo napabhehe na mang'ahiko makolongwa na lilaka lya Chapanga nabhahadabula bhando bheniya.
21.24: Bhange nabhakomwa kwa upanga na bhange nabhapukilwa ngita akapungwa na kupechenganwa mu ilambo yoha. Helahela bhando bhangabhehe bhu ku Yeluchalemo nabhalebheta ade lichiko lyabhe pulipala kuhika. Kuhika kwa Mwana gwa Mundo Matei 24:29-31; Maluku 13:24-27
21.25: “Peniya napabhaha nginyililo mu lyobha na mu mwehe na mu ndondwa. Bhando bha pannema nabhabha na malagho kwa nhwalo gwa bhoghohe ghuletwa kuhumii mu milindimilo jha mbwane na matuhe ghake gha mache.
21.26: Bhando nabhahinduka kwa bhoghohe, bhakilola nike chikipala kuukolela nnema, nhwalo ilebhe yoha ya kunane kwa Chapanga nainyukanyuka kwa makakala.
21.27: Peniya ndi, nabhamona Mwana gwa Mundo akahuluka mumahunde, na makakala na ulumbililo nkolongwa.
21.28: Puhipala kutumbula kupitila ilebhe yenio, nnyemengane na kujhinula mabhonge ghino kunane, nhwalo ughombokeko gwino ubhandikile.” Mabholo gha nkongo gwa ntine Matei 24:32-35; Maluku 13:28-31
21.29: Peniya Yecho ajhakwalobholela nnandanikiho ghongo, “Mulolekehe nkongo gwa nkojho na mikongo jhenge jhoha.
21.30: Putumbula kutundula mahamba, mabhene umanye mahuno ghabhandikile.
21.31: Helahela mangota pumipala kubhona ilebhe yenio ikahengeka umanya kubhehe ndi unahota nkolongwa ubhandikile.
21.32: “Ninnobholela chakaka, bhando bha kibheluko chenje nabhawe ndeka ade ilebhe yenio ipitile.
21.33: Kunane kwa Chapanga na nnema nakupeta, nambo malobhe ghango naghapeta ng'o. Nkeluwe
21.34: “Mme miho! Miojho jhino jhikotoka kukamulwa na kuhapa, kulobhela na kupikiya miho ilebhe ya mukilambo mone. Na lichiko nalihikilila kwa kupwitikilila pwitu ngita ntambo pugwijhonja.
21.35: Nhwalo nalyapwitikilila ngita ntambo bhando bhoha bhibhatama kila chehemo jha nnema.
21.36: Mukilolekeye na nnyope machiko ghoha na kubhehe likakala lya kujhomboka njelembo kwa mambu gheniya ghoha ghighapala kupitila, na kujhema palonge jha Mwana gwa Mundo.”
21.37: Machiko ghoha Yecho akibha mukubhola bhando pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, na kilo ajhahwila ku kitombe chuku Micheitune na kutama kwenio.
21.38: Bhando bhoha bhatehila kulabha kujhenda pa Nyumba jha Chapanga kunnyokanikiya Yecho.

22.1: Unyagho gwa mabumunda ghangaleke ngedule, jhikemitwa Pachaka piheghelila.
22.2: Akapiya matambiko bhakolo na bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo bhapaliya ndela jha kinyemela jha kunkoma Yecho, nambo bhajhogwipa bhando. Yuda ijheketela kunnyambila Yecho Matei 26:14-16; Maluku 14:10-11
22.3: Bhahe, Limbembela lijhakunyingilila Yuda, jwakemitwa Isikaliyote, ndi jhumo jwa bhabholwa bhake bhala kome na bhabhele.
22.4: Yuda ajhakujhenda kwa akapiya matambiko bhakolo na akalonda Nyumba jha Chapanga, ajhakulonge nabho ndela jha kunnyambii Yecho.
22.5: Bhene bhajhakuhanganila hake na kulaghalana na Yuda nabhampela mbijha kwa lihengo lyenio.
22.6: Yuda ajhakujheketila, peniya ndi patumbwila kupalaha ndela jhamaha jha kunnyambila Yecho, lilongo lya bhando changamanya. Yecho ilenganikiya chakulya cha unyagho gwa Pachaka Matei 26:17-25; Maluku 14:12-21; Yohane 13:21-30
22.7: Bhahe, lichiko lya mabumunda ghangalekela ngedule pulihikita. Lichiko lyenio ndi lichiko lya kuchinja katole kalimbelele kakulye pa Unyagho gwa Pachaka.
22.8: Peniya Yecho ajhakwatuma Petile na Yohane, ajhakwalobholela, “Nnyendengane mukatulinganikiye chakulye Pachaka.”
22.9: Bhahe, na bhene pubhankonyita, “Mipala tujhende kojhe tukalenganikiye?”
22.10: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Unyokanikiye, pumujhingila pabomane nankongana na likambako jwatwekile kihulo cha mache. Jwenio ndi mukengemila ade munyumba jhajhingila.
22.11: Nkolo nyumba munnobholela, ‘Mmola ankonya, chumbi cha akaghene kibhii kojhe, chakulyegha Pachaka pamonga na bhabholwa bhango?’
22.12: Jwenio nanangiya chumbi kikolongwa cha ku gholofa chikikilimwe mbone, nnenganikila mwenio.”
22.13: Bhahe, bhajhakujhenda, na kukikolela kila kilebhe telatela ngita chabhalaghalikiye Yecho, na bhene ndi pibhatumbwila kulenganikiya chakulye Pachaka. Chakulya cha Bhambo Matei 26:26-30; Maluku 14:22-26; 1Akakolintu 11:23-25
22.14: Lichaa lya kulyegha puliikita, Yecho ajhakwatola akatenga bhake na kutama nako kulyegha.
22.15: Ajhakwalobholela bheniya, “Noghii hake kulye Pachaka pamonga na mangota, kabula jha mang'ahiko ghango.
22.16: Ninnobholela chakaka, nilye ndeka kabhele ade puipala kulenganikiya mu Unahota nkolongwa gwa Chapanga.”
22.17: Yecho ajhakutola kibaba cha divaye, na kunchenguu Chapanga, alongila, “Mmaghana mabhoha.
22.18: Ninobholela, kutumbulii ngohe, nanywe jhe kabhele divaye jhenje, ade Unahota nkolongwa gwa Chapanga pala puupala kuhika.”
22.19: Bhahe, ajhakutola libumunda, ajhakunchenguu Chapanga, ajhakumetula na kwabhaghanichila, alongila, “Jhenjeno ndi yegha jhipelwa mangota. Ntenda naha kwa kungomboka nenga.”
22.20: Helahela akatei ndalilo, “Ajhakwapekeha kibaba cha divaye alongela, chenjeno ndi kibaba cha lilaghano liyono lya Chapanga lilijhemelelwa na miyahe jhango, jhijhitika kwa nhwalo gwino mangota.
22.21: “Nambo, umanye! Mundo jwambala kunyambila nenga minako pakiheneko pano!
22.22: Chakaka Mwana gwa Mundo nahwa ngita chilengankilwe, nambo nalola choto mundo jhola jwapala kunnyambila!”
22.23: Bhajhakutumbula kukonyana achi bhene chika, ndi ghane pakate jhito jwahipala kuhenga kilebhe chenie. Mitaongano ghane nkolongwa
22.24: Helahela bhabholwa bhake Yecho bhajhakutumbula mitabho pakate jhabhe ghane jwaholelelwa kubhehe nkolongwa kuliku bhange.
22.25: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Akanahota akakolonga bha bhando bha ilambo henge ubhalongocha bhando kwa makakala, na bhala bhina ukolonga ukitina liina lya ‘Akakoche bha bhando.’
22.26: Nambo mangota ghakotoka kulandana na bheniya. Nambo jwabhii nkolongwa pakate jhino abhaha jwandina kuliku bhoha, na kilongoche abhaha mundo jwabhahengela bhoha.
22.27: Bho, ndi ghane jwabhii nkolongwa? Bho, jwaitama pakulyegha amu jwalenganikiya chakulyegha? Chakaka jhola jwaitama pakulyegha. Nambo nenga mii pakate jhino ngita natumiche.”
22.28: “Mangota ndi bhuhighalike pamonga na nenga mumang'ahiko ghango.”
22.29: Ngita Tate, chahagwii nenga kulongocha ngita munahota nkolongwa, na nenga nipelingine mangota hele unahota nkolongwa.
22.30: Peniya, nanyakila na kunomenekeya pamonga munahota nkolongwa gwango na kutama muigoda ya unahota nkolongwa na kulongocha makabila kome na mabhele gha Ichilahele. Yecho ilotela Petile natenda kukana Matei 26:31-35; Maluku 14:27-31; Yohane 13:36-38
22.31: Yecho palongila, “Ma Simone, Ma Simone! Jhokanikiya! Limbembela apala kunyembeluya ngita mponga.
22.32: Nambo nenga ninyope mwenga Simone, hilu kihobholelo chino kikotoka kuhokeka. Na mwenga pumpala kumujhila kabhele matangatila akalongo bhino.”
22.33: Petile ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, nanjino nyeketile kupungwa na mwenga amu bhatukoma tugha pamonga kilebhe jhe!”
22.34: Yecho ngalongila, “Ninnobholela ma Petile, lijhogholo nakubhekajhe naunganila patato.” Mukilenganikiye na machiko gha mang'ahiko
22.35: Peniya Yecho ajhakwakonya bhabholwa bhake, “Bho, punitumingina changaghegha mbijha amu lihako amu changahwala maghubache nike mukapongokiwe?” Bhajhakujhanguu, “Tukapongokiwe ndeka kilebhe.”
22.36: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Nambo kutumbuli ngoheno, mundo jwabhii na mbijha aghegha, na jwabhii na lihako helahela aghegha. Na jhola jwanga mbopo akachuluche ngobho yake na ajhende akahemela mbopo jhimo.
22.37: Nhwalo ghabhii lengalenga mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghilonge, ‘Na jwenio nabhalangilwa pamonga na bhando bhibhatenda ghanganandela.’ Ninnobholela ghoha ghughajhandikwe kwa nhwalo gwa nenga ghapile ghapitile.”
22.38: Bhabholwa bhake ngabhanongolila, “Bhambo, dola pambano ibhii mbopo ibhele.” Jwenio Yecho ngajhangwila, “Bhahe, ikwela!” Yecho inyopa Chapanga ku Kitombe chuku Micheitune Matei 26:36-46; Maluku 14:32-42
22.39: Yecho ajhakubhoka ngita chakayobhalile, na kujhenda ku kitombe chuku Micheitune na bhabholwa bhake bhajhakubhehe pamonga.
22.40: Pubhahikita kwenio, ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Munyopengane Chapanga, nkotoka kujhingii mumajhighanikilo.”
22.41: Peniya ajhakwaleka, na kujhenda kutale ngita mundo ajhuhite lighanga kuliponile. Na kutama makilikite anyopa Chapanga,
22.42: alongila, “Ma Tate, anda mipala umokehe kibaba chenjeno cha malagho. Nambo chi ngita chinipala nenga, nambo ngita chimipala mabhene.”
22.43: Bhahe, ntumiche jwa kunane kwa Chapanga, ajhakupitila na kukangamalicha.
22.44: Yecho nhwalo akibha mulipyanda, ajhakunyopa hake Chapanga. Lihuke lyake likibha ngita mandonye gha miyahe ghahololila pahe.
22.45: Pajhomolila kunnyopa Chapanga, ajhakwajhendela bhabholwa bhake. Ajhakwakolela bhagholwike, nhwalo gwa ungolongonde.
22.46: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Nhwalo gwa nike migholoka? Jhimukana munyopengane Chapanga, nkotoka kujhingii mumajhighanikilo.” Yecho ikamulwa Matei 26:47-56; Maluku 14:43-50; Yohane 18:3-11
22.47: Pajhendilila kulonge, lilongo lya bhando lijhakupitila kongo lilongochwa na Yuda, jwakibha jhumo jwa bhabholwa bhake bhala kome na bhabhele. Ajhakuheghelela Yecho na kunkumbatila.
22.48: Nambo Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Yuda, nhwalo gwa nike munyambi Mwana gwa Mundo kwa kunkumbatila?”
22.49: Bhabholwa bhake bhala bhalolikiya ghughapala kupitila bhajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, bho, twapyeke kwa mbopo?”
22.50: Jhumo pakate jhabhe ajhakuntyala ntumiche jwa Mpiya litambiko nkolo, na kuheketa lichikilo lyake lya lubhoko lwalelo.
22.51: Nambo Yecho palongila, “Nkoto kuhenga kabhele!” Ajhakupapaa lichikilo lya mundo jhola, ajhakulama.
22.52: Peniya Yecho ajhakwalobholela Akapiya matambiko bhakolo na ilongoche ya ulonda gwa Nyumba jha Chapanga na ighogholo bhubhakahikite kunkamula, “Bho, uhikingine na indukwa na mbopo, pimihambuka nenga nipoka ilebhe kwa makakala?
22.53: Machiko ghoha ndamita na mangota mwenga pa Nyumba jha Chapanga mukangamwi ndeka. Nambo lende ndi lichaa lya makakala gha lubhendo, kulongocha.” Petile ikanii Yecho Matei 26:57-58; Maluku 14:53,54,66-72; Yohane 18:12-18,25-27
22.54: Peniya bhajhakunkamula Yecho na kujhenda nako ade ku nyumba jha Mpiya litambiko nkolo. Petile akengemila kachoko chukutale.
22.55: Pakate jha mulwane lwa nyumba bhakakungine mwotu, na bhoha bhajhakutamangana peniya kujhota, na jwenio Petile akibha pakate jhabhe.
22.56: Ntumiche jhumo mwikeghe pamonita Petile aheghelii pahina jha mwotu, ajhakuningukiya na kulonge, “Mundo hojho chakaka akibha pamonga na Yecho!”
22.57: Nambo Petile ajhakunkanila, alongila, “Gwe majhe, niumanyite jwenio!”
22.58: Machaa pughachochita kujhenda, mundo jhonge, ajhakubhona Petile na jwenio ngalongila, “Mwenga ndi jhumo pakate jhabhe!” Nambo Petile pajhangwila, “Munahota, ne ndeka!”
22.59: Lichaa limo pulipetita, mundo jhonge ajhakupitila na kulonge helahela, “Chakaka mundo jhonjo bhahwelita pamonga na jwenio, helahela ahumii ku Galilaya!”
22.60: Nambo Petile pajhangwila, “Gwe mundo, chimulongela nikimanyi ndeka!” Palongela gheniya, lijhogholo lijhakubheka.
22.61: Bhambo Yecho ajhakughalambukila na kunnolekeya Petile. Peniya ndi Petile pakombwika malobhe ghalongila Bhambo ghala, “Deleno lijhogholo na kubhekajhe, naungannila patato.”
22.62: Petile ajhakupita panja jha ubhegho na kulela kwa ungolongonde. Yecho bhitende chanake na kukong'ondwa Matei 26:67-68; Maluku 14:65
22.63: Bhando bhubhanendelila Yecho bhala, bhajhakuntende chanake na bhajhakuntyala.
22.64: Bhahibhite miho kwa kitambala, kone bhankonyita, “Nnotele! Bho, ghane jwatyalite?”
22.65: Peniya bhajhakulonge malobhe twe gha kunigha. Yecho bhipeleka palonge jha bwalo Matei 26:59-66; Maluku 14:55-64; Yohane 18:19-24
22.66: Pukuchila tugha, ighogholo na akapiya matambiko bhakolo na bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo bhajhakukonganika pamonga, bhajhakumpeleka Yecho pa bwalo jha Kiyahude.
22.67: Ngabhannobhalila, “Bho, mutulobholele, mwenga ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche?” Nambo Yecho ngabhajhangwila, “Hilu ninnobholele, mangota naunyangula jhe.
22.69: Nambo kutumbuli ngoheno na kujhendelela, Mwana gwa Mundo natama lubhoko lwalelo lwa Chapanga jwabhii na makakala.”
22.70: Peniya bhoha bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, mwenga ndi Mwana gwa Chapanga?” Jwenio Yecho ngabhajhangwila, “Chakaka, ngita chimulongela.”
22.71: Bhene bhajhakulonge, “Bho, tupala mundo jhonge alonge panane jha mambu ghake? Twabhete tujhohine malobhe ghalongila jwenio!”

23.1: Bhahe, lilongo lyoha lya bhando bhajhakumpeleka Yecho palonge jha Pilatu.
23.2: Bhajhakutumbula kuntakalila bhalongila, “Tumwehine mundo hojho abhahobhecha bhando bhito. Na kabhele abhahibhilikiya bhando bhakotoka kupiya kode kwa munahota nkolongwa jwa ku Loma, na jwenio akikema ndi Kilichitu, Munahota nkolongwa.”
23.3: Pilatu ajhakunkonya Yecho, “Bho, mwenga ndi Munahota nkolongwa jwa Akayahude?” Yecho ngajhangwila, “Chakaka mwenga ndi milongela.”
23.4: Peniya Pilatu ajhakwalobholela akapiya matambiko bhakolo na lilongo lya bhando, “Nikihwene ndeka chalemwite mundo jhonjone.”
23.5: Nambo bhene bhajhakukangamala bhalongila, “Kwa mabholo ghake abhakokolekeya bhando bhataungane na unahota nkolongwa gwa ku Yudeya. Atumbulii ku Galilaya ade kongo.” Yecho ipelekwa kwa Helode
23.6: Pilatu pajhohina gheniya, ajhakukonya Yecho, “Bho, mundo jhonjo jwa ku Galilaya?”
23.7: Pilatu pamanyita Yecho ahumii ku kilambo chikilongochwa na Helode, ndi ajhakupeleka kwa Helode, jwakibha ku Yeluchalemo kwa machiko gheniya.
23.8: Helode pamwonita Yecho akahanganii hake nhwalo kwa machiko ghamahele apata ammone, akajhohine malobhe ghake, akibha ahobholila Yecho ahenge ilebhe ya kukangacha.
23.9: Bhahe, Helode ajhakunkonya machwale ghamahele, nambo Yecho akajhangwii jhe.
23.10: Akapiya matambiko bhakolo na bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo bhubhajhemita peniya, bhajhakughagha kwa likakala Yecho atakalilwe.
23.11: Bhahe, Helode na akakomana ngondo bhake bhajhakuntendela Yecho ghanganandela na chanake, peniya bhajhakuwalicha ngobho yambone ngita munahota nkolongwa na kumujhicha kwa Pilatu.
23.12: Kuhumii peniya, Helode na Pilatu bhajhakubhehe maghumba nde, nambo makacho bhakibha mu maghonga. Yecho ihadabulwa akomwe Matei 27:15-26; Maluku 15:6-15; Yohane 18:39-19:16
23.13: Pilatu ajhakwakema pamonga akapiya matambiko bhakolo na ilongoche ya bhando,
23.14: peniya ajhakwalobholela, “Munetite mundo jhonjo kwa nenga ngita mundo jwahobhecha bhando bhakomane na unahota nkolongwa gwa ku Loma. Nenga nikonyite palonge jhino, nambo kibhiijhe chalemwite mu matakalilo ghake.
23.15: Jwenio Helode atubhujhichile helahela twenga, nhwalo akiwejhe chalemwite. Peniya mundo hojho atehi ndeka kilebhe chochoha chikimpala akomwe.
23.16: Bhahe, nanichwapula luyato lwa ndomondo na kunekekehe ajhende.”
23.17: Nhwalo Pilatu achokolikiya adindulile mpungwa jhumo paunyagho gwa Pachaka.
23.18: Nambo lilongo lyoha lya bhando lijhakunonoha malobhe, “Mumohe pamba! Na mutudindulile Balaba!”
23.19: Balaba akatabhitwe mukipungo kwa kuhenga majhoghe ghighakapitile kubomane helahela nhwalo gwa kukoma bhando.
23.20: Bhahe, Pilatu akapahile kunekekeya Yecho, peniya ndi ngalongila nabho kabhele.
23.21: Nambo bhene bhajhakuchocha kunonoha malobhe, “Mumambe panchala! Mumambe pachalaba!”
23.22: Bhahe, Pilatu ajhakulonge mala jha utato na kwakonya, “Bho, nhwalo gwa nike? Bho, kilebhe ghane chalemwihe mundo hojho? Nikihwe ndeka chalemwite chikimpala akomwe. Bhahe, nanichwapula luyato lwa ndomondo na kunekekeya ajhende.”
23.23: Nambo bhajhakujhendelela kuchobhela hake, bhapata Yecho abhambwe panchalaba. Na kwa kuchobhela kwabhe bhajhakuntenda Pilatu ajheketele.
23.24: Bhahe, Pilatu ajhakulonge, unhenge ngita chimipala kuhenga.
23.25: Ajhakwadindulila mundo jhola jhubhampalita, jwakibha mukipungo kwa nhwalo gwa kuhenga majhoghe na kukoma, na kumpiya Yecho bhantende ngita chibhapala. Yecho ibhambwa pachalaba Matei 27:32-44; Maluku 15:21-32; Yohane 19:17-27
23.26: Pibhakibha bhampelika, bhajhakukongana na mundo jhumo liina lyake Simone jwabhelekilwe kuchenda jha ku Kilene, jwahumila kunng'onda. Bhajhakunkamula na kungheghecha nchalaba pahyeto jha Yecho.
23.27: Lilongo likolongwa lya bhando lijhakunkengama Yecho, pamonga na akakeghe bhibhakibha bhakwindikina na kunnelela Yecho.
23.28: Nambo Yecho ajhakwaghalambukila na kwalobholela, “Makakeghe bhu ku Yeluchalemo! Nkotoka kunelela nenga, mukilelela mabhene na yana hino.
23.29: Nhwalo machiko naghabhandikila, bhando nabhalongila, ‘Mbaha kwa mwikeghe jhola jwangamwana, na ntonga, hilu mabhele ghangajhongecha!’
23.30: Lichaa lyenio, ndi bhando nabhatumbula kulonge, itombe, ‘Mututilukile!’ Na ihogholo ‘Mutuyekelele!’
23.31: Anda bhando bhautendi naha nkongo mmehe, bho, naibhaha bhole kwa nkongo nnyomo?”
23.32: Helahela bhajhakwatola bhando bhabhele bhibhatenda ghanganandela, bhakapelikwe bhakomwe pamonga na Yecho.
23.33: Pubhahikita chehemo jhikemwa, “Libhonge lya muto,” peniya ndi bhajhakumamba Yecho pamonga na bhibhatehila ghanganandela kila jhumo na nchalaba gwake, jhumo lubhoko lwalelo na jhonge lubhoko lwa ngejha lwa Yecho.
23.34: Yecho palongila, “Tate gwango, mwalekekehe nhwalo bhamanyite jhe chibhatenda.” Peniya akalonda bhala bhajhakubhaghana ngobho yake kwa kahumbuumbu nnobhole.
23.35: Bhando bhibhakajhemite peniya kulolekeya, na bhene ilongoche ya Kiyahude bhantendela chanake. Bhalongila, “Abhakombwila bhando bhange, akikombole jwenio, anda jwenio ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche jwahaghulilwe na Chapanga!”
23.36: Helahela akakomana ngondo bhajhakuntendela chanake, bhajhakuheghelela na kumpekeya divaye jhibhabha,
23.37: bhalongila, “Anda chakaka mwenga ndi Munahota nkolongwa jwa Akayahude, mukikombole mabhene!”
23.38: Na panane jha nchalaba gwake pakajhandikwe malobhe ghanga, “Jhonjo ndi Munahota Nkolongwa jwa Akayahude.”
23.39: Mwihe jhumo pakate jha bhala bhabhele ajhakunigha Yecho, alongila, “Bho, mwenga ndi Kilichitu? Mukikombole mabhene na mutukombole na twenga!”
23.40: Nambo mwihe jhonge jhola ajhakupwatalila nnyake anongolila, “Gwe bhole, munendema jhe Chapanga? Na mabhene bhahadabwii ngita jwenio.
23.41: Mwenga na nenga bhatuadabwii chipalwa, tupokile malepo ghaghala ghutuhengita. Nambo mundo hojho kibhiijhe kilebhe chalemwite.”
23.42: Peniya nganongolila Yecho, “Yecho, ungotoka kunyehwa pumipala kubhehe Munahota nkolongwa gwino!”
23.43: Yecho ngajhangwila, “Ninobholela chakaka, kutumbulii ngoheno, natubhaha pamonga na nenga chehemo jha kukangacha jhikemwa ku pepo.” Yecho ihwe panchalaba Matei 27:45-56; Maluku 15:33-41; Yohane 19:28-30
23.44: Bhahe, Pihikila muhe jha chaa chita, lubhendo lujhakukamulana tyoo pa kilambo choha ade chaa ticha.
23.45: Peniya lipanjiya lilihibhikiya pa Nyumba jha Chapanga lijhakujwepuka jwee ipande ibhele kutumbulii kunane ade pahe.
23.46: Yecho ajhakubohoma kanonoha, “Tate gwango, mu mabhoko ghino nibheka uhuke gwango!” Palongila gheniya, ajhakubhehe kakalile.
23.47: Jhola nkolo jwa bhakomana ngondo palolita ghighatendika peniya, ajhakunnomba Chapanga alongila, “Chakaka mundo jhonjo akibha jwaumbone!”
23.48: Bhahe, lilongo lyoha lya bhando pubhalolita ghighakatindike, bhajhakujhenda bhabhii ngolongonde hake.
23.49: Nambo bhando bhoha bhubhakamanyite Yecho bhalingulila chukutale, bhaghalolekehe mambu ghanga. Pakate jhabhe bhakibha akakeghe bhalongohina nabho kuhumii ku Galilaya. Yegha jha Yecho ibhekwa mumambe Matei 27:57-61; Maluku 15:42-47; Yohane 19:38-42
23.50: Pakibha na mundo jhumo liina lyake Uchupo, kuhumii ku muche gwa Alimataya ku chenda jha ku Yudeya. Akibha jhumo jwa nkolo jwaumbone pa Bwalo jha Akayahude.
23.51: Nambo ahumii ku Alimataya, akajheketii jhe mambu gha pa Bwalo jha Akayahude pubhapata kunkoma Yecho na pubhalenganikiya kuhenga lyenio. Jwenio alolila machaa gha Chapanga pantumita munahota nkolongwa gwake kuhika kulongocha.
23.52: Bhahe, Uchupo ajhakujhenda kwa Pilatu kunnyopa atole malelo gha Yecho.
23.53: Ajhakuhulua malelo ghala kuhumii panane jha panchalaba, ajhakubhilingilila chanda ajhakughoneka umambe jhibhahokonyolile palindalabho, na mambe jhene ikibhajhe na malelo.
23.54: Iikibha lichiko lya Ijumaa ndi libhandikila lichiko lya kutumbula Kupomolela.
23.55: Akakeghe bhala bhubhalongohina na Yecho kuhumii ku Galilaya bhajhakunkengama Uchupo na bhajhakubhona mambe na yegha jha Yecho chibhekwite.
23.56: Peniya pibhakelewika kajhabhe bhakalenganikiye mahuta ghighanungalila petelele. Na Lichiko lya Kupomolela, bhajhakutama hele ngita Lilaghalikilo chililaghalikiye.

24.1: Lichiko lya jumapile, putiputi akakeghe bhajhakughegha mahuta ghighanungila petelele ghibhakalenganikiye na kujhenda nagho ku mambe.
24.2: Bhajhakulikolela lighanga lela lya kuyekelela mambe libhilimbiwe kuupele jha mambe.
24.3: Nambo pubhajhingila nkate mu mambe, bhakaiwe ndeka yegha jha Bhambo Yecho.
24.4: Pubhajhendilila kukangacha nhwalo gwa kilebhe chenie, pahina jhabhe papa bhakajhemite bhando bhabhele bhibhawalalii ngobho nhuo ya mbuu.
24.5: Akakeghe bhala bhajhakutumbula kulendema, bhajhakulita pahe. Peniya bhando bhala pubhalongila, “Nhwalo gwa nike mipalaha jwabhii na ughome pakate jha bhubhawile?
24.6: Abhii jhe pambano, ayokite! Nkomboke channobholila pakibha amela ku Galilaya.
24.7: ‘Mwana gwa Mundo nakamulwa na bhando bhibhabhii na uhakaho, na bhene nabhamamba pa nchalaba na lichiko lyutato nayoka.’ ”
24.8: Peniya, ndi akakeghe bhala pibhakombwika malobhe ghalongila Yecho,
24.9: pubhabhujhita kuhumii ku mambe, bhajhakulonge mambu ghanga ghoha ghughapitile kwa bhabholwa bhake kome na jhumo bha Yecho na bhando bhange.
24.10: Akakeghe bhubhahikita kulonge gheniya kwa akatenga, akibha Maliya jwahumila ku kilambo chaku Magidala na Yoane na Maliya majhe mundo Yakobu, pamonga na akakeghe bhange bhubhakalongohine nabho.
24.11: Nambo bhabholwa bhala bhajhakughapucha malobhe. Bhahe, bhakajheketile jhe.
24.12: Nambo Petile akajhenda mbelo ade ku mambe. Ajhakulita kulingukiya nkate, ajhakubhona nga ngobho jha malelo tugha. Peniya ngabhujhita ukajha kongo abhii hechu kwa gheniya ghughapitile. Mwanja gwa kujhenda ku Emau Maluku 16:12-13
24.13: Lichiko lele, bhabholwa bhabhele bha Yecho bhakibha mu kutyanga bhajhawila kuchenda jhimo jhikemwa ku Emau chikibhii utale kilomita kome na jhimo kuhumii ku Yeluchalemo.
24.14: Bhakibha na malongeche gha ilebhe yoha itendike.
24.15: Pubhajhendilila na malongeche ghabhe na kukikonya, Yecho jwenio ndi pabhandikila na kulongohana nabho pamonga.
24.16: Bhene bhakamwene kwa miho ghabhe, nambo bhakaumanyite jhe.
24.17: Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Mangota milongolelana nike, kongo mmii mu kutyanga?” Na bhene bhajhakujhema, kumiho jhabhe kujhakungamala kwa ungolongonde.
24.18: Mundo jhumo pakate jhabhe, liina lyake Kiliopa, ajhakunyangula, “Bho, mwe maghene kanjika chino pa muche gwa ku Yeluchalemo, umanyite ndeka ilebhe itendike machiko gha pahina ghano?”
24.19: Jwenio ngakonyita, “Ilebhe ghane kabhele?” Na bhene ngabhajhangwila, “Ilebhe ipambalikine Yecho jwa ku Nachalete. Mundo jwenio akibha nnondole jhuna likakala lya kuhenga na kubhola palonge jha Chapanga na kwa bhando bhoha.
24.20: Akapiya matambiko na ilongoche hito bhajhakukamua kwa bhakolo bhu ku Loma bhahadabwii akomwe, na bhene bhajhakumamba panchalaba.
24.21: Nambo twenga tukahobholile jwenio ndi jwa kuhighombola Ichilahele! Kuchocha kwa gheniya deleno ndi lichiko lyutato kuhumii pubhatehila ilebhe yenio.
24.22: Helahela akakeghe bhange kuhumii pakate jhito bhajhakutukangacha. Putiputi bhajhakujhenda ku mambe,
24.23: nambo bhakaikoli ndeka yegha jha Yecho. Bhajhakukelebhuka na kutulongelela bhapitilwe na akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga, alongila Yecho abhii ghome.
24.24: Bhajhito bhange bhakajhenda ku mambe bhajhakulola ghala ghighalongilwa na akakeghe, nambo jwenio bhakamwe ndeka.”
24.25: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mangota mwenga mupumbumwike naha! Mijheketela kachoko kachoko ghoha ghighalongoleka na milondole bha Chapanga!
24.26: Bho, ikampala ndeka Kilichitu kubhehe mulung'ahe, na peniya ndi ajhingila mu ukolo gwake?”
24.27: Bhahe, peniya ndi pajhendilila kwachimulila mbone mambu ghoha gwa jwenio hotuhotu ghughabhii mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga, kutumbulila itabo ijhandikwe na Mucha ade mu itabo henge ya milondole bha Chapanga.
24.28: Pubhabhandikila kuhika pa chenda jhene, Yecho ajhakutenda anda atenda kupetelecha.
24.29: Nambo bhene bhajhakupembelekeya chonde, “Uhighalike pamonga na twenga, nhwalo lyobha litipike na lubhendo lutumbwile.” Ajhakujhenda nkate na kutama.
24.30: Patamita pahe na kulye nabho, ajhakutola libumunda na kunchenguu Chapanga, na kuumetula na kwapekeya ajhake.
24.31: Papalapala miho ghabhe ghajhakudindulilwa, bhajhakumanya, nambo jwenio ajhakwaghala pakate jhabhe.
24.32: Bhahe, bhajhakukonyana, “Bho, miojho jhito ikananamwike jhe pakibha achimulila mu Majhandiko gha Chapanga mundela mola?”
24.33: Papalapala bhajhakubhoka na kubhujha ku Yeluchalemo. Bhajhakwakolela bhabholwa kome na jhumo bha Yecho na bhando bhange bhibhakibha pamonga na bhene.
24.34: Bhalongila, “Chakaka Bhambo ayokite! Akongine na Simone!”
24.35: Bhahe, bhando bhala bhabhele bhajhakulonge ilebhe ipitile undela, na pubhamanyita Yecho pametwila libumunda. Yecho abhapitila bhabholwa bhake Matei 28:16-20; Maluku 16:14-18; Yohane 20:19-23; Mahengo 1:6-8
24.36: Pubhakibha mukulonge gheniya, Yecho jwenio akajhemite pakate jhabhe na kwalobholela, “Ntamengane kwa uteeke.”
24.37: Bhene bhajhakuchituka hake na kujhoghopa bhahambwika pange bhalihwene lihoka.
24.38: Nambo Yecho ngalongila, “Nhwalo gwa nike mijhoghopa? Nhwalo gwa nike mme na kiholo kumwojho gwino?
24.39: Nninge mabhanga gha mu mabhoko ghango na mabhanga gha mu makongono ghango, naumanya kubhehe ndi nenga. Umbapahe mmone, nhwalo lihoka likwetejhe yegha hilu mihupa ngita chiunolekeya.”
24.40: Pajhomolila kulonge naha, ajhakwalangiya mabhanga gha mu mabhoko pamonga na mabhanga gha mu makongono ghake.
24.41: Pubhakibha bhamela nakujheketela nhwalo gwa mukuhangana na kukangacha kwabhe. Yecho pakonyita, “Bho, kibhii chakulyegha pambano?”
24.43: Ajhakutola na kulyegha, kongo bhoha bhabhii kulola.
24.44: Peniya ajhakwalobholela, “Ghangano ndi mambu ghininongolila punikibha na mangota: Imbalita kutimila ghala ghoha ghighajhandikwe kwa nenga mu lilaghalikilo lya Mucha, na mu itabo ya milondole bha Chapanga, na Zabule.”
24.45: Bhahe, ajhakwatenda malango ghabhe ghahoto kumanya mbone Majhandiko gha Chapanga.
24.46: Ajhakwalobholela, “Ijhandikwe naha, Kilichitu Nkomboche natendwa kung'ahichwa na pa lichiko lya utato nayoka.
24.47: Kwa liina lyake, ilambo yoha kutumbulila ku Yeluchalemo itangachilwe kubhehe bhando bhipalwa kuleka na kulekekewa uhakaho.
24.48: Mangota mipalwa kwalobholela bhando kubhehe mambu ghanga ndi uchakaka.
24.49: Namwete naninetelangana jhola Tate gwango jhalaghalikiye kuntuma. Nambo uhighalike pa muche ade papala kumpekehe likakala kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga.” Yecho ibhujha kunane kwa Chapanga Maluku 16:19-20; Mahengo 1:9-11
24.50: Peniya Yecho pabhalongwicha bhabholwa bhake kuhumii ku Yeluchalemo ade ku Betaniya, ajhakujhinula mabhoko ghake na kwape mota.
24.51: Pakibha mu kwape mota, ajhakwaleka, ajhakutolwa kujhenda kunane kwa Chapanga.
24.52: Bhene bhajhakunyinamila, kabhele bhajhakukelebhuka ku Yeluchalemo, kongo bhabhii mu kuhangana hake.
24.53: Helahela bhajhendilila kupipikiya pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, kongo bhannombita Chapanga.

1.1: Peniya makacho kabula jha kupanganwa kwa ilebhe, jhumo jwakemitwa Lilobhe akibha. Na jwenio Lilobhe atamita na Chapanga, na jwenio akibha ndi Chapanga.
1.2: Kuhumii makacho atamita na Chapanga kabula jha Chapanga kupangana kilebhe chochoha.
1.3: Chapanga akapangine ilebhe yoha kupete kwa jwenio, changabhehe jwenio kibhii jhe kilebhe chochoha chikapanginwe.
1.4: Jwenio akibha lihembuko lya ughome, na gwenio ughome uletite lumule kwa bhando.
1.5: Na lwenio lumule lung'ala pa lubhendo, na lubhendo luluhotwi ndeka kuluhima.
1.6: Chapanga akatumite mundo jhumo, liina lyake Yohane.
1.7: Yohane akahikite kwalobholela bhando malobhe gha lumule, bhando bhoha bhajhohe na bhalujheketii lumule lwenio.
1.8: Yohane jwenio akibha lumule jhe, nambo akahikite kwalobholela bhando mana jha lumule lwenio.
1.9: Lwenio lumule lwa uchakaka, ndi lumule luluhika pannema pano na kwamulikila bhando bhoha.
1.10: Lilobhe jhola akibha pannema na kupete kwa jwenio Chapanga akapangine nnema, nambo bhando bha pannema bhakaumanyite ndeka.
1.11: Akahikite kwa bhando bhake jwenio, nambo bhando bhake bhakankanite.
1.12: Nambo bhando bhoha bhibhampokii na kunyeketela, ajhakwape ukindendeke gwa kubhehe yana ya Chapanga.
1.13: Bhabhii yana ya Chapanga chi kwa kubhelukwa ngita bhando chibhabhelukwa, amu kwa likakala lya yegha, amu chi kwa uhotolo gwa mundo, nambo kwa uhotolo gwa Chapanga jwenie.
1.14: Na Lilobhe jwenio ajhakubhehe mundo, na jwenio ajhakutama pamonga na twenga. Na twenga tumwene ung'alicho gwake, ung'alicho gwa Mwana jwa kanjika, jwahikite kuhumii kwa Tate Chapanga, atwelii hoko umbone na uchakaka.
1.15: Yohane akalongile malobhe gha mundo jwenio, alongila kwa lilobhe likolongwa, “Jhonjo ndi jhuninongila panane jhake, ‘Ahika mundo jhumo kuyeto jhango ndi nkolongwa kupeta nenga, nhwalo akibha nenga nandumbo jhe.’ ”
1.16: Kwa nhwalo gwa umbone gwake gwamahele, twenga tuchochite kupoke mota hake.
1.17: Chapanga akatupekiye Lilaghalikilo lyake kwa kupete Mucha, nambo na umbone na uchakaka utuhikilila kupete kwa ndela jha Yecho Kilichitu.
1.18: Abhii ng'o mundo jhojhoha jwamwene Chapanga. Nambo Mwana jwa kanjika jwabhii Chapanga na jwapahilwe na Tate, ndi jwatulobholila malobhe gheniya gha Chapanga. Malobhe gha Yohane Mbatichajhe Matei 3:1-12; Maluku 1:1-8; Luka 3:1-18
1.19: Ghanga ndi malobhe ghalongila Yohane Mbatichajhe, pakibha na ilongoche ya Akayahude ku Yeluchalemo kola pabhatumitwa akapiya matambiko na Akalawe, bhankonye Yohane, “Mwenga ndi ma ghane?”
1.20: Yohane ajhakujheketela na ajhakujhanguu hotuhotu changayatila, ajhakulonge, “Nenga na Kilichitu Nkomboche ndeka.”
1.21: Bhajhakunkonya, “Bhahe, mutulobholele mwenga ndi ma ghane? Bho, mwenga ndi ma Eliya?” Yohane ajhakujhanguu, “Nai jhe, ne ndeka.” Bhajhakunkonya kabhele. “Bho, mwenga ndi jhola nnondole jwa Chapanga?” Na jwenio pajhangwila, “Ne jhe!”
1.22: Bhahe, bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, ngohe majhito maghane? Bho, ngohe mabhene milonge nike panane jhino? Mutulobholele, na twenga twalobholela bhala bhibhatutumita tunkonye.”
1.23: Yohane ajhakujhanguu ngita chalongila nnondole jwa Chapanga Isaya, “Nenga ‘Ndi lilobhe lya mundo jwaikema kunjenga, Nnenganikiye ndela jha Bhambo jhaipala kupeta.’ ”
1.25: bhajhakunkonya Yohane, “Anda mwe ma Kilichitu amu ma Eliya jhe amu jhola nnondole jwa Chapanga jhe, nhwalo gwa nike mibaticha bhando?”
1.26: Yohane ajhakujhanguu, “Nenga nibaticha kwa mache, nambo pakate jhino abhii mundo jhumo manaumanya jhe.
1.27: Ndi jwenio jwahika kuyeto jhango, nambo nenga nitope ndeka hilu kubhopo lughojhe lwa maghubache ghake.”
1.28: Ghanga ghoha ghatendika ku muche gwa ku Betaniya, kwiye jha lilabha lya ku Yolodane, kwakibha Yohane abaticha. Yecho litohe lya limbelele lya Chapanga
1.29: Kilabho jhake, Yohane ajhakummona Yecho auhikilila, ajhakulonge, “Jhonjo ndi litohe lya limbelele lya Chapanga, jwatola uhakaho gwa bhando bha nnema!
1.30: Jhonjo ndi jhunongila malobhe panane jhake, nongila ‘Kuyeto jhango ahika mundo nkolongwa kupeta nenga, nhwalo akibha nenga nandumbo jhe.’
1.31: Nenga namwete nikaumanyi jhe, nambo hikite kubaticha kwa mache nipala bhando bha ku Ichilahele bhaumanye.”
1.32: Yohane akalongi malobhe ghala ghaghawene, “Nimwene Uhuke gwa Chapanga ahuluka ngita ngunda kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga na kutolela panane jhake.
1.33: Nenga hele nikaumanye jhe, nambo jhola jwandumita kwabaticha bhando kwa mache jwanobholile naha, ‘Mundo jhola jhumipala kummona Uhuke gwa Chapanga kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga na kubhehe panane jhake, jwenio ndi jwabaticha kwa Uhuke gwa Chapanga.’ ”
1.34: Peniya Yohane ajhakulonge, “Nenga nolite kwa miho ghango na chakaka ninnobholela kubhehe jhonjo ndi Mwana jwa Chapanga.” Bhabholwa bha Yecho bha kutumbula
1.35: Lichiko lyubhele jhake, Yohane akibha ajhemite peniya pamonga na bhabholwa bhake bhabhele chehemo jwenio.
1.36: Pamonita Yecho akityanga, ajhakulonge, “Dola, jhonjo ndi Litohe lya Limbelele lya Chapanga!”
1.37: Bhabholwa bhabhele bhala pibhannyohina Yohane akalongila naha, bhajhakunkengama Yecho.
1.38: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakughalambuka, ajhakwabhona bhabholwa bheniya bhitenda kunkengama, ajhakwakonya, “Bho, mipala nike?” Na bhene bhajhakunyanguu, “Labe, kajhino kojhe?” Labe mana jhake Mmola.
1.39: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Nhwike mupalinge.” Jhakibha cha kome jha kimihe bhabholwa pibhajhahwila kupalinga chehemo jhatamita Yecho, bhajhakupipikiya bhoha lichiko lyenio.
1.40: Anduleya, nnongo mundo Simone Petile, akibha jhumo jha bhala bhabhele bhibhakanyohine Yohane akalongila gheniya, ajhakunkengama Yecho.
1.41: Anduleya ajhakumpalaha nhwacha mundo Simone, ajhakulonge, “Tumwehine Machiya.” Ndi kulonge Kilichitu Nkomboche.
1.42: Peniya Anduleya ajhakuntola Simone na ajhakumpeleka kwa Yecho. Yecho ajhakunnolekeya na ngalongila, “Mwenga ndi ma Simone mwana gwa Yohane, nambo ngohe nankemwa Kefa.” Kefa kwa Kigilike Petile, ndi kulonge lindalabho. Yecho abhakema Filipu na Natanaele
1.43: Lichiko lyubhele jhake Yecho ajhakubhoka na kujhenda ku Galilaya. Na kwenio ajhakummona Filipu, ajhakunnobholela, “Ungengame.”
1.44: Jwenio Filipu akibha abhelukilwe ku muche gwa ku Betisaida, muche gwahumii Anduleya na Petile.
1.45: Filipu ajhakummona Natanaele, ajhakunnobholela, “Tumwene mundo jhola Mucha jwakanyandike mukitabo cha Lilaghalikilo, na helahela milondole bha Chapanga bhakajhandike malobhe ghake. Jwenio ndi Yecho, jwahumii ku muche gwa ku Nachalete Mwana jwa Uchupo.”
1.46: Bhahe, Natanaele ajhakunkonya Filipu, “Bho, pumihambuka kilebhe chambone kihoto kubhoke ku Nachalete?” Filipu ngajhangwila, “Nhwike nninge.”
1.47: Yecho pamonita Natanaele itende kuhikilila, ajhakulonge, “Dola, jwenio ndi mwi Ichilahele jwa chakaka, anawahi jhe kunkopokeya mundo jhojhoha!”
1.48: Natanaele ajhakunkonya, “Umanyita bhole nenga?” Yecho ajhakujhanguu “Kabula jha Filipu kunkema nikamwene pimikibha pahe jha nkongo gwa nkojho.”
1.49: Peniya Natanaele ajhakunyanguu, “Mmola, mwenga chakaka ndi Mwana gwa Chapanga! Mwenga Manahota Nkolongwa jwa ku Ichilahele!”
1.50: Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Bho, unnyeketela nhwalo pininnobholila nikamwene pahe jha nkongo gwa nkojho? Namughabhona makolongwa kupeta ghanga!”
1.51: Yecho pajhendilila kulonge, “Ninnobholela chakaka, nanola kunane kwa Chapanga kukadinduka na akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga nabhakwela nu kuhuluka panane na Mwana gwa Mundo.”

2.1: Na lichiko lyutato pakibha na unyagho gwa ndowa kwenio ku Kana, ku muche gwa ku Galilaya, na majhe mundo Yecho akibha papa.
2.2: Yecho na bhabholwa bhake helahela bhakalalikwe ku unyagho gwa ndowa gwenio.
2.3: Bhahe, divaye puijhomokila, majhe mundo Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Bhakwete jhe divaye.”
2.4: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Nkotoka kumola lyakuhenga. Lichaa lyango lyamela.”
2.5: Peniya majhe mundo Yecho ajhakwalobholela akatumiche, “Lyolyoha lyapala kunnobholela, nhenga.”
2.6: Bhahe, pakibha na ihulo chita ya maghanga, itwelii mache, ikabhekwite peniya ngita chibhayobhalile Akayahude gha kukijhelebhula kwa kunyopa Chapanga. Kila kihulo chimo kikahotwii kujhingii mikambo ncheche amu nhwano.
2.7: Yecho ajhakwalobholela akatumiche, “Ntwelengane ihulo yenio mache.” Na bhene bhajhakutweleya lombilombi.
2.8: Peniya ajhakwalobholela, “Ngoheno nteke mupele nkolo unyagho.” Na bhene bhakatehile ngita chabhalongalile.
2.9: Jhola nkolo jwa unyagho pabhonjita mache gheniya ghajhakughalambuka na kubhehe divaye. Na jwenio akamanyite jhe kwihumile, nambo akatumiche bhubhatekilila mache bhakamanye. Peniya nkolo jwa unyagho ajhakunkema nnyina mwale paupele,
2.10: ajhakunnobholela, “Kila mundo atumbula kwapekeya akaghene divaye jhamaha. Peniya akaghene pibhanywila nu kukola, upiya divaye jhanganogha. Nambo mwenga nibhekite divaye jhinogha ade ngoheno!”
2.11: Yecho ndi nginyililo jhake jha kukangacha jha kutumbula kulangiya pakibha ku Kana, ku muche gwa ku Galilaya. Kwenio ajhakulangiya ung'alicho gwake na bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunyeketela.
2.12: Pajhomolila gheniya, Yecho ajhakuhelela na majhe mundo, na nnongo mundo pamonga na bhabholwa bhake, kujhenda ku muche gwa ku Kapelenaumo na ajhakuhighalika kwa machiko ghandina kwenio. Yecho abhabhenga bhando pa Nyumba jha Chapanga Matei 21:12-13; Maluku 11:15-17; Luka 19:45-46
2.13: Unyagho gwa Akayahude ghu ukemwa Pachaka pubhandikila, Yecho ajhakuhobhoka kujhenda ku Yeluchalemo.
2.14: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwakolela bhando pa Nyumba jha Chapanga bhakichulucha ng'ombi na mambelele na ngunda, bhubhajhangangana mbijha bhabhii panane jha njangwale bhatamangine.
2.15: Papa, Yecho ajhakupota luyato lwa lughojhe, ajhakwabhenga bhando bhoha panja pa Nyumba jha Chapanga bhoha pamonga na ng'ombi na mambelele. Helahela ajhakupendengula njangwale na mbijha yabhe ijhakupechengana yoha.
2.16: Peniya ajhakwalobholela bhala bhubhachulwicha ngunda, “Mmohengane ilebhe henge! Nkotoka kuhighalambula nyumba jha Tate gwango lighuliho!”
2.17: Bhabholwa bhake bhajhakukomboka Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghighalonge, “Mwe ma Chapanga, upalo gwango kwa nyumba jhino undiniya kumwojho gwango ngita mwotu.”
2.18: Bhahe, bhakolo Akayahude bhajhakunkonya Yecho, “Bho, nanangiya nginyililo ghane kabhele jha kukangacha kubhehe nkwete uhotolo gwa kuhenga ghangano ghoha?”
2.19: Yecho ajhakwajhangu, “Ntilulane Nyumba jha Chapanga, na nenga nanjenga kabhele kwa machiko matato.”
2.20: Peniya Akayahude bhajhakulonge, “Nyumba jhende jha Chapanga ikachengwite machiko makome ncheche na chita, mwenga nahotola bhole kujhichenga kwa machiko gheniya matato?”
2.21: Nambo Nyumba jha Chapanga jhalongela Yecho, ikibha ndi yegha jhake.
2.22: Bhahe, Yecho payokita kuhumii kubhawile, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakukomboka chela chalongila. Bhajhakujheketela Majhandiko gha Chapanga na malobhe ghange ghalongila Yecho. Yecho ahimanya miojho jha bhando bhoha
2.23: Bhahe, Yecho pakibha ku Yeluchalemo ku unyagho gwa Pachaka, bhando bhamahele bhakaihwene nginyililo yatehila, bhajhakunnyeketela.
2.24: Nambo Yecho akabhajheketii ndeka, nhwalo akamanye bhando bhoha.
2.25: Akapahi jhe mundo jhojhoha annobholele malobhe gha bhando, nhwalo Yecho akaghamanye ghughabhii nkate jha miojho jhabhe.

3.1: Bhahe, pakibha na kilongoche nkolongwa jhumo jwa Akayahude, mundo jwa likunde lya Mapwalichayo, liina lyake Nikodemo.
3.2: Lichiko limo uwiko Nikodemo ajhakunyendelela Yecho, ajhakunnobholela, “Mmola, tumanye kubhehe mwenga ndi Mmola jhutumitwe na Chapanga. Nhwalo abhii jhe mundo jhojhoha jwahotola kuhenga nginyililo yumuhenga mwenga anda Chapanga nakubhehe jhe pamonga.”
3.3: Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Ninnobholela chakaka, abhii jhe mundo nahotola kujhingila mu Nahota nkolongwa gwa Chapanga anda abhelwike ndeka mala jhubhele.”
3.4: Nikodemo ajhakunkonya Yecho, “Bho, mundo nkolongwa ihoto bho kubhelukwa mala jhubhele? Chakaka iwechekana jhe mundo ajhingii mulutumbo lwa majhe na kubhelukwa kabhele!”
3.5: Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Ninnobholela chakaka, abhii jhe mundo jwa kujhingii mu Nahota Nkologwa gwa Chapanga anda abatichwe kwa mache na Uhuke gwa Chapanga.”
3.6: Mundo jwabhelwike kwa yegha kuhumii kwa majhe na tate mundo, nambo chikibhelwike kwa Uhuke ndi kihuma kwa Uhuke gwa Chapanga.
3.7: Nkotoka kukangacha nhwalo ninnobholela nipala mmelukwe mala jhubhele.
3.8: Upepo upogha kupala kupoghela, mujhoha puupogha, nambo muumanye jhe kuhumii hilu kupoghela. Ndi chikipitila kwa kila mundo jwabhelwike kwa Uhuke gwa Chapanga.
3.9: Nikodemo ajhakunkonya, “Bho, ilebhe naihotola kupitila?”
3.10: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Mwenga mwa mmola nkolongwa jwa ku Ichilahele, na mwenga muhimanyite jhe ilebhe hengeno?”
3.11: Chakaka ninnobholela, twenga tulonge ilebhe itumanya na natilongela ilebhe ituhwene kwa miho ghito, nambo mangota mwamela mujheketela ndeka malobhe ghito.
3.12: Mukannyeketii ndeka puninnobholila ilebhe ya pannema pano, bhole nanyeketela jhe anda ninnobholile ilebhe ya kunane kwa Chapanga?
3.13: Abhii jhe mundo jwajhihwii kunane kwa Chapanga, nambo Mwana gwa Mundo jwahumite kunane kwa Chapanga.
3.14: Ngita Mucha panyinwila lijhoka lya chaba kwa luyato kunjenga kola, helahela Mwana gwa Mundo ipalwa ajhinwulilwa,
3.15: kila mundo jwannyeketela abhehe na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
3.16: Kwa nhwalo Chapanga akapahile hake bhando bha pannema, ade ajhakummoha Mwana jwa kanjika, kila mundo jwanyeketela akotoka kuhobha, nambo abhaha na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
3.17: Nhwalo Chapanga akantumite ndeka Mwana mundo pannema pano kwahadabula bhando, nambo nnema aughombole kwa kupete jwenio.
3.18: Mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketile Mwana bhihadabu ndeka, nambo mundo jhojhoha jwangannyeketela akihahadabwii njwe, nhwalo anyekite ndeka Mwana jwa kanjika jwa Chapanga.
3.19: Naha ndi chimpala kuhadabulwa, lumule luhikite pannema, nambo bhando bhipala lubhendo na kululeka lumule, nhwalo ghibhahenga mabhoho.
3.20: Kila mundo jwaitenda mabhoho aluchimwa lumule, na jwenio hukana kuhika palumule, nhwalo ijhoghopa mabhoho naghabhonekana mbegha.
3.21: Nambo mundo jhola jwaitenda gha chakaka ujhenda palumule, kupala ghala ghahenga ghabhonekena mbegha kwa kunyokanikiya Chapanga. Yohane Mbatichajhe na Yecho
3.22: Pughajhomokila gheniya, Yecho na bhabholwa bhake bhajhakujhenda ade ku muche gwa ku Yudeya, ajhakubhehe kwenio ajhakutama nako, kwenio abaticha bhando.
3.23: Helahela Yohane akibha abaticha ku Ainoniya, pahina na ku Salemo, nhwalo peniya pakibha na mache twe. Bhando bhamahele bhanyendilila, na jwenio ajhakwabaticha.
3.24: Ghanga ghatendika Yohane pakibha atabhitwe mukipungo.
3.25: Bhahe, pajhakubhehe na mitaungano pakate jha bhabholwa bha Yohane na Akayahude mambu gha kukijhelebhula kwa kunyopa Chapanga.
3.26: Bhabholwa bheniya bhajhakunyendelela Yohane na kunnobholela, “Mmola, mundo jhola jhumukibha pamonga na mwenga kwiye jha ku Yolodane, na jhumutulobholila malobhe ghake, ngoheno jwenio abaticha na bhando bhinyendelela.”
3.27: Yohane ajhakwajhanguu, “Abhii jhe mundo jwahoto kupokela kilebhe changapelwa na Chapanga.
3.28: Mangota mabhene umanye puninnobholila, ‘Nenga na Kilichitu Nkomboche jhe, nambo ndei kutumwa kulongolela.’
3.29: Jwabhii na nnyina mwale mwikeghe ndi jwake nnyina mwale munalome. Nambo njeche jwa nnyina mwale ajhema pahina na kujhokanikiya, nhwangana pahijhoha lilobhe lya nnyina mwale munalome akilongela. Naha ndi chibhii kwa nenga ngoheno luhangano lwango pulukamilika.
3.30: Bhahe, jwenio Yecho ipala abhaha nkolongwa na nenga maha jwandina.” Jhola jwabhoka kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga
3.31: Jwenio jwahika kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga ndi nkolongwa kuliku bhoha. Mundo jwa pannema pano apitii pannema na ulongela ilebhe ya pannema, nambo jwahika kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga ndi jwalongocha ghoha.
3.32: Jwenio alongela ghala ghaghahwene na kughajhoha, nambo abhii jhe hilu mundo jhumo jwajheketela malobhe ghalongila.
3.33: Nambo mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketela malobhe ghake, chakaka ilangiya Chapanga ndi uchakaka.
3.34: Jhola jwatumitwe na Chapanga, ulonge malobhe gha Chapanga, nhwalo Chapanga untwelekeya lombilombi mundo jwenio Uhuke gwa Chapanga.
3.35: Tate impala Mwana mundo na akamwii ilebhe yoha mu mabhoko ghake.
3.36: Mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketela Mwana abhii na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta, nambo mundo jhojhoha jwanga nnyeketela Mwana akwete jhe ughome, najhendelela kubhehe pahe jha luchwapulo lwa Chapanga.

4.1: Mapwalichayo bhakajhohine Yecho akwete bhando bhamahele kubhehe bhabholwa na kubaticha kupeta Yohane.
4.2: Nambo Yecho jwenio akabatiche ndeka bhando, nambo bhabholwa bhake ndi bhakabatiche bhando.
4.3: Bhahe, Yecho pajhohina gheniya, ajhakubhoka ku Yudeya na kubhujha ku Galilaya.
4.4: Mu mwanja gwake impalita apetele ku Samaliya.
4.5: Bhahe, ajhakuhika ku muche gwa ku Samaliya, ghuukemwa Sukale, ghuheghelile na nng'onda ghola gwa Yakobu gwakampekiye mwana mundo jwakemwita Uchupo.
4.6: Peniya pakibha na kilibha cha Yakobu, na Yecho nhwalo gwa kutotokela kwa mwanja, ajhakutama pahina jha kilibha. Ikibha chaa chita jha muhe.
4.7: Bhahe, mwikeghe jhumo Nsamaliya ajhakuhika kuteka mache. Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nijhopa mache nyweghe.”
4.8: Yecho akibha kanjika, bhabholwa bhake pubhajhahwile kubomane kuheme ilebhe ya kulyegha.
4.9: Mwikeghe jhola ajhakunnobholela Yecho, “Mwenga ma Yahude na nenga ndi Nasamaliya. Nhwalo ghane unyopa mache gha kunywegha?” Alongila naha nhwalo Akayahude na Akasamaliya bhilye ndeka pamonga.
4.10: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Anda ngaumanya hupo ya Chapanga na ndi ghane jwannyopa mache gha kunywegha, ngamunyopite na jwenio ngampekiye mache ghighaleta ughome.”
4.11: Mwikeghe jhola ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, nkwete jhe nteko gwa kuteke mache na kilibha kibhii nnyoli. Bho, ngoheno namughakolela kojhe mache ghighaleta ughome?
4.12: Amu pange mwenga mukitenda mwanahota kuliku tate gwito Yakobu? Jwenio akatupekii twenga kilibha chenje helahela na jwenio na yana mundo na inyama yake bhanywila mache gha kilibha chenje.”
4.13: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Jwanywegha mache ghanga najhohii jhe nyota kabhele.
4.14: Nambo jwapala kunywegha mache ghakumpekeya nenga, nabhe jhe na nyota kwa ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta. Mache ghunimpela kumpekiya ghunimpela nkate jhino naghabha chembwe cha mache ghighaleta ughome na kumpela ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.”
4.15: Mwikeghe jhola ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, umbekehe mache gheniya! Ngotoka kubhehe na nyota kabhele, na ngotoka kuhika kabhele kuteka mache pamba.”
4.16: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nnyende mukankeme ungana gwino, na nhwike nako pamba.”
4.17: Jwenio mwikeghe ajhakunnobholela, “Nenga ndoline jhe.” Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Unywagwii mbone, nkwete ndeka munalome.
4.18: Nhwalo mukibha na akanalome nhwano na munalome jhutama nako ngoheno jwii ndeka. Chakaka nnongii maha.”
4.19: Bhahe, mwikeghe jhola ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, nibhona mwenga ndi ma nondole bha Chapanga.
4.20: Akahoko bhito bhanyinamila Chapanga pakitombe chenje, nambo mangota Akayahude milongela ku Yeluchalemo ndi kwa kunyope Chapanga.”
4.21: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Mwe majhe unyeketele chinilonge, machiko ghabhii kuhika bhando nabhanyinamila ndeka Tate panane jha kitombe chenje amu kola ku Yeluchalemo.
4.22: Mangota mwaka Samaliya, munyinamila Chapanga jhola jwangaumanya, nambo twenga Akayahude tunyinamila Chapanga jhutummanye, nhwalo gwa ughombokeko uhumii kwa Akayahude.
4.23: Nambo machiko ghabhii kuhika, kabhele ghahikite, bhibhanyinamila Chapanga jwa uchakaka na bhanyopa Tate kuhumii muhuke gwa Chapanga na uchakaka. Nhwalo Tate abhapala bhando ngita bheniya bhannyinamile.
4.24: Chapanga ndi Uhuke na bhando bhibhanyopa ibhapala bhanyinamila Chapanga kwa kulongochwa na Uhuke gwa Chapanga na uchakaka.”
4.25: Mwikeghe jhola ajhakunnobholela, “Nimanya Machiya Nkomboche, jhuikemwa Kilichitu abhii kuhika. Papala kuhika na natulobholela hotuhotu kila kilebhe.”
4.26: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nenga jhunilongela na mwenga, ndi nenga.”
4.27: Papa bhabholwa bhake bhajhakubhujha, bhajhakukangacha hake kubhona akilongela na mwikeghe jhola. Nambo abhii jhe mundo jwakankonyite, “Mipala nike?” Amu “Nhwalo gwa nike milongela na mwikeghe jwenio?”
4.28: Bhahe, mwikeghe jhola ajhakuuleka nkambo ghola papa na kubhujha kubomane kwalongelela bhando,
4.29: “Tijha mukanole mundo jwanobholile ilebhe yoha indehila. Bho, pange ihoto kubhehe jwenio ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche?”
4.30: Bhahe, bhando bhajhakubhoka ku bomane nu kujhenda kunninga Yecho.
4.31: Muda ghogho bhabholwa bhake bhampembelikiya Yecho bhalongila, “Mmola, nlyeghe!”
4.32: Nambo Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Nenga ngwete cha kulyegha mangota mukimanyitii jhe.”
4.33: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakukonyana, “Bho, abhii mundo jwannetile chakulyegha?”
4.34: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Chinilyegha ndi kuhenga ghapala jhola jwandumita na kujhomola lihengo lyambekii kuhenga.
4.35: Mangota mulonge, ‘Jhamela miyehe ncheche tugha, na mahuno naghatumbula.’ Nambo ninnobholela, dolokeya mighonda chilenganikilwe kwa mahuno.
4.36: Mundo jwahuna alepitwe njwe malepo ghake na jwaponga mahuno kwa nhwalo jha ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta, hele jwamicha na jwahuna nabhahangana pamonga.
4.37: Nhwalo luhumo londo chakaka ‘Mundo jhumo umicha na mundo jhonge jwakuhuna.’
4.38: Nenga nitumingine mukahune mu mighonda jhangalema, bhando bhange bhakahengite lihengo, nambo mangota mwenga minong'omenekeya kwa lihengo lyabhe.”
4.39: Akasamaliya twe bha ku bomane jhela ngabhanyeketila Yecho kwa nhwalo gwa majhe jhola, “Anobholile ilebhe yoha indehila.”
4.40: Bhahe, Akasamaliya bhajhakunyendelela Yecho, bhajhakunnyopa bhatame nako, na jwenio ajhakutama kwa machiko mabhele.
4.41: Bhando bhamahele bhajhakunnyeketela Yecho nhwalo gwa malobhe ghala ghalongila.
4.42: Bhajhakunnobholela majhe jhola, “Twenga ngoheno tujheketile, chi kwa nhwalo kwa chela chinongela, nambo nhwalo twabhete tujhohine na tumanya mundo jhonjo chakaka Nchengula jwa bhando bhoha bha pannema.” Yecho inamicha mwana jwa munahota
4.43: Pighapetita machiko mabhele Yecho ajhakubhoka kwenio, na kujhenda ku Galilaya.
4.44: Nhwalo Yecho jwenio alongila hotuhotu, “Nnondole jwa Chapanga ilendemwa ndeka ku kilambo chabhelukilwe.”
4.45: Bhahe, pahikita ku Galilaya, bhando bhamahele bhajhakumpokela nhwalo bhene bhakajhenda ku Unyagho gwa Pachaka kwenio ku Yeluchalemo, na bhakaihwene yoha yatehila Yecho pa unyagho gwenio.
4.46: Yecho pajhahwila kabhele ku Kana ghubhii ku muche gwa ku Galilaya, kwenio kwaghalambwiya mache kubhehe divaye. Kwenio pakibha na munahota jhumo mwana mundo atehila kulwalwa ku muche gwa ku Kapelenaumo.
4.47: Bhahe, munahota jwenio pajhohina Yecho ahikite ku Galilaya kuhumii ku Yudeya ajhakunnyendelela na kunnyopa anamiche mwana mundo jwakibha tepekatepeka.
4.48: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Mangota bhando changalola nginyililo na ikangacho minyekete jhe Chapanga.”
4.49: Munahota jwenio ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, chonde tujhende mwanango kabula jha kuwegha.”
4.50: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nnyende tugha mwana gwino nabhaha ghome!” Mundo jhola ajhakujheketela malobhe gha Yecho, ajhakujhenda.
4.51: Munahota jhola pakibha undela kubhujha, akatumiche bhake ajhakukongana nako na kunnobholela mwana gwino abhii ghome njwe.
4.52: Na jwenio ajhakwakonya muda ghane patumbwila kubhehe mbaha, na bhene ngabhanyangwila, “Dicho cha chaba jha muhe punekikiya ulwalo.”
4.53: Tate jhola ajhakukomboka lichaa lelelalela pannobholila Yecho, “Mwana gwino amela ghome.” Bhahe, jwenio na nyumba jhake jhoha bhajhakunyeketela Yecho.
4.54: Ikibha nginyililo jhubhele jha kukangacha jhatehila Yecho pahumita ku Yudeya na kujhenda ku Galilaya.

5.1: Pughajhomokila gheniya, Yecho ajhakuhobhoka ku Yeluchalemo ku unyagho ghonge gwa Akayahude.
5.2: Na kwenio ku Yeluchalemo pahina na litangala likolongwa lilikemwa Nnyango gwa Limbelele, pakibha na litanda lilikemwita kwa Kiebulaniya Bethichata pahina na litanda pakibha na udamo nhwano.
5.3: Bhando bhamahele bhakibha muudamo bhibhalwalwa, na bhangalola, na bhibhalemile na bhibhatengwike.
5.4: Bhando bhubhalendila mache ghatimbughanwe, nhwalo ntumiche jwa kunane kwa Chapanga ahikita kutimbughana mache. Jwalwalwa jhojhoha jwalongolela kutumbukila mu mache ghughatimbughinwe, alamita ulwalo ghoghoha gwabhii nako.
5.5: Bhahe, peniya pakibha na mundo jhumo jwakibha alwalwita ulwalo gwa kutenguka kwa yaka makome matato na nane.
5.6: Yecho pammonita jwalwalwa jwenio agholwike peniya, akamanye akibha alwalwita kwa machiko ghamahele, peniya ajhakunkonya jwalwalwa jhola, “Bho, mwipala kulama?”
5.7: Jwalwalwa jhola ajhakunnyanguu, “Bhambo, nenga ngwete ndeka mundo jwakunyingii mu litanda pubhatimbukana mache. Kila punijhigha kutumbukila, mundo jhonge alongalile.”
5.8: Peniya Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Jhema, tola mpacha gwino, nnyende.”
5.9: Papa peniya mundo jhola ajhakulama, ajhakutola mpacha gwake nu kujhenda. Kilebhe chenje kitendika Lichiko lya Kupomolela lya Akayahude.
5.10: Nhwalo gwenio Akakolo bha Akayahude bhajhakunnobholela mundo jwalamichwe jhola, “Deleno Lichiko lya Kupomolela, lilaghalikilo likanakiya kutola mpacha gwino.”
5.11: Nambo mundo jwenio ajhakwajhanguu, “Mundo jwanamiche jhola ndi jwannobholila, ‘Tola mpacha gwino na nnyende.’ ”
5.12: Bhahe, bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, ndi mundo ghane jwanobholile mwenga ntole mpacha gwino nnyende?”
5.13: Nambo mundo jhola jwalamichwe akahumanyi jhe Yecho akibha ghane, nhwalo bhando bhakibha bhamahele na Yecho akabhokite mandahe.
5.14: Pighapetita gheniya, Yecho ajhakummona jhola jwanamiche pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, ajhakunnobholela, “Jhokanikiya, ngoheno nnamite. Nkotoka kubhujhila kuhenga uhakaho kabhele, anda ntehi uhakaho nakipambalakana kilebhe kibhoho kupeta cheneche.”
5.15: Peniya mundo jhola ajhakujhenda kwalobholela ilongoche ya Akayahude kubhehe Yecho ndi jwanamiche.
5.16: Nhwalo Yecho akahengite kilebhe chenie Lichiko lya Kupomolela, Akayahude bhajhakutumbula kunchimwa.
5.17: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Tate gwango ahenga mahengo machiko ghoha na nenga helahela imbala henga.”
5.18: Kwa nhwalo gwa malobhe gheniya, ilongoche ya Akayahude bhapaliya ndela bhankome Yecho, chi kwa nhwalo akalipuchite Lilaghalikilo lya Lichiko lya Kupomolela tugha, nambo nhwalo akankemite Chapanga ndi Tate mundo, na ajhakukiwananicha alandine na Chapanga. Ukindendeke gwa Mwana gwa Mundo
5.19: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ninnobholela chakaka, Mwana ihoto ndeka kuhenga kilebhe chochoha kanjika chake, Mwana ihotola kuhenga chela chamwona Tate mundo akihenga, nhwalo chahenga Tate, helahela Mwana ihenga.”
5.20: Nhwalo Tate impala Mwana, na unangiya kila kilebhe chahenga jwenio. Peniya nanangiya ilebhe ikolongwa kupeta henge, na mangota nankangacha.
5.21: Ngita Tate chabhayoha bhubhawile na kwapela ughome, helahela Mwana abhapela ughome bhando bhabhapahile.
5.22: Na kabhele Tate ahuadabu jhe mundo jhojhoha, nambo ampela Mwana ukindendeke gwa kwahadabuu bhando bhoha,
5.23: kupala bhando bhoha bhanyokanikiye Mwana ngita chibhanyokanikiya Tate. Mundo jhojhoha jwakana kunyokanikiya Mwana, ankana Tate jwandumita.
5.24: “Ninnobholela chakaka, jwajhoha lilobhe lyango, na kunyeketela jhola jwandumita, abhii na ughome gwa machiko ghoha. Na jwenio nahadabulwa ndeka nhwalo ajhombwike kuhumii mu kuwegha na kujhingii muughome.
5.25: Ninnobholela chakaka, lichiko libhii kuhika, na ngoheno lihikite, bhando bhubhawile nabhalijhoha lilobhe lya Mwana gwa Chapanga, na bhala bhubhapala kujhoha nabhabha na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
5.26: Ngita Tate chabhii lihembuko lya ughome, helahela anteii Mwana mundo lihembuko lya ughome.
5.27: Kabhele ampekiye ukindendeke gwa kuhadabula nhwalo jwenio Mwana gwa Mundo.
5.28: Nkotoka kukangacha kwa malobhe ghanga, nhwalo lichiko libhii kuhika bhubhawile bhoha bhubhabhii mu mambe nabhajhoha lilobhe lyake,
5.29: nabhayoka kuhumii mu mambe yabhe, bhala bhubhatehi ghambone na kubhehe na ughome, nambo bhala bhubhatei uhakaho nabhayoka na kuhadabulwa. Bhando bhinnongelela Yecho
5.30: “Nenga nihoto ndeka kuhenga lihengo kwa uhotolo gwango namwete. Nihadabula ngita chinaghalikiwe kuhumii kwa Tate, nihadabuu chakaka. Nhwalo nihenga ndeka chinipala, nihenga chela chapala jwandumita.”
5.31: Punikilobholela malobhe ghango namwete, malobhe ghango ndi ghuwange.
5.32: Nambo abhii jhonge jwalongela malobhe panane jhango, nimanya kila kilebhe chalongela ndi chakaka.
5.33: Mangota mwenga makatumite bhando bhajhende kwa Yohane Mbatichajhe, na malobhe ghango ghalongila ndi gha chakaka.
5.34: Nipala ndeka mundo jhonge alongela panane jhango, nambo nilonge ghanga nipala mangota mwenga nghombokoke.
5.35: Yohane akibha ngita kolobohi jhijhaka na kulangala ndaa, na mangota mkahagwile machiko ghandina gha kuhanganila.
5.36: Nambo nenga namwete malobhe ghighanjimulila makolongwa kupeta ghala gha Yohane. Nhwalo lihengo limbekiwe na Tate nijhomole lihengo linihenga, ndi inangiya hotuhotu Tate jwandumite.
5.37: Tate jwandumita helahela ulongela malobhe ghango. Mukajhohine jhe lilobhe lyake amu kummona pamiho jhake chipabhii,
5.38: na malobhe ghake ghatama jhe nkate jhino, nhwalo mukanyeketii ndeka jhola jwandumita.
5.39: Mangota mughachoma hake Majhandiko gha Chapanga pimihambuka nkate jhake napata ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta, kone Majhandiko gheniya gha Chapanga ndi ghighalonge malobhe ghango!
5.40: Nambo mangota mipala jhe kuhika kwa nenga mme na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
5.42: Nambo nimmanya mangota, nkwete jhe upalo gwa Chapanga kumiojho jhino.
5.43: Nenga ihikite kwa ukindendeke gwa Tate gwango mingana kumbokela, nambo mundo jhonge anda ahikite kwa ukindendeke gwake jwenio, namupokela.
5.44: Bhole, nahotola kunyeketela kone mangota mipala kukikweya mabhene, nambo mwikana kupokela chipwa kuhumii kwa Chapanga jwenio?
5.45: Nkotoka kuwachila nenga nanipyambanikiya kwa Tate. Mucha jhumuhobholela mangota ndi jhojho natakalila.
5.46: Anda chakaka ngamunyeketela Mucha, ngaunyeketile na nenga hele, nhwalo Mucha akajhandike malobhe panane jhango.
5.47: Nambo anda mughajheketela ndeka ghala ghighajhandikwe na Mucha, nanhotola bhole kughajheketela malobhe ghango?”

6.1: Pajhomolila kulonge gheniya, Yecho ajhakujhomboka kwiye jha lilabha lya ku Galilaya, helahela likemwa lilabha lya Tibeliya.
6.2: Lilongo likolongwa lya bhando lijhakunkengama Yecho nhwalo bhakalolite nginyililo yatehila ya kwalamicha bhibhalwalwa.
6.3: Yecho ajhakukwela ku kitombe, ajhakutama pahe kwenio pamonga na bhabholwa bhake.
6.4: Unyagho gwa Pachaka jha Akayahude ukibha ubhandikile.
6.5: Bhahe, Yecho palyangatika ajhakubhona lilongo likolongwa lya bhando libhii titili likanhikilila, ajhakunkonya Filipu, “Bho, natuhemela kojhe chakulye bhando bhamba?”
6.6: Yecho alongila naha anyighe Filipu, nhwalo akamanye chakuhenga.
6.7: Filipu ajhakunnyanguu, “Imbembela ya mbijha makome mabhele gha madine gha feza ghakwela jhe kuhemelela mabumunda kila mundo.”
6.8: Jhumo pakate jha bhabholwa bhake liina lyake Anduleya, unung'una mundo Simone Petile, ajhakunnobholela Yecho,
6.9: “Abhii pamba nchongolo, jwakwete mabumunda nhwano gha chayile na homba ibhele, nambo nabhajhukuta bhole bhando kwa ilebhe henge yandina?”
6.10: Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Mwatamike bhando pahe mwihibhogha ibhogha.” Peniya pakibha na manyahe titili bhahe, bhando bhoha bhakahikii elufo nhwano, bheniya akanalome tugha.
6.11: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakutola mabumunda gha chayile, na ajhakunchenguu Chapanga, na kwabhaghanichila bhando bhubhatamite pahe. Na homba ajhakuhibhaghanichila ibhogha yoha hele ngita chibhapalita.
6.12: Bhando bhoha bhajhukuta, Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Nnyolangane mahighiliko ghighahighilike changahobhelela chochoha.”
6.13: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhajhakujhola mahighiliko gha mabumunda gha chayile bhajhakutwelela ichukilo kome na ibhele ya mahighiliko.
6.14: Bhando bhoha pubhalolita nginyililo itehilwa na Yecho bhajhakulonge, “Chakaka jhonjo ndi nnondole jwalongilwa nahika pannema pano!”
6.15: Yecho akamanye bhando bhipala bhantende munahota nkolongwa kwa likakala, peniya ajhakujhenda ku katombe kanjika. Yecho ityanga panane jha mache Matei 14:22-33; Maluku 6:45-52
6.16: Pulitipika lyobha, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakuhuluka ade ku lilabha,
6.17: bhajhakujhingila mungalabha na kujhomboka lilabha bhajhakujhenda ade ku Kapelenaumo. Pakibha na lubhendo na Yecho amela anakongana nako jhe.
6.18: Lilabha lijhakutumbuu kutimbuka nhwalo gwa upepo nkolongwa ghupoghita.
6.19: Bhabholwa bhake pubhatyangita utale gwa maile itatu amu ncheche, bhajhakummona Yecho ityanga panane jha mache, akibhandikila ngalabha, bhabholwa bhajhakujhoghopa hake.
6.21: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhapata bhayungii Yecho mungalabha, papalapala ngalabha ikahikite pandumba pibhajhahwila. Bhando bhimpalaha Yecho
6.22: Kilabho jhake lilongo likolongwa lya bhando likahighilike kwiye jha lilabha bhakamanye ibhii ngalabha jhimo tugha. Na bhakamanye Yecho akajhingi jhe mungalabha na bhabholwa bhake, nambo bhabholwa bhake bhakajhenda kanjika chabhe.
6.23: Na ngalabha henge ijhakujhonjekeka kuhumii ku Tibeliya ijhakuhika pahina na pala lilongo likolongwa lya bhando pubhalila mabumunda, Bhambo panombita Chapanga.
6.24: Bhahe, bhando bheniya pibhang'amwila kubhehe Yecho na bhabholwa bhake bhabhii jhe peniya, bhajhakujhingii mungalabha na kujhenda ku Kapelenaumo kwapalaha. Yecho ndi chakulya cha ughome
6.25: Bhando pibhamonita Yecho kwiye jha lilabha bhajhakunkonya, “Mmola, mwenga nhwikite ligha kongone?”
6.26: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Ninnobholela chakaka, chiumbalakiya chi nhwalo mukahwene nginyililo, nhwalo gwa mabumunda ghukapita ghala nu kujhukuta.
6.27: Nkotoka kukipikiya miho chakulya chikibhola, nambo mukipikihi miho chakulya chikitamikiya na kileta ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta. Mwana gwa Mundo napelangana mangota chakulya chenie, nhwalo Tate Chapanga anangiye kunhaghula na kunyeketela.”
6.28: Peniya bhajhakunkonya Yecho, “Bho, tuhenge nike tuhoto kuhenga ghala ghapala Chapanga tuhenge?”
6.29: Yecho pajhangwila, “Chenje ndi chapala Chapanga mukihenge, munyeketele jhola jwatumita.”
6.30: Bhahe, bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, natenda nginyililo ghane tupala tulole na twenga tunyeketele? Bho, naunhenga nike?
6.31: Akahoko bhito bhakalile chakulya chikikemitwa mana kunjenga, ngita chighalonge Majhandiko gha Chapanga, ‘Akabhapekiye libumunda lilihulwika kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga.’ ”
6.32: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ninnobholela chakaka, chi Mucha jwakampeki libumunda kuhumi kunane kwa Chapanga, nambo Tate gwango ndi jwapekiya mabumunda gha chakaka kuhumi kunane.
6.33: Nhwalo libumunda lya Chapanga ndi ghola ghuhulwika kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga na kwapela ughome bhando bha pannema.”
6.34: Bhahe, bhajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, machiko ghoha mutupela libumunda lya machiko ghoha.”
6.35: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Nenga ndi chakulya chikileta ughome. Bhala bhubhahika kwa nenga nabhabhehe ng'o na njala na jhola jwanyeketela nabhehe ng'o na nyota jha mache kabhele.
6.36: Ngita chininnobholila umwene nambo minyekete jhe.
6.37: Bhoha bhampela Tate nabhahika kwa nenga, mundo jhojhoha jwahika kwa nenga nanimmenga ng'o.
6.38: Uhulwike kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga chi kuhenga ghinipala namwete, nambo kutenda ghapala jhola jwandumita.
6.39: Jhola jwandumita apala naha, ngotoka kuhobhecha hilu jhumo pakate jha bhala bhambekiye, nambo nayokecha bhoha mukuwegha lichiko lya mwicho.
6.40: Nhwalo chapala Tate gwango kila mundo jwamona Mwana na kunyeketela nabhaha na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta, na nenga naniyokecha lichiko lya mwicho.”
6.41: Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakutumbu kukokolekeya nhwalo akalongi, “Nenga ndi libumunda lilihuluke kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga.”
6.42: Na bhene bhajhakulonge, “Bho, jhonjo Yecho chi mwana gwa Uchupo ndeka tate na majhe mundo twamanye? Ahoto bhole kulonge ahulwike kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga?”
6.44: Abhii ndeka mundo jwahoto kuhika kwa nenga, ngita Tate jwandumite chaunhutila kwa jwenio, na nenga nanihyokecha mundo jwenio lichiko lya mwicho.
6.45: Milondole bha Chapanga bhajhandikwe, ‘Bhando bhoha nabhabholwa na Chapanga.’ Kila mundo jwannyokanikiya Tate na kukibhola kuhumii kwa jwenio, nahika kwa nenga.
6.46: Abhii jhe mundo jhojhoha jwamwene Tate nga jhola jwahumila kwa Chapanga, ndi jwenio tugha jwamwene Tate.
6.47: Ninnobholela chakaka, mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketela abhii na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
6.49: Akahoko bhino bhakalile mana kunjenga, nambo bhakawile.
6.50: Nambo lende ndi libumunda lilihulwike kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga, jhojhoha jwalyegha nahwejhe.
6.51: Nenga ndi libumunda lya ughome lilihulwike kuhumii kunane kwenio. Mundo jhojhoha anda alile, nabhaha na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta. Na libumunda ndi yegha jhango, jhinipiya kwa nhwalo gwa bhando bha pannema bhoha bhabhehe na ughome.”
6.52: Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakutumbuu kutaungana kwa lilaka pakate jhabhe, “Bho, mundo jhonjo nahotola bhole kutupekeya yegha yake tulyeghe?”
6.53: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Chakaka ninnobholela, na kulye jhe yegha jha Mwana gwa Mundo na kunywegha miyahe jhake, ughome nahubhehe jhe nkate jhino.
6.54: Mundo jhojhoha jwalyegha yegha jhango na kunywegha miyahe jhango abhii na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta, na nenga nanihyokecha lichiko lya mwicho.
6.55: Nhwalo yegha yango ndi ndalilo jha chakaka, na miyahe jhango ndi kinywelekelo chakaka.
6.56: Mundo jhojhoha jwalyegha yegha jhango na kunywe miyahe jhango, jwenio natama nkate jhango, na nenga nitama nkate jhake.
6.57: Ngita Tate jwabhii na ughome andumite, na nenga nitama kwa nhwalo gwake, helahela mundo jwalyegha yegha jhango nalama kwa nhwalo jha nenga.
6.58: Bhahe, chenje ndi chakulya chikihulwike kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga, chi ngita mana ibhalila akahokolo bhino na bhajhakuwegha. Nambo mundo jwalyegha libumunda lende nabhaha na ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.”
6.59: Yecho alongila malobhe gheniya pabholita munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude ku Kapelenaumo. Malobhe ghighaleta ughome gwa machiko ghoha
6.60: Bhahe, bhando bhamahele pakate jha bhabholwa bhake pubhajhohina malobhe gheniya, bhajhakulonge “Mabholo ghanga ghanonwipe! Bho, ghane nahotola kughajheketela?”
6.61: Yecho akamanye kubhehe bhabholwa bhake bhatehila kukokoleka panane jha malobhe gheniya, bhahe, ajhakwakonya, “Bho, nhwalo gwa nike mabholo ghanga ghauhengelecha mwojho?
6.62: Naibhaha bhole, pala pumpapala kummona Mwana gwa Mundo akikelebhuka kwahumila kunane kwa Chapanga?
6.63: Uhuke gwa Chapanga ndi jwaleta ughome, nambo likakala lya mundo kilebhe nacho. Malobhe gheniya ghuninnobholela ghihuma kwa Uhuke gwa Chapanga na ghileta ughome gwa machiko ghoha gwangapeta.
6.64: Nambo bhange pakate jhino bhanyekete jhe.” Yecho alongela gheniya akamanye kuhumii makacho bhala bhangannyeketela, na hele jhola jwapala kunyambila.
6.65: Yecho ajhendilila kulonge, “Kwa nhwalo ghongo nikannobholile abhii jhe mundo jwapala kuhotola kuhika kwa nenga ade atangatilwe na Tate gwango.”
6.66: Bhahe, kwa nhwalo gwa malobhe gheniya, pakate jha bhabholwa bhala bhamahele kuhengeleka mwojho, na bhakankengime jhe kabhele.
6.67: Yecho ajhakwakonya bhabholwa bhake kome na bhabhele bhala, “Na mangota mwenga mipala kubhoka helahela?”
6.68: Simone Petile ajhakujhanguu, “Bhambo, na tujhenda kwa ghane? Mwenga milongela malobhe gha ughome gwa machiko ghoha gwangapeta.
6.69: Twenga tujheketile na tumanyite mwenga ndi Mwanyahinyahi jhuhumii kwa Chapanga.”
6.70: Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Bho, nikahaghuline ndeka mangota kome na bhabhele? Nambo jhumo pakate jhino ndi Limbembela!”
6.71: Malobhe gheniya Yecho alongila panane jha Yuda, mwana gwa Simone Isikaliote, pakate jha bhala bhabholwa kome na bhabhele ndi jhonjo jwapala kunyambila Yecho.

7.1: Pughajhomokila gheniya, Yecho atyangita kwenio ku Galilaya, akapahi jhe kujhenda ku Yudeya, nhwalo gwa bhakolo bha Akayahude bhapala kunkoma.
7.2: Unyagho ghumo gwa Akayahude ghunkemwa unyagho gwa Ichimba ukabhandikile.
7.3: Akalongo mundo Yecho bhajhakunnobholela, “Mmoke pamba na nnyende ku Yudeya, bhibhankengama bhakalolekeye mahengo ghimihenga.
7.4: Abhii jhe mundo jwaitenda ilebhe kwa kukihiya anda apala amanyikane pa bhando. Mwenga muhenga mahengo ghanga, mukilangiye palonge jha bhando bhoha!”
7.5: Helahela na akalongo mundo bhakannyeketile jhe.
7.6: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Lichiko lyango lyamaha lyamela lyanahika jhe, nambo kwino mangota kila lichiko telatela.
7.7: Bhando bha nnema ghongo bhahoto jhe kunchimwa mangota, nambo nenga bhanjimwite nhwalo gwa kwalobholela ilebhe yubhatenda yambone jhe.
7.8: Mangota nnyendengane tugha kuunyagho gwenio. Nenga nijhenda jhe kuunyagho gwenio, nhwalo lichiko lyango lyambone lyamela.”
7.9: Alongila malobhe gheniya, peniya ajhakuhighalika koko ku Galilaya. Yecho pa unyagho gwa ichimba
7.10: Akalongo mundo pubhajhahwila kuunyagho gwenio, na jwenio Yecho helahela ajhakujhenda kwenio, nambo akilangiya jhe hotuhotu nambo akajhahwi kwa kugwala.
7.11: Pa unyagho gwenio bhakolo bha Akayahude bhakibha bhampaliya Yecho, na bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, abhii kojhe mundo jhola?”
7.12: Kuhumi pa likunde lela pajhakubhehe mbwepombwepo yamahele panane jha Yecho. Na bhange bhalongila, “Ndi mundo jhonjo jwaumbone hake.” Na bhange bhalongila, “Nahijhe, jwenio abhahobhecha bhando.”
7.13: Nambo abhii jhe mundo jwakalongile hotuhotu panane jha Yecho, nhwalo bhajhogwipa bhakolo bha Akayahude.
7.14: Unyagho gwenio puheghelila kujhomokela, Yecho ajhakujhingila pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, na kutumbuu kubhola.
7.15: Bhahe, bhakolo bha Akayahude bhajhakukangacha na kulonge, “Bho, mundo jhonjo apatite koo mabholo ghanga na jwenio anabholwa jhe na mundo jhojhoha?”
7.16: Peniya Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Mabholo ghinibhola ghango jhe, ghahuma kwa jhola jwandumita.
7.17: Mundo jwapala kuhenga ghala ghapala Chapanga, namanya ngita mabholo ghango ghihumi kwa Chapanga, amu nilonge kwa ukindendeke gwango namwete.
7.18: Jwenio jwabombolokana ipalaha kukikweya jwenio, nambo jwapalaha chipwa kwa jhola jwandumite, jwenio ndi jwantembekeya, na nkate jhake ubhii jhe uwange ghoghoha.
7.19: Bho, Mucha akapehi ndeka Lilaghalikilo? Pamonga na gheniya, abhii jhe hilu jhumo pakate jhino jwakamwile Lilaghalikilo. Kilebhe ghane chiumbala kungomela?”
7.20: Lilongo lya bhando bhajhakunyangula, “Mwenga ntehi kuchikilwa michuka! Ghane jwapala kunkoma mwenga?”
7.21: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Nakatehi kikangacho chimo na mangota mikangacha.
7.22: Mucha akanaghalikiye majhingiye yana hino jando, pamo na Mucha amu akahoko bhino bhakatumbuliche lilaghalikilo lyenio, na mabhene kujhingii jando mwana Lichiko lya Kupomolela.
7.23: Bhahe, anda kujhingii jando mwana Lichiko lya Kupomolela lya Akayahude nhwalo gwa kulikamula lilaghalikilo lya Mucha kilebhe ghane chumbihikiya miho nduu, kunamicha mundo Lichiko lya Kupomolela?
7.24: Nkotoka kuhadabula kwa kunolekeya pamiho tugha, nambo ntende luhadabulo lwa mbone.” Yecho Kilichitu ndi Nkomboche jwatumitwe na Chapanga
7.25: Bhahe, bhando bhange bha ku Yeluchalemo bhajhakutumbu kukikonya, “Bho, jhola mundo ilongoche jhubhapala kunkoma jhonjo jhe?
7.26: Dolokeya abhii pamba! Abhapwatalila pakongoloho, abhii jhe hilu mundo jwannobholela lilobhe. Bho, ilongoche bhito bhamanye kubhehe jhonjo ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche?
7.27: Nambo Kilichitu papala kuhika abhii jhe mundo jwapala kumanya nahumila kojhe, nambo twenga tumanya kwahumii mundo jhonjo.”
7.28: Bhahe, Yecho pabholita pa Nyumba jha Chapanga ajhakulonge kanonoha, “Bho, chakaka umanye na umanye kuhumile? Ihikite jhe kwa ukindendeke gwango namwete, nambo jhola jwandumita nenga ndi jwa chakaka. Mangota umanyi jhe,
7.29: nambo nenga nimanya nhwalo nihuma kwa jwenio, na jwenio ndi jwandumite.”
7.30: Peniya bhando bhajhakupala kunkamula, nambo abhii jhe mundo jwakatondobhiye lubhoko lwake kunkamula, nhwalo lichiko lyake likibha lyamela.
7.31: Nambo bhando bhamahele kubhoke palilongo lya bhando bhakanyeketile, bhalongila, “Kilichitu Nkomboche pahika, bho, natenda nginyililo kupeta yatehila mundo jhonjone?” Akalonda bhitumwa kunkamula Yecho
7.32: Mapwalichayo bhajhakujhoha bhando bhakipwepa malobhe panane jha Yecho. Bhahe, akapiya Matambiko na Mapwalichayo bhajhakwatuma akalonda bha Nyumba jha Chapanga bhakapyeneneke Yecho.
7.33: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Natama na mangota kwa machiko ghandina tugha, peniya nanyenda kwa jhola jwandumita.
7.34: Naumbalaha, nambo naummona ndeka, nhwalo nauhoto jhe kuhika pala pumii nenga.”
7.35: Akakolo bha Akayahude bhalongila bhene kwa bhene, “Bho, mundo ojho najhenda kojhe ade natuhotola jhe kumona kabhele? Bho, najhenda kwa Akayahude bhubhapechingine pakate jha miche jha Akagilike, na kwabhola Akagilike?
7.36: Nhwalo gwa nike alongila, ‘Naumbalaha, nambo naumona ndeka, nhwalo nauhoto jhe kuhika pala pumii nenga?’ ” Lukemba lwa mache lululeta ughome
7.37: Lichiko lya kujhomolela unyagho gwenio likibha lichiko likolongwa. Yecho ajhakujhema, ajhakulonge kwa lilobhe likolongwa, “Mundo jhojhoha jwabhii na nyota ahike kwa nenga anyweghe.
7.38: Ngita chighalonge Majhandiko gha Chapanga, ‘Mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketela nenga, ngemba ya mache ileta ughome naghakokola kuhumii nkate jhake.’ ”
7.39: Yecho palongila malobhe gha Uhuke gwa Chapanga, bhubhapala kumpokela bhando bhala bhubhannyeketile. Ade lichiko lyenio bhando bhakapokii jhe Uhuke gwa Chapanga. Nhwalo Yecho akibha amela analombwa jhe na Chapanga. Kupechengana kwa bhando
7.40: Bhando bhange pakate jha lilongo lela bhakajhohine malobhe gheniya, bhajhakulonge, “Chakaka mundo jhonjo ndi jhola nnondole jwa Chapanga!”
