7.41: Na bhange bhajhakulonge, “Jhojhone ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche!” Nambo na bhando bhange bhajhakukikonya, “Bho, Kilichitu Nkomboche ihoto kubhelukilwa ku Galilaya?
7.42: Bho, Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghakalongii jhe, Kilichitu nahumila kulukolo lwa munahota nkolongwa Daude, na nabhelukila ku muche gwa ku Betelehemo, kwatamita Daude!”
7.43: Bhahe, bhando bhajhakupechangana nhwalo gwa Yecho.
7.44: Bhando bhange bhapata kunkamula, nambo abhii jhe jwakajhighite kunkamula. Ilongoche bha Kiyahude bhikana kunyeketela Yecho
7.45: Akalonda bha Nyumba jha Chapanga pibhakelehwika, akapiya Matambiko na Mapwalichayo bhajhakwakonya, “Bho, nhwalo gwa nike munkamwii jhe Yecho na kuhika nako pamba?”
7.46: Akalonda bhala bhajhakujhanguu, “Akibha jhe mundo jwahotwila kulonge kupeta mundo jhonjo!”
7.47: Bhahe, Mapwalichayo bhajhakwakonya, “Bho, na mangota helahela ankolwiye?”
7.48: “Bho, abhii kilongoche amu Pwalichayo jhumo jhumumwene anyeketile?
7.49: Nahijhe bhalimanyiti jhe Lilaghalikilo lya Mucha lilongo lene, nambo peniya alapanikiwe na Chapanga!”
7.50: Nikodemo, jhola jwannyendila Yecho, akibha jhumo jwa Mapwalichayo bhubhakibha peniya. Bhahe, ajhakwalobholela,
7.51: Lilaghalikilo lito lilongela, tuhoto ndeka kuhadabuu mundo jhojhoha anda na kunyokanikii jhe na kumanya alemwite nike.
7.52: Na bhene bhajhakunyangula, “Bho, na mwenga hele jwa koko ku Galilaya? Mukalingukiye Majhandiko gha Chapanga, naumanya abhii jhe nnondole jwa Chapanga jwahumii ku Galilaya.”

8.1: Pughajhomokila gheniya, Yecho ajhakujhenda ku Kitombe cha ku Micheitune.
8.2: Kilabho jhake putiputi ajhakujhenda kabhele pa Nyumba jha Chapanga. Bhando bhoha bhajhakuntindila Yecho, na jwenio ajhakutama pahe na kutumbuu kwabhola.
8.3: Bhahe, bhabhola bha Malaghalikilo na Mapwalichayo bhajhakunnetela mwikeghe jhumo jwankamwilwe akihenga ngongola. Na kunyemeka palonge jhabhe.
8.4: Peniya, bhajhakunnobholela Yecho, “Mmola, mwikeghe jhonjo tunkamwii akihenga ngongola.
8.5: Mulilaghalikilo lito, Mucha akatulaghalikii naha, mwikeghe ngita jhonjo akong'ondwe maghanga ade ahweghe. Ngohe mwenga milonge bhole?”
8.6: Bhalongila naha bhanyonje Yecho bhabhehe na kihokola cha kuntakalila. Nambo Yecho ajhakulita, na kutumbuu kujhandika pahe kwa lukonje lwake.
8.7: Pubhajhendelila kunkonya, Yecho ajhakujhinuka na kwalobholela, “Mundo jhojhoha jwangabhehe na uhakaho pakate jhino atumbule kunkong'onda lighanga.”
8.8: Peniya Yecho ajhakulita kabhele na kujhandika pahe.
8.9: Bhando bhala pubhajhohina malobhe gheniya, bhajhakutumbu kupechengana jhumojhumo, bhatumbwila ighogholo kubhoka. Ajhakuhighalika Yecho na mwikeghe jhola ajhemite papa.
8.10: Yecho pajhinuka, ajhakunkonya mwikeghe jhola, “Bho majhe, bhando bhibhakamwila bhala bhabhii kojhe? Bho, abhii jhe hilu mundo jhumo jwahadabwile?”
8.11: Mwikeghe jhola ajhakujhanguu, “Bhambo, abhii jhe mundo jwahadabwile.” Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nenga helahela ninhadabu ndeka. Nnyende nambo nkotoka kuhenga kabhele uhakaho.” Yecho ndi lumule lwa nnema
8.12: Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhando kabhele, “Nenga ndi lumule lwa bhando bha pannema. Mundo jhojhoha jwangengama nenga natyange jhe mulubhendo, nambo nabhaha na lumule lwa ughome.”
8.13: Bhahe, Mapwalichayo bhajhakunnobholela, “Malobhe ghino mikilongelele mabhene tugha, malobhe ghimilonge gha chakaka ndeka.”
8.14: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Anda nikilongolile panane jhango namwete, malobhe ghango gha chakaka nhwalo manyite kunihuma na kunijhenda. Nambo mangota kibhii jhe chiumanya kojhe kunijhenda na kojhe kunihumila.”
8.15: Mangota mihadabu ngita bhando chibhahadabu, nambo nenga ninhadabu jhe mundo.
8.16: Nambo anda nihadabula, nihadabuu chakaka, nhwalo nihadabuu jhe kanjika, Tate jwandumita abhii pamonga na nenga.
8.17: Ijhandikwe Mulilaghalikilo lino bhando bhabhele bhilonge kwa kujheketelana chibhakihwene, bhahe, lilobhe lyenio ndi uchakaka.
8.18: Nenga nikilongelela chakaka namwete malobhe ghango na Tate jwandumita helahela inongelela chakaka panane jhango.
8.19: Bhahe, bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, Tate gwino abhii kojhe?” Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Umanyite jhe nenga hilu Tate gwango. Ngaumanya nenga, helahela ngamumanyite Tate gwango.”
8.20: Yecho alongila malobhe gheniya pakibha abholita pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, pahina na kihukilo cha mbijha. Akapitii jhe mundo jwa kunkamula nhwalo lichiko lyake likibha lyamela. Mihoto jhe kujhenda kola kunijhenda
8.21: Yecho ajhakwalobholela kabhele, “Nenga ndenda kukibhokela, mangota naumbalaha, nambo nauhwa nako uhakaho gwino. Kunijhenda nenga mangota mihoto jhe kuhika.”
8.22: Bhahe, ilongoche ya Akayahude ijhakulonge, “Ilonge ihoto jhe kujhenda kwajhenda bho, apala kukikoma jwenio?”
8.23: Nambo Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mangota bha pannema pano jhibhii pahe, nambo nenga jwa kunane kwa Chapanga. Mangota bhando bha pannema ghongo, nambo nenga jwa pannema pano jhe.
8.24: Kwa nhwalo ghongo nikannobholile nauhwa muwakaho gwino. Changanyeketela, ‘Nenga ndi Jhumile.’ Nauhwa muuhakaho gwino.”
8.25: Bhajhakunkonya Yecho, “Mwe mwa ghane?” Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Nenga ndi Jhojho, ngita chinikannobholile kuhumii makacho.
8.26: Ngwete ghamahele gha kulonge panane jha kuhadabula. Nambo jhola jwandumita jwa chakaka, na chinyohine kuhumii kwa jwenio ndi nikilonge kwa bhando bhoha bha pannema.”
8.27: Bhakamanyi jhe kubhehe Yecho akibha alongila malobhe panane jha Chapanga Tate mundo.
8.28: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Pumipala kuntondobheya Mwana gwa Mundo panchalaba, peniya ndi pumpala kubangatuka, ‘Nenga ndi Jhojho.’ Peniya naumanya nihenga jhe kilebhe chochoha kanjika, nilonge ghala ghamolita Tate gwango.
8.29: Jhola jwandumita tubhii maghumba nde na nenga, annekite jhe kanjika nhwalo machiko ghoha nihenga ghahanganila.”
8.30: Bhando bhamahele bhubhanyokanikiya Yecho palongila malobhe gheniya bhajhakunnyeketela. Mwana gwa Chapanga nanekekeya
8.31: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhala Akayahude bhubhannyeketile, “Anda mughakengama mabholo ghango, na mangota namma bhabholwa bhango chakaka.
8.33: Bhajhakunnyanguu Yecho, “Twenga twakachokolo bha Ulahimo, tunabhejhe akabhanda kwa mundo jhojhoha jhola. Nhwalo gwa nike milonge, ‘Na bho, milonge natulekekewa?’ ”
8.34: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Ninnobholela chakaka, kila mundo jwatenda uhakaho ndi mmanda jwa uhakaho.
8.35: Mmanda ahoto jhe kutamikiya pakajha machiko ghoha, nambo mwana atamikiya pakajha machiko ghoha.
8.36: Mwana gwa Mundo anda anekekiye nanekekeya chakaka.
8.37: Nimanya mangota lukolo lwa Ulahimo. Umbala kungoma nhwalo mughakana mabholo ghango.
8.38: Nenga nilonge ghala ghanangiya Tate gwango, nambo mangota muhenga ghala ghunobholilwe na tate gwino.”
8.39: Bhajhakunyanguu, “Tate gwito Ulahimo.” Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mangota ngamehe yana ya Ulahimo, nganteile ghahengita Tate gwino Ulahimo.
8.40: Nenga ninnobholela chakaka ghala ghinyohine kuhumii kwa Chapanga, nambo mangota mwamela mumbala kungoma. Ulahimo akatehi jhe yenio!
8.41: “Mangota muhenga ghaghala ghala ghatehila tate gwino.” Bhajhakunyanguu, “Twenga twayana ya pakituto jhe, tubhii na Tate gwito ndi Chapanga.”
8.42: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Anda Chapanga ngabhehe Tate gwino, ngaumbahi na nenga, nhwalo na nenga nhumi kwa Chapanga na ngoheno mii pambano. Ikite jhe kwa ukindendeke gwango namwete nambo kwa jhola jwandumita.”
8.43: Nhwalo gwa nike mibangatuka jhe ghuninobholela? Nhwalo mangota mwipala jhe kujhokanikiya malobhe ghango.
8.44: Mangota yana ya tate gwino Limbembela, na muhenga ngita tate gwino chaipala. Kuhumi makacho akakomite bhando, jwenio atamajhe muchakaka nhwalo ubhii jhe uchakaka kwa jwenio. Pailongela uwange alonge ngita chayobhalile, nhwalo ndi jwa uwange na tate jwa uwange ghoha.
8.45: Nhwalo nilongela gha uchakaka, ndi mana mangota minyeketela ndeka.
8.46: Ghane pakate jhino jwahotola kulonge nenga ngwete uhakaho? Anda nilongela chakaka, nhwalo ghane mwinyeketela ndeka?
8.47: Mundo jwa Chapanga ajhokanikiya malobhe gha Chapanga. Nambo mangota mighapala ndeka, nhwalo mangota chi bhando bha Chapanga. Yecho akibha kabula jha Ulahimo
8.48: Akayahude bhajhakunkonya Yecho, “Bho, tukalongii jhe chakaka mwenga kubhehe mwa Samaliya, na hele nkwete nchuka?”
8.49: Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Nenga ngwete jhe nchuka, nenga nintembekeya Tate gwango nambo mangota mitenda jhe yenio.
8.50: Nenga nikipalakihi jhe ung'alicho gwango namwete, amu abhii jhumo jwambalakiya ung'alicho gwenio na jwenio ndi nnyomola mihalo.
8.51: Chakaka ninnobholela, jwachokolekeya mabholo ghango nahwe jhe natama machiko ghoha.”
8.52: Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakunnobholela Yecho, “Ngohe chakaka mwenga nkwete nchuka! Ulahimo na milondole bha Chapanga bhawile, nambo mulonge mundo jhojhoha jwaunyokanilikiya malobhe ghino nahwejhe.
8.53: Bho, mwenga munahota kupeta hoko gwito Ulahimo jwawile? Helahela milondole bha Chapanga bhakawile. Bho, mwenga nchochite kilebhe ghane?”
8.54: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Anda nikikwehite namwete, ukolo gwango kilebhe nacho. Tate gwango jhuminkema Chapanga gwino ndi jwenio jwanomba.
8.55: Mangota mwenga muumanyite jhe, nambo namwete ndi niumanyite. Na anda nongile numanye ndeka, namaha nawange ngita mangota. Nambo nenga nimanye na nikamula lilobhe lyake.
8.56: Tate gwino Ulahimo akahanganii kulibhona lichiko lya kuhika kwango, na jwenio akaliwene, na ajhakuhanganila.”
8.57: Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakunnobholela, “Mwenga, nhwikiche jhe yaka makome nhwano, kojhe, kumumwene Ulahimo?”
8.58: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Chakaka ninnobholela, Ulahimo nakubhelukwa jhe, nenga nikibha.”
8.59: Kwa nhwalo gwa malobhe gheniya, bhajhakulokota maghanga bhapata bhankong'onde Yecho, nambo Yecho ajhakujhobha na kupita panja pa Nyumba jha Chapanga.

9.1: Yecho pakibha apetita muupele mwa ndela, ajhakummona mundo jwangalola kuhumi mukubhelukwa kwake.
9.2: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunkonya, “Mmola, ghane jwatehi uhakaho ade jhonjo abhelwike jwangalola? Mundo jhonjo amu akatate mundo?”
9.3: Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Chi mundo jhonjo amu akatate mundo bhatei uhakaho, nambo ghapitili naha ili limanyikane likakala lya Chapanga likahenga lihengo muughome gwake.
9.4: Nhwalo kwamela muhe tujhendelele kuhenga lihengo lya jhola jwandumita. Kilo kibhikuhika mundo nahotojhe kuhenga lihengo.
9.5: Punibhehe namela pannema, nenga ndi lumule lwa bhando bha pannema.”
9.6: Yecho pajhomolila kulonge gheniya, ajhakuhunii mata pahe, na ajhakuhinyata mandakale na kukilima kumiho kwa jwangalola jhola.
9.7: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Jhenda mukakuwe kumiho jhino ku litanda lya Siloamo.” Siloamo mana jhake “Jwatumitwe.” Bhahe, jwangalola ajhakujhenda na kukuwa kumiho, na peniya pabhujhita kongo abhii kulola.
9.8: Bhahe, bhubhamandikile na bhala bhubhamonita makacho atehila kujhopa jhopa tugha, bhajhakukikonya, “Bho, mundo jhonjo chi ndi jhola jwajhopita?”
9.9: Bhando bhange bhakalongii, “Jhojho ndi jwenio.” Nambo bhange bhalongila, “Jhonjo jhe nambo bhatehi kulandana.” Nambo jwenio ajhakulonge, “Ne ndi jhojhola jhola jhunyopita.”
9.11: Na jwenio ajhakwajhanguu, “Mundo jhola jwakemwa Yecho ajhakuhinyata mandakale na kungilima pamiho, na kunnobholela nyende kulitanda lya ku Siloamu nikakuwe kumiho jhango. Peniya nyakujhenda, papalapala punguhita kumiho jhango nyakulola.”
9.12: Bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, abhii kojhe mundo jwenio?” Na jwenio ajhakwajhanguu, “Nenga manyite jhe kwajhingilile.” Mapwalichayo bhilingukiya chalamichwe jwangalola
9.13: Bhahe, bhajhakumpeleka mundo jwangalola kuhumii makacho kwa Mapwalichayo.
9.14: Lichiko lyenio Yecho pahinyita mandakale na kunnamicha jwangalola jhola, likibha Lichiko lya Kupomolela.
9.15: Bhahe, Mapwalichayo bhajhakunkonya kabhele mundo jwenio pahotwila kulola. Ajhakwajhanguu, “Akangilime mandakale kumiho jhango, na nenga nyakukuwa kumiho jhango, na ngoheno nilola.”
9.16: Mapwalichayo bhange bhajhakulonge, “Mundo jwenio jwatehi naha ahumi ndeka kwa Chapanga, nhwalo akalikengime jhe lilaghalikilo lya Lichiko lya Kupomolela.” Nambo bhange bhalongila, “Bho, mundo jwabhii na uhakaho nahotola bhole kuhenga nginyililo ngita yenio?” Peniya bhajhakupechengana.
9.17: Peniya Mapwalichayo bhajhakunkonya kabhele jwakibha jwangalola jhola, “Milonge anamiche miho ghino. Ngoheno mabhene munchimulila bhole mundo jwenio?” Na jwenio ajhakwajhanguu, “Mundo jwenio ndi nnondole jwa Chapanga.”
9.18: Nambo bhakolo bha Akayahude bhakajheketii ndeka kubhehe mundo jwenio alolita jhe na ngoheno alola, ade bhakakemite akatate mundo.
9.19: Akayahude bhajhakwakonya bhala akatate mundo, “Bho, jhonjo mangota mwana gwino jhumulonge abhelwikwe jwangalola? Na ngohe ahotwi bhole kulola?”
9.20: Akatate mundo bhala bhajhakwajhanguu, “Tumanya chakaka jhonjo mwana gwito, na tumanya akabhelwikwe changalola.
9.21: Nambo tumanyite jhe chahotwila kulola, hilu tumanyite jhe mundo jwannamiche miho ghake. Munkonye hote jwenio, nhwalo ndi nkolongwa, nahotola kunnobholela!”
9.22: Tate na majhe mundo bhalongila naha, nhwalo bhajhogwipa bhakolo bha Kiyahude na kabhele bhakolo bhene bhakalaghine kubhehe mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketila Yecho ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche nabhamengela panja kuhumii mu Nyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude.
9.23: Ndi nhwalo tate na majhe mundo bhalongila naha, “Jwenio nkolongwa, munkonye jwenio!”
9.24: Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakunkema kabhele jwakibha abhelwikwe jwangalola jhola, bhajhakunnobholela, “Mukilapanikiye kwa Chapanga anda milonge chakaka! Twenga tumanya kubhehe mundo jwannamiche jhola abhii na uhakaho.”
9.25: Mundo jwenio ajhakujhanguu, “Anda abhii na uhakaho amu akwetii jhe kwale. Nenga nikimanya kilebhe chimo nikabhelwikwe nangalola, na ngoheno nilola cheche tugha.”
9.26: Peniya bhajhakunkonya kabhele, “Bho, akantendi nike kwino? Akatehi bhole ade kunnamicha miho ghino?”
9.27: Mundo jwenio ajhakwajhanguu, “Ninnobholile njwe, nambo mukapala jhe kunyokanikiya. Nhwalo gwa nike mipala kujhoha kabhele kilebhe chenje? Na mangota helahela mipala kubhehe bhabholwa bhake?”
9.28: Bhahe, bhajhakunnigha maligho bhalongila, “Mwenga ndi mabholwa jwa mundo jwenio, nambo twenga bhabholwa bhake Mucha.
9.29: Twenga tumanye ngita Chapanga akalongile na Mucha, nambo mundo jhonjo tumanyite jhe kwahumile!”
9.30: Na jwenio ajhakwajhanguu, “Mangota mingangacha! Mangota umanyite jhe kwahumii, nambo anamiche miho ghango!
9.31: Tumanye Chapanga abhajhokonikiya ndeka bhando bhubhabhii na uhakaho, nambo Chapanga unyokanikiya mundo jhola jwannyoghopa hake kuhenga chapala ahenge.
9.32: Kuhumii kupanganwa kwa nnema inajhokanikika jhe kubhehe mundo jhojhoha anamiche mundo jwabhelukwe jwangalola.
9.33: Anda mundo jwenio ahumi jhe kwa Chapanga, ngahotwi jhe kuhenga chochoha.”
9.34: Bhajhakunnyanguu, “Mwenga mmelwikwe na kukolela muuhakaho. Nauhotola bhole kutubhola twenga?” Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakumpikiya panja pa Nyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude. Gwangalola gwa mwojho
9.35: Yecho pajhohina malobhe kubhehe jwangalola jhola bhamengite mu Nyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude. Bhahe, pammonita ajhakunkonya, “Bho, mwenga munyeketela Mwana gwa Mundo?”
9.36: Mundo jwenio ajhakukonya, “Bhambo, mundo jwenio ndi ghane? Unobholele mbala kunyeketela!”
9.37: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Ngoheno mumwene, ndi jhonjo jumulonge nako.”
9.38: Bhahe, mundo jhola ajhakulonge, “Bhambo, ninyeketile!” Na jwenio ajhakunyinamila Yecho.
9.39: Yecho ajhakulonge, “Nenga ikite munnema mwenio kwahadabuu bhando, bhangalola bhalole na bhando bhibhalola bhankoto kulola.”
9.40: Mapwalichayo bhange bhubhakibha pamonga na Yecho bhakajhohine palongila naha, bhajhakunkonya “Bho, twenga hele twangalola?”
9.41: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ngamehe mwangalola, ngamonikini jhe mmii na uhakaho, nambo nhwalo miloka milonge twenga tulola, mangota mwamela muuhakaho.”

10.1: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ninnobholela chakaka, mundo jhojhoha anda ajhingii jhe mukibhajha cha mambelele kwa kupete pa nnyango, nambo ajhingila kwa chehemo jwaimanyite jwenio, jwenio ndi mwihe na atenda kupoka.
10.2: Nambo mundo jwajhingila kupete pa nnyango, jwenio ndi nnucha mambelele.
10.3: Nnonda jwa nnyango gwa kibhajha udindulila, na mambelele ulijhokanikiya lilobhe lyake. Na jwenio ughakema mambelele ghake kila jhumo kwa liina lyake, na kwalongocha panja.
10.4: Paghajhogholela mambelele ghake jwenio ulongolela, na ghene mambelele ghakengimila nhwalo bhalimanye lilobhe lyake.
10.5: Nambo mambelele gheniya ghihoto jhe kunkengama mundo jwangaumanya, nabhankana nhwalo bhalimanyite jhe lilobhe lyake.”
10.6: Yecho abhalobhalila nnandanikiho gwenio, nambo bhene bhakamanyite jhe chabhalobhalila. Yecho nnuchajhe jwaumbone
10.7: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwalobholela kabhele, “Ninnobholela chakaka, nenga ndi nnyango gwa kibhajha cha mambelele.
10.8: Bhando bhoha bhubhakalongalile bhakibha akamwihe na bhatenda kupoka, nambo mambelele ghakajhokanikiye ndeka.
10.9: Nenga ndi nnyango. Mundo jhojhoha jwajhingila kwa kupete kwa nenga naghombokoka. Najhingila na kupita, na kubhehe na undinde.
10.10: Mwihe uhika kujhibha, kukoma na kuhangabhana. Nambo nenga ikite kwatenda bhando bhabhehe na ughome gwa chakaka lombilombi.
10.11: “Nenga nnucha jwaumbone. Nnucha jwaumbone ubhoha ughome gwake kwa nhwalo gwa mambelele ghake.
10.12: Mundo jwalucha kwa kulepwa chi nnucha, hilu nkolo mambelele jhe. Palibhona limehe likahika, ughaleka mambelele na kutila. Peniya limehe ughakamula mambelele na kughapechengana.
10.13: Mundo jwenio natila nhwalo mundo jwenio jwa malepo naghahola jhe mambelele gheniya.
10.14: Nenga nnucha jwaumbone. Nighamanya mambelele ghango, na ghene ghamanya nenga,
10.15: ngita Tate chamanya nenga, na nenga nimanye Tate. Na nenga niubhoha ughome gwango kwa nhwalo gwa mambelele.
10.16: Ghabhii mambelele ghange gheniya ghabhii jhe mukibhajha chenje. Helahela nipala kwahaka na kwaleta kwa Chapanga. Helahela na bheniya nabhalijhoha lilobhe lyango, naghabhaha mungumbo ghumo na nnucha jhumo.
10.17: “Tate ambahile ndi nhwalo niubhoha ughome gwango na kabhele naniupokela.
10.18: Abhii jhe mundo nahotola kumboka ughome gwango. Nambo nenga niubhoha namwete kwa kupala kwango. Mi na uhotolo gwa kukibhoha kuwegha na ukindendeke gwa kubhehe na ughome kabhele. Ndi Tate gwango channaghalikiye ndende.”
10.19: Kwa nhwalo gwa malobhe gha Yecho ghajhakwatenda Akayahude bhapechengane kabhele.
10.20: Bhamahena bhajhakulonge, “Atehi kuchikilwa michuka na abhii na ngholoka! Nhwalo gwa nike kunyokanikiya?”
10.21: Nambo bhange bhajhakulonge, “Mundo jwabhii na nchuka ihoto jhe kulonge malobhe naha. Bho, nchuka uhoto kunnamicha mundo jwangalola?” Yecho bhinkana Akayahude
10.22: Kwenio ku Yeluchalemo kukibha na Unyagho gwa kuibheka Nyumba jha Bhambo palonge jha Chapanga, ukibha muda gwa malile.
10.23: Yecho akibha atyangita pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, pa Bwalo jha Chelemane.
10.24: Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakuntindila na kunkonya, “Namutuleka changa umanya ade ligha? Anda mwe ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche, mutulobholele hotuhotu.”
10.25: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Nikanobholile chakaka, nambo mangota minyekete jhe. Mahengo ghinihenga nenga kwa liina lya Tate gwango ghinangiya nenga ndi.
10.26: Nambo mangota minyekete jhe nhwalo mangota mambelele ghango jhe.
10.27: Mambelele ghango ulijhoha lilobhe lyango. Bhamanya na bhene ungengama nenga.
10.28: Nenga nipekeya ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta, na bhene nabhahwe jhe, amu abhii jhe mundo nahotola kumboka mu mabhoko ghango.
10.29: Tate gwango jwambekiye mambelele ghanga ndi nkolongwa kupeta bhoha, abhii jhe mundo jwahotola kumboka kubhoka mu mabhoko gha Tate gwango.
10.30: Nenga na Tate gwango, tubhii maghumba nde.”
10.31: Bhahe, Akayahude bhajhakulokota maghanga kabhele kupala bhankome Yecho,
10.32: nambo Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ninangiye mahengo ghamahele kuhumii kwa Tate. Bho, lihengo ghane lyambone lintenda ungome kwa maghanga?”
10.33: Akayahude bhajhakunnyanguu, “Tunkoma jhe kwa maghanga kwa nhwalo gwa mahengo ghambone, nambo kwa nhwalo gwa kunapanikiya Chapanga! Mwenga mwa mundo tugha, nambo mukilonge ma Chapanga.”
10.34: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Ikajhandikwe jhe mu Lilaghalikilo lino, Chapanga akalongile, ‘Mangota ndi ichapanga.’
10.35: Chapanga akaikemite ichapanga yela bhubhakamanye malobhe ghake, na twenga tumanya kubhehe Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghilonge chakaka machiko ghoha.
10.36: Ngoheno Tate gwango anhagwii na kunduma pannema pano. Nhwalo gwa nike milonge ninighite Chapanga, nhwalo nongile kubhehe nenga ndi Mwana gwa Chapanga?
10.37: Anda nihenga jhe mahengo gha Tate gwango, nkotoka kunnyeketela.
10.38: Nambo anda nihenga jhe mahengo ghake, na mwamela minyekete jhe, mughajheketele mahengo ghango, peniya nabangatuka chakaka anda Tate abhii nkate jhango, na nenga nkate jha Tate.”
10.39: Peniya bhajhakujhigha kumpyeneneka kabhele, nambo Yecho ajhakwanyelembuka mu mabhoko ghabhe na kwaleka.
10.40: Peniya Yecho ajhakujhomboka kabhele kwiye jha lukemba lwa ku Yolodane, kola Yohane kwabatichila bhando na kutama kwenio.
10.41: Bhando bhamahele bhajhakunyendelela Yecho na kunnobholela, “Yohane akatehi jhe nginyililo hilu jhimo, nambo ghoha ghalongila Yohane panane jha mundo jhonjo ndi chakaka chika.”
10.42: Bhando bhamahele bhubhakibha peniya bhajhakunnyeketela Yecho.

11.1: Pakibha na mundo jhumo liina lyake Lachalo, jwabhelwikilwe ku muche gwa ku Betaniya atehila kulwalwa. Na kwenio ku Betaniya bhatamita pamonga na akalombo mundo Macha na Maliya.
11.2: Maliya jwenio ndi jhojho jwampakita mahuta ghighanungila petelele mu magholo gha Bhambo Yecho na kunhunguu kwa majhunjo ghake, na nhwacha mundo Lachalo akibha nga pahe nhwalo atehila kulwalwa.
11.3: Bhahe, akalombo mundo bhoha, bhajhakutuma lilobhe kwa Yecho, bhalongila, “Bhambo, nkoche gwino jhumumpahile abhii nga pahe tugha.”
11.4: Yecho pajhohina tu malobhe gheniya, ajhakulonge, “Ulwalo ghongo naunkome jhe Lachalo, nambo ulwalo ghongo upitile kwa ung'alicho gwa Chapanga, na Mwana gwa Chapanga alombwe kupete ulwalo ghongo.”
11.5: Yecho akabhapahi Macha na nnombo mundo Maliya pamonga na Lachalo.
11.6: Yecho pajhohina Lachalo abhii nga pahe, ajhakujhonjekeya machiko mabhele gha kutama kwenio kwakibha.
11.7: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Tubhujhe kabhele ku Yudeya.”
11.8: Bhabholwa bhala ngabhannobholila, “Mmola, machiko ghandina tugha ghughapetite Akayahude bhapata bhankome kwa maghanga, nhwalo gwa nike mipala kujhenda kabhele kwenio?”
11.9: Yecho ngabhajhangwila, “Bho, muhe ubhii jhe na machaa kome na mabhele? Bhahe, mundo anda atyanga machaa gheniya akobhondoka jhe nhwalo alubhona lumule lwa nnema ghongo.
11.10: Nambo anda mundo atyanga uhiko ukobhondoka, nhwalo ubhii jhe ukalamuhe.”
11.11: Yecho pajhomolila kulonge gheniya, ajhakwalobholela, “Nkoche gwito Lachalo abhii lughono, nambo nanyenda kung'ang'anula.”
11.12: Bhabholwa bhake ngabhannobholila, “Bhambo, anda atehi kugholoka, bhahe, nalama.”
11.13: Yecho alongila naha, mana jhake Lachalo ajhomwike, nambo bhabholwa bhake bhahambwika Lachalo agholwike lughono tugha.
11.15: nambo kwa nhwalo gwenio nihanganila, nhwalo nenga nikibha jhe kwenio kupala nnyeketele. Bhahe, tujhende hote kwatamita.”
11.16: Peniya Tomache, pange akemitwa Mabhela ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhajhake, “Tujhendengane na Mmola, tukawe na Yecho!” Yecho ndi uyokecho na ughome
11.17: Yecho pahikita ku Betaniya, ankolila yegha jha Lachalo ibhekwitwe umambe machiko ncheche ghighapetite.
11.18: Kuhumii pa chenda jha ku Betaniya ade ku Yeluchalemo, utale gwa kilomita itato tugha,
11.19: na Akayahude bhamahele bhajhakujhenda kwapepecha malelo Macha na nnombo mundo Maliya nhwalo gwa kuhwelelwa na nhwacha gwabhe.
11.20: Bhahe, Macha pajhohina Yecho abhii undela kuhika, ajhakujhenda kupengelela koko kundela, nambo Maliya unung'una mundo ajhakuhighalika ukajha.
11.21: Macha ajhakunnobholela Yecho, “Bhambo, ngamehe pamba, nhwacha gwango ngajhomwike ndeka!
11.22: Nambo nimanya, ade ngoheno Chapanga nampela chochoha chumunyopa.”
11.24: Macha nganyangwila, “Nimanya, nayokechwa kabhele lichiko lela Chapanga nabhayokecha bhubhawile.”
11.25: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nenga ndi nayokecha bhando na kwapela ughome gwenio. Mundo jwanyeketela nenga, anda awile abhehe na ughome,
11.26: na kila jwabhii na ughome na kunyeketela, nahwe ng'o. Bho, gheniya mughajheketela?”
11.27: Macha ajhakunyanguu, “Chakaka Bhambo! Nenga nyeketile kubhehe mwenga ndi mwa Kilichitu, Mwana gwa Chapanga, jhuhikite pannema.” Yecho ilela
11.28: Macha pajhomolila kulonge malobhe gheniya, ajhakujhenda nkate kunkema Maliya nnombo mundo pakiyepela, ajhakunnobholela “Mmola ahikite pamba, na atenda kunkema.”
11.29: Maliya pajhohina gheniya, ajhakujhinuka kajhombe na kunyendelela Yecho.
11.30: Yecho akibha amela anajhingii ndeka pachenda, akibha koko kwapengelile Macha.
11.31: Bhahe, Akayahude bhubhakibha nkate bhapepicha Maliya, pubhammonita Maliya ajhinuka kajhombe na kubhoka, bhajhakunkengamila bhahambwika ajhenda kulela ku mambe.
11.32: Bhahe, Maliya pahikita pabhii Yecho na pammonita, ajhakuntamii makilikite na kunnobholela, “Bhambo, ngamehe pamba, nhwacha gwango ngahwii ndeka!”
11.33: Yecho panolokiya Maliya abhii mahole chwii, na bhala Akayahude bhubhalongohine helahela bhabhii mahole tyee, Yecho mwojho gwake ujhakubhehe ngolongonde na ajhakuhechuka.
11.34: Peniya Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Mumekite kojhe?” Bhajhakunyanguu, “Bhambo, nhwike nnole.”
11.37: Nambo bhando bhange bhalongila, “Jhonjone jwakanamiche jwangalola jhola, bho, alepelile nike kunhibhilikiya Lachalo akoto kuwegha?” Yecho iyokecha Lachalo
11.38: Bhahe, Yecho pakibha amela na ungolongonde kabhele kumwojho gwake, ajhakujhenda ade kumambe, mambe jhela ikibha nkwembe, na iyekelilwe kwa lighanga.
11.39: Yecho ngalongila, “Kangila hoko lighanga lende!” Macha, ndi nhwacha mundo jwajhomwike jhola, ajhakulonge, “Bhambo, nambo anunga njii nhwalo, machiko ncheche mukuwe kwake!”
11.40: Peniya Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Bho, nikanobholile jhe anda nnyeketele namubhona ung'alicho gwa Chapanga?”
11.41: Bhahe, bhajhakulikangila lighanga kuhupele. Peniya, Yecho ajhakulola miho ghake kunane, ajhakulonge, “Tate, ninomba nhwalo mwenga unyokinikiya nenga.
11.42: Nimanya machiko ghoha unyokanikiya, nambo nilonge ghanga nhwalo jha bhando bhubhajhemite bhamba, nipala bhanyeketele kubhehe mwenga ndi jhundumita.”
11.43: Yecho pajhomolila kulonge gheniya, ajhakunonoha lilobhe likolongwa ankemita, “Lachalo, mpite panja!”
11.44: Na jwenio jwakawile ajhakupita panja kongo mabhoko na magholo ghake ghabhilingilwe chanda ade kumiho. Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Mumopole ngobho yenio, na muneke ajhende.” Akayahude bhitenda nginyika jha kunkoma Yecho Matei 26:1-5; Maluku 14:1-2; Luka 22:1-2
11.45: Bhahe, Akayahude bhamahele bhubhakahikite kwa Maliya, pubhalolita ilebhe yatehila Yecho, bhajhakunyeketela.
11.46: Nambo bhange pakate jhabhe bhajhakujhenda kwa Mapwalichayo, bhajhakwalobholela mambu ghatehila Yecho.
11.47: Bhahe, akapiya matambiko bhakolo na Mapwalichayo bhajhakutama pa Bwalo jha mihalo jha Akayahude na kukonyana, “Tuhenge nike? Mundo jhonjo atehi nginyililo yamahele!
11.48: Anda tunekite ajhandelele naha, kila mundo nanyeketela, na peniya bhakolo bha ku Loma nabhahika kutilulana Nyumba jha Chapanga na kilambo chito na bhando bhito!”
11.49: Mundo jhumo pakate jhabhe, liina lyake Kayafa, jwakibha Mpiya Litambiko Nkolongwa kwa chaka chenie, ajhakulonge, “Mangota mwenga kutundungila kwenio!
11.50: Mlola jhe mbaha jhumo akihwelele kwa nhwalo jha bhando bhoha, kuliku kilambo choha kihobhelele?”
11.51: Alongila naha chi kwa kuwacha jwenio, nambo nhwalo akibha Mpiya litambiko nkolongwa kwa chaka chenie, akalondwii Yecho nahwaa kwa nhwalo gwa Akayahude bha kilambo chenie.
11.52: Na kuwee kwake chi nhwalo gwa Akayahude tugha, nambo helahela nabhabheka pamonga bhando bha Chapanga bhibhapechengine bhabhaha pamonga.
11.53: Kuhumii lichiko lyenio, bhakolo bha Kiyahude bhajhakupalaha nginyika jha kunkoma Yecho.
11.54: Bhahe, Yecho atyangita jhe kwa kukilangiya hotuhotu pakate jha Akayahude. Ajhakubhoka kwenio na kuheghelela pahina na njenga, ku muche ghukemitwa ku Efulahimo. Ajhakutama kwenio pamonga na bhabholwa bhake.
11.55: Unyagho gwa Akayahude gwa Pachaka pubhandikila, bhando bhamahele bhajhakubhoka kuchenda na kuhobhoka kujhenda ku Yeluchalemo bhakajhelebhulwe bhibhanyope Chapanga kabula jha unyagho gwa Pachaka.
11.56: Bhahe, bhampaliya Yecho. Nabhakonganika pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, bhajhakukikonya, “Muwacha bho? Bho, nahika paunyagho ghongo?”
11.57: Nambo akapiya matambiko bhakolo na Mapwalichayo bhajhakulaghalikiya kwa mundo jhojhoha jwapamanye pabhii Yecho alonge, bhakampyeneneke.

12.1: Bhahe, ghakahighalike machiko chita kabula jha unyagho gwa Pachaka, Yecho ajhakujhenda ku Betaniya kwatamita Lachalo, jhola mundo jwakayokiche.
12.2: Kwenio bhakanenganikiye Yecho ndalilo, Macha ndi jwabhatelikila. Lachalo akibha pakate jwa bhala bhubhalila pamonga na Yecho.
12.3: Bhahe, Maliya ajhakutola nucho jha chupa jha mahuta ghighanungila petelele ghighahumile mukongo ghuukemwa nalido, na kupakaya mumagholo gha Yecho, na kunhungula kwa majhunjo ghake. Na nyumba jhoha ijhakubhehe petelele kwa mahuta gheniya.
12.4: Nambo Yuda Isikaliote, jhumo jwa bhabholwa bhala kome na bhabhele, ndi jwampala kunyambila Yecho ajhakukonya,
12.5: “Nhwalo gwa nike mahuta ghangano ghachuluchwe jhe kwa imbembela ya feza ya madine makome chelachine gha mbijha na yenio kwabhaghanichila akahocho?”
12.6: Yuda alongila naha chi nhwalo gwa kwabhone kiya akahocho, nhwalo akibha mwihe. Helahela jwenio ndi ntucha kihukilo cha kubheke mbijha na akibha akwatwila mbijha kuhumi mwenio mukihukilo.
12.7: Nambo Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Nkotoka kung'aha majhe jhonjo! Atehi naha kulenganikiya lichiko lya malelo ghango.
12.8: Nantamangana na akahocho machiko ghoha, nambo nenga name jhe na mangota kwa machiko ghoha.” Bhapiya matambiko bhitenda nginyika jha kunkoma Lachalo
12.9: Lilongo likolongwa lya Akayahude bhajhakujhoha kubhehe Yecho abhii ku Betaniya bhajhakujhenda kwenio, chi bhakajhahwii kunninga Yecho tugha helahela bhakajhahwii kuninga Lachalo, mundo jhola Yecho jwayokiche kuhumii kumambe.
12.10: Bhahe, bhapiya matambiko bhakolo bhatehila nginyika jha kunkoma Lachalo,
12.11: nhwalo chela chikimpeti Lachalo, Akayahude bhamahele bhakanyendilii Yecho na kunnyeketela. Yecho ajhingii ku Yeluchalemo kwa ilulo Matei 21:1-11; Maluku 11:1-11; Luka 19:28-40
12.12: Kilabho jhake lilongo likolongwa lya bhando bhakahikite ku Unyagho gwa Pachaka, bhajhakujhoha Yecho abhii undela kuhika ku Yeluchalemo.
12.13: Bhahe, bhajhakutola matuto gha mikongo jha mitende na kujhenda kunpokela, kongo bhachobhila kanonoho bhalongila, “Tunnombe Chapanga! Jhuna mota jwenio jwahika kwa liina lya Bhambo! Jwenio jhuna mota Munahota Nkolongwa jwa Akaichilahele!”
12.14: Yecho ajhakummona litohe lya liponda na kuhobhokela panane jhake, ngita chighalongila Majhandiko gha Chapanga,
12.15: “Nkotoka kulendema, bhando bha ku Sayune! Dolokeya, Munahota Nkolongwa gwino atenda kuhika, ahobhokii panghongo gwa litohe lya liponda.”
12.16: Kutumbuli bhabholwa bhake bhakamanyite jhe malobhe gheniya. Nambo Yecho payokita na kupelwa ung'alicho, ndi bhabholwa pibhakombwika Majhandiko gha Chapanga kubhehe gheniya ghoha ghakajhandikwe panane jhake na bhando bhakantendi mambu gheniya.
12.17: Lilongo likolongwa lya bhando lilikalongohine na Yecho pankemita Lachalo apite umambe na kuyoka, bhakalongile ghala ghughapitile.
12.18: Lilongo lyenio lyoha lijhakujhenda kunpokela nhwalo bhoha bhakajhohine nginyililo yatehila Yecho.
12.19: Bhahe, Mapwalichayo bhajhakukonyana, “Nnolite, tuhoto ndeka hilu kuhenga kilebhe chochoha! Bhando bhoha bha pannema bhankengama!” Akaghilike bhapala kulonge na Yecho
12.20: Bhahe, pakibha na Akaghilike bhamahele pakate jha bhala bhando bhubhakahikite ku Yeluchalemo kunnyinamila Chapanga pa Unyagho gwa Pachaka.
12.21: Bheniya bhajhakunyendelela Filipu, mundo jwabhelwikilwe ku Betisaida ku kilambo cha ku Galilaya na bhajhakunnobholela, “Munahota, tupala kummona Yecho.”
12.22: Filipu ajhakunnobholela Anduleya, na peniya bhoha bhajhakujhenda kwa Yecho kunnobholela.
12.23: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Lichaa lihikite lya Mwana gwa Mundo kulombwa.
12.24: Ninnobholela chakaka, lumbonje lwa mponga anda lugwelii muundope na kuwegha, naluhighalika hele lumo tugha. Nambo luhwii na kumela naibhaha mbwee.
12.25: Mundo jwaupala ughome gwake nauhobhecha, na mundo jwauchimwa ughome gwa pannema ghongo, jwenio ndi napelwa ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta.
12.26: Anda mundo ambala kundelekela angengama, ntumiche gwango nabhaha pamonga pumii nenga. Mundo anda andelekile, Tate gwango nannyeketela. Yecho ilonge kuwe kwake
12.27: “Ngoheno mwojho gwango ubhii ngolongondi, na nenga nonge bhole? Nonge, ‘Bho, Tate, naungombola pa lichaa lende?’ Nahi ndeka, ndi mana ihikite kwa nhwalo ghogho, mbete mulichaa lende lya malagho.
12.28: “Tate, liina lino lilombwe!” Peniya lilobhe kuhumii kunane kwa Chapanga lijhakujhokanikika lilongila, “Nililombite, na nanililomba kabhele.”
12.29: Bhahe, lilongo lyoha lya bhando lilikajhemite peniya likajhohine malobhe gheniya na bhange ngabhalongila, “Ndi nnindimilo gwa mbamba.” Na bhange bhalongila, “Ntumiche jwa kunane kwa Chapanga jwalongila nako!”
12.30: Nambo Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Malobhe gheniya ghinyohine chi kwa nhwalo gwa nenga, lihikite kwa nhwalo gwino mangota.
12.31: Ndi lichaa lya bhando bha nnema ghongo kuhadabulwa, ngoheno limbembela kilongoche jwa nnema ghongo nabhengwa.
12.32: Nambo nenga pumbala kujhinuliwa kuhumii panane jha pannema nanahuta bhando kuhika kwa nenga.”
12.33: Yecho alongila gheniya alangiya chapala kuwegha.
12.34: Bhahe, lilongo lya bhando lijhakunkonya, “Twenga tulobholilwe na lilaghalikilo lito kubhehe Kilichitu nabhehe na ughome gwa machiko ghoha. Nhwalo gwa nike mulonge ete Mwana gwa Mundo ipala ajhinulilwe kunane? Na jwenio Mwana gwa Mundo ndi kilebhe ghane?”
12.35: Peniya Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Nantama mulubhendo kwa machiko ghandina. Ntyange na kongo kubhii kuloleka, kabula jha lubhendo lunankolela ndeka. Mundo jwatyanga mulubhendo amanyite jhe kwajhenda.
12.36: Bhahe, mulunyeketela lumule nhwalo mminalo kupala mme bhando bha pakalamuhe.” Akayahude bhikana kunnyeketela Yecho Pajhomolila kulonge gheniya Yecho, ajhakujhenda kukihiya bhakoto kummona.
12.37: Pamonga na Yecho kuhenga nginyililo yamahele palonge jhabhe, nambo bhakanyeketii ndeka.
12.38: Bhahe, malobhe ghighalongilwa na jwakibha nnondole jwa Chapanga Isaya ghatimile, “Bhambo, ghane najheketela malobhe ghito? Bho, na uhotolo gwa Bhambo uyekulilwe kwa ghane?”
12.39: Ndi nhwalo bhakanite kujheketela, helahela nnondole jwa Chapanga Isaya akalongi kabhele,
12.40: “Chapanga abhatochwi miho ghabhe, abhabhoghaniche malango ghabhe, Bhakotoka kulola kwa miho ghabhe, hilu bhakotoka kumanya kwa malango ghabhe, na bhakotoka kung'alambukila nenga, na kwalamicha.”
12.41: Isaya alongila gheniya, nhwalo akauwene ung'alicho gwa Yecho na kulonge malobhe panane jhake.
12.42: Pamonga na gheniya ilongoche yamahele ya Kiyahude bhakanyeketile Yecho. Nambo nhwalo gwa Mapwalichayo bhakalongile ndeka hotuhotu palonge jhabhe bhajhogwipa kubhengwa munyumba jhakukonganikii Akayahude.
12.43: Nhwalo bhene bhaghanita kukweywa na bhando kuliku kukweywa na Chapanga. Malobhe gha Yecho naghahadabula bhando
12.44: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakulonge kwa lilobhe likolongwa, “Mundo jhojhoha jwannyeketela nenga, chi anyeketela nenga kanjika helahela anyeketela na jhola jwandumita.
12.45: Mundo jhojhoha jwamwene nenga helahela amwene jhola jwandumita.
12.46: Nenga nhikite mee lilangamule kwa bhando bha pannema, mundo jhojhoha jwanyeketile akoto kubhehe mulubhendo.
12.47: Mundo anda ajhohine malobhe ghango changaghahenge lihengo, ne ndeka jhunipala kunhadabula. Nhwalo hikitejhe kwahadabula bhando bha nnema nambo hikite kwakombola.
12.48: Jhola jwangana nenga na malobhe ghango, jwenio akwete jwa kunhadabula. Lilobhe lilinongolila ndi nalinhadabula lichiko lya mwicho!
12.49: Nhwalo nenga nikalongi ndeka kwa ukindendeke gwango namwete, nambo Tate gwango jwandumita ndi anaghalikiya nike cha kulonge na nike chakwalobhole bhando.
12.50: Nenga nimanya kubhehe lilaghalikilo lyake libhehe na ughome gwa machiko ghoha. Bhahe, nenga nongile ghala tugha ghanaghilikiya Tate nongele.”

13.1: Likahighalike lichiko limo kujhimukila Unyagho gwa Pachaka. Yecho akamanyite chaa jhake jha kubhoka pannema pano nu kujhenda kwa Tate mundo lihikite. Akajhendilile kwapala bhando bhake pannema ghongo, akabhapahile kwa upalo gwangajhomoka.
13.2: Bhahe, Yecho na bhabholwa bhake pubhalalila kimiye. Limbembela akanyingii Yuda mwana gwa Simone Chikaliote na kumpela mawacho gha kunnyambila Yecho.
13.3: Yecho akamanyite kubhehe Tate mundo ankamwii ukindendeke gwa kila kilebhe, na akamanye ahumila kwa Chapanga na akamanye nakelebhuka kabhele kwa Chapanga.
13.4: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakubhoka pakiheneko, ajhakuhula ngobho jha panja jhake, kutabha nkunge pakibhuno.
13.5: Peniya ajhakubheka mache mkambo na kutumbuu kwagholola bhabholwa bhake magholo na kwahungulila kwa ngobho jhakungite nkunge jhela.
13.6: Bhahe, Yecho pahikita kwa Simone Petile, Petile ajhakunnkonya, “Bhambo, bho, mwenga migholola magholo ghango?”
13.7: Yecho panyangwila, “Ngoheno naumanyiijhe chinihenga, nambo palonge nabangatuka.”
13.8: Petile ajhakunnobholela, “Mbahijhe mangang'olole jhe magholo ghango!” Yecho panyangwila. “Anda nkanikiye kungholola magholo ghino namme ndeka mabholwa bhango.”
13.9: Simone Petile ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, nkotoka kugholola magholo ghango tugha helahela ung'olola mabhoko na muto gwango!”
13.10: Yecho panyangwila, “Mundo jwajhoghite njwe yegha jhoha abhii nyahinyahi ipalwa jhe kugholola magholo, mangota mmii nyahinyahi nambo mabhoha ndeka.”
13.11: Yecho akaumanye jwapala kunnyambila jhola, ndi nhwalo alongila yenio, “Mangota mmii nyahinyahi nambo mabhoha ndeka.”
13.12: Yecho pajhomolila kwagholola magholo, ajhakuhwala ngobho na kubhujha kabhele pakatamite. Ajhakwakonya, “Bho, umanye ghunitendile?”
13.13: “Mangota ungema nenga mmola na Bhambo, na mwitenda chamaha, nhwalo ndi chimile.
13.14: Nenga Mmola na Bhambo gwino, ning'olwile mangota magholo ghino, na mangota helahela nng'ololane magholo mabhene.
13.15: Nenga ninangiye nnandanikiho mangota, na mangota ntende yenio ngita chinitendi nenga.
13.16: Ninnobholela chakaka, mmanda ahoto ndeka kubhehe munahota, hilu mundo jwatumwa chi nkolongwa kuliku jhola jwantumita.
13.17: Bhahe, nhwalo mughamanye gheniya, Chapanga annombe kwa kuhenga gheniya!
13.18: “Ghunilonge ghano chi ghoha ghino mabhoha, namanyite bhala bhinahaghwile. Nambo Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghatimile ghighalongela, ‘Mundo jhola jhunilye nako kiheneko chimo ndi jwapala kunnyambila.’
13.19: Nenga ninnobholela kabula jha kupitila palonge, kupala pughapala kutendeka mbala umanye na nnyeketela kubhehe ‘Nenga ndi Jhumile.’
13.20: Ninnobholela chakaka, mundo jwampokela jhola jhunituma, jwenio ambokii nenga helahela, na mundo jwamboke nenga, ampokii jhola jwandumita.” Yecho ilota mundo natendwa kujhambilwa Matei 26:20-25; Maluku 14:17-21; Luka 22:21-23
13.21: Yecho pajhomolila kulonge malobhe gheniya, ajhakubhehe ngolongondi ku mwojho gwake na ajhakwalobholela, “Ninnobholela chakaka, jhumo pakate jhino nandenda kunyambila.”
13.22: Bhabholwa bhake bhajhakulolehana kumiho, nambo bhakamanyite jhe annonge ghane.
13.23: Jhumo jwa bhabholwa bhake, jwakapahilwe na Yecho akatamite pahina jha Yecho.
13.24: Bhahe, Simone Petile ajhakunkinyulila jhola mmola nnyake na kulonge, “Munkonye annonge ghane.”
13.25: Mmolwa jwenio ajhakuheghelela pahina na Yecho, ajhakunkonya, “Bhambo, minnonge ghane?”
13.26: Yecho ajhakwajhanguu, “Mundo jhola jhunipala kunyakiya libumunda linichwiya mubakule ndi jhojho.” Bhahe, Yecho ajhakutola kimbembela cha libumunda na kuchwiya mubakule na kumpekeya Yuda mwana gwa Simone Ichikaliote.
13.27: Papalapala Yuda papokila tugha kimbembela chela cha libumunda, Limbembela lijhakunyingila. Bhahe, Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nhwenga kajhombe chipala kuhenga!”
13.28: Nambo akibha jhe hilu jhumo pakate jha bhala bhubhakibha pakiheneko jwakamanyite nhwalo gwa nike Yecho akannobholi naha.
13.29: Nhwalo Yuda akibha abhekita kihukilo cha mbijha, bhabholwa bhange bhahambwika Yecho anobholile akahemele ilebhe ya unyagho gwa Pachaka amu kwabhaghanichila akahocho ilebhe.
13.30: Papalapala Yuda papokila tugha kimbembela chela cha libumunda, ajhakupita panja. Ikibha kilo. Lilaghalikilo liyono
13.31: Yuda papitita panja, Yecho palongila, “Ngoheno Mwana gwa Mundo alombitwe, na jwenio Chapanga alombitwe kupetela jwenio.
13.32: Anda Chapanga alombwite nkate jha Mwana gwa Mundo, na Chapanga helahela nanomba Mwana gwa Mundo nkate jhake na jwenio nannomba changakiyoto.
13.33: Yana yango, nandama na mangota kwa machiko ghandina. Mangota naundenda kumbalaha, nambo ngoheno ninnobholela chela chinalobholila bhakolo bha Akayahude, ‘Kunijhenda mwihoto jhe kuhika.’
13.34: Ngoheno nimpela lilaghano liyono, mpalane mabhene kwa mabhene. Ngita chinipala nenga na mangota helahela mpalane.
13.35: Anda mpaline, bhando bhoha nabhamanya mangota ndi bhabholwa bhango.” Yecho ilota Petile nakanila Matei 26:31-35; Maluku 14:27-31; Luka 22:31-34
13.36: Simone Petile ajhakunkonya, “Bhambo, kojhe kumijhenda?” Yecho ajhakujhanguu, “Kunijhenda mihoto ndeka kungengama ngoheno nambo naungengama panyuma jhango.”
13.37: Petile ajhakunnobholela kabhele, “Bhambo, nakilimba nike kunkengama ngoheno?, Nenga nnyeketile kuwegha kwa nhwalo gwino!”
13.38: Yecho pajhangwila, “Bho, mwenga naunhwa kwa nhwalo jha nenga? Ninnobholela chakaka, naunganila patato lijhogholo nakubheka jhe.”

14.1: Yecho ajhakwalobholela bhabholwa bhake, “Nkotoko kubhehe ngolongondi kumiojho jhino, munyeketii Chapanga na unyeketela nenga helahela.
14.2: Nkate pa nyumba jha Tate gwango, ibhii chumbe twe anda nahijhe, nganinnobholile jhe nyenda kunenganikiya mangota yumbe hino.
14.3: Nenga pumbala kujhomolela kunenganikiya mangota pwache jhino, nahika kuntolangana, pumii nenga na mangota ntama papa.
14.4: Mangota mwiimanye ndela jha kuhika kwenio kunijhenda.”
14.5: Bhahe, Tomache ajhakunkonya Yecho, “Bhambo, tukumanyi jhe kumijhenda, ngoheno natumanya bhole ndela jhene?”
14.6: Yecho ajhakunyanguu, “Nenga ndi ndela na uchakaka na ughome. Abhii jhe mundo najhenda kwa Tate changapete kwa nenga.
14.7: Ngaumanya nenga, helahela ngaumanye Tate gwango. Kutumbulii ngoheno mumanyite na umwene.”
14.8: Filipu ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, mutulangiye Tate gwino na jwenio jhutumpala.”
14.9: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Filipu nikibha na mangota kwa machiko ghoha, bho, umanyite jhe nenga? Mundo jhojhoha jwamwene nenga amwene Tate. Nhwalo gwa nike mulonge, ‘Mutulangiye Tate?’
14.10: Bho, Filipu unyekete ndeka Tate nkate jhango na nenga nkate jhake? Malobhe gheniya ghuninnobholela chi kwa ukindendeke gwango, nhwalo Tate jwatama nkate jhango ndi jwahenga lihengo lyake.
14.11: Unyeketele puninnobholela nenga mii nkate jha Tate na Tate abhii nkate jha nenga. Anda minyekete jhe malobhe bhahe, nnyeketele kwa mahengo ghinihenga.
14.12: Ninnobholela chakaka, mundo jwanyeketela nenga nahenga mahengo ngita ghunihenga nenga. Chakaka, nahotola kuhenga kupeta ghanga, nhwalo nenga nijhenda kwa Tate gwango.
14.13: Bhahe, nnyope chochoha chumipala kwa liina lyango nahenga, Tate alombwe kupete Mwana.
14.14: Anda unyopite kilebhe chochoha kwa liina lyango, chanihengela.” Yecho ilonge nantuma Uhuke gwa Chapanga
14.16: Nenga naninyopa Tate gwango, Jwenio nampela ntumiche jhonge, jwapala kutama na mangota machiko ghoha.
14.17: Jwenio ndi Uhuke gwa Chapanga, jwatuyekula uchakaka panane jha Chapanga. Bhando bha nnema bhihoto ndeka kumpokela, nhwalo bhahoto ndeka kummona hilu kuumanya. Nambo mangota muumanye nhwalo atama na mangota na abhii nkate jhino.”
14.18: “Pumbala kubhoka nanineki jhe mangota ngita makakebha, nanimujhila kabhele.
14.19: Pahighalii pandina bhando bha pannema nabhammona jhe kabhele, nambo mangota naumona. Nhwalo nenga mii na ughome, na mangota helahela mmii maghome.
14.20: Mu machiko gheniya, naumanya nenga mii nkate jha Tate gwango, na mangota mmii nkate jhango, na nenga nkate jhino.
14.21: “Mundo jhola jwaghapokela malaghilo ghango na kughakamula, mundo jwenio ndi ambahile. Tate gwango nampala mundo jhola jwambahi nenga, helahela nenga nanikilangiya kwa jwenio.”
14.22: Yuda, chi Yuda Chikaliote ajhakunnobholela, “Bhambo, nhwalo ghane mukilangiya kwa twenga tugha na chi kwa bhando bha pannema ghoha?”
14.23: Yecho panyangwila, “Mundo anda ambahi nenga nabhaha chokochoko na mabholo ghango. Tate gwango napala, Tate na nenga natuhika na kutama nkate jhake.”
14.24: Mundo jhojhoha jwangambala aghakamuu ndeka mabholo ghango. Mabholo ghunyohina gha ne jhe, ghahumi kwa Tate gwango jwandumita.
14.25: “Ninnobholela malobhe ghanga punikibha pamonga na mangota mwenga.
14.26: Tate gwango nantumila Ntumiche kwa liina lyango ndi Uhuke gwa Chapanga, namolangana umanya kila kilebhe na kunkombocha ghoha ghuninnobholila.
14.27: “Niuleka uteeke kwino, nimpela uteeke gwango. Nimpela ndeka uteeke ngita bhando bha nnema chibhatenda. Nkotoka kubhehe ngolongondi kumiojho jhino hilu bwaghaliya.
14.28: Mukajhohine puninnobholila, ‘Ndenda kukibhokela, nambo namujha kabhele.’ Anda ngaumbala ngauhanganile nenga nijhenda kwa Tate, nhwalo Tate gwango nkolongwa kuliku nenga.
14.29: Ninnobholile gheniya ngoheno kabula jha kupitila, nambo pughapala kupitila nnyeketela.
14.30: Nanongela ndeka malobhe ghamahele na mangota, nhwalo limbembela kilongoche jwa nnema ghongo abhii kuhika kwa nenga akwete jhe likakala lyolyoha,
14.31: nambo mbala bhando bha nnema bhamanye anda nimpala Tate. Nenga nihenga chechelachela ngita chanaghalikiye Tate gwango. “Ngoheno nnyemengane tubhoke!

15.1: “Nenga ndi nchabibo gwa chakaka, na Tate gwango ndi jwalema.
15.2: Jwenio ulipengula lindabhe lyangapambika uhohe, na ulipatulila kila lindabhe lilipambika uhohe libhehe pochii.
15.3: Mangota mmii nyahinyahi nhwalo mughakamwile mabholo ghango ghuninnobholila.
15.4: Ntame nkate jhango, na nenga nandama nkate jhino. Libhii jhe lindabhe lilihoto kupambika lyenio, lipala lihighalika mulibelengete lya nchabibo. Helahela mangota mihoto ndeka kupambika uhohe changatama nkate jhango.”
15.5: “Nenga ndi nchabibo gwenie, na mangota ndi mandabhe. Mundo jwatama nkate jhango na nenga ndame nkate jhake jwenio napambika uhohe pochii, nhwalo changa nenga mihoto ndeka kuhenga kilebhe chochoha.
15.6: Mundo jhojhoha changatama nkate jhango, abhehe ngita lindabhe lilitagwitwe na kujhoma. Mandabhe gheniya ujholwa, na kutagwa pamwotu na kubhehe ngaliho.
15.7: Bhahe, anda ntamite nkate jhango na malobhe ghango ghabhii nkate jhino, nnyope chochoha chimukipala, na mangota nanipelangana.
15.8: Anda mupambike uhohe pochii, Tate gwango jwa kunane nalombwa na mangota namma bhabholwa bhango.
15.9: Nenga nimpahi mangota ngita Tate chambahi nenga. Ngohe ntamengane umanye kongo nimpahile.
15.10: Anda mulichokolikiye lilaghalikilo lyango, nantama muupalo gwango, anda nenga chingamwulikiye lilaghalikilo lya Tate gwango na kutama muupalo gwake.”
15.11: “Nikannobholile mangota ghanga ghoha kupala luhangano lwango lubhaha nkate jhino na lukota kujhomoka.
15.12: Lende ndi lilaghalikilo lyango, mpalane ngita chinipalita nenga.
15.13: Abhii jhe jwabhii na upalo nkolongwa ngita ghongo kwa mundo kubhoha ughome gwake kwa nhwalo gwa akakoche mundo.
15.14: Mangota ndi makakoche bhango anda ntehi chela chininnaghalikiya.
15.15: Nikema jhe kabhele mangota makatumiche nhwalo ntumiche amanyitii jhe lihengo lya munahota gwake. Nambo ninkema akakoche bhango mangota, nhwalo ninnobholile ghoha ghunyohina kuhumii kwa Tate gwango.
15.16: Mangota mwenga jhe jhunhagwila nenga, nambo nenga ndi nikahaghuline mangota kupala ntende ilebhe yamahele yahanganii Chapanga, na gheniya mahengo naghatamikiya kwa machiko ghoha. Peniya Tate nampela kilebhe chochoha chumunyopa kwa liina lyango.
15.17: Bhahe, lilaghalikilo lyango kwino lende pambano, mupalane. Bhando bha nnema bhachimwa bhabholwa
15.18: “Anda bhando bha nnema bhachimwite mangota, umanye bhakatumbwi kunjimwa nenga.
15.19: Nga mme mabhando bha pannema ghongo, bhando bha nnema ngabhampahile ngita bhando bhake. Nambo nenga nihaghuline mangota kuhumii pannema papa na mangota mwenga chi bhando bha pannema ghongo kabhele, kwa nhwalo gwenio bhando bha nnema ghongo bhanchimwa.
15.20: Bhahe, nkomboke malobhe ghuninnobholila, ‘Mmolwa ampeta ndeka mmola gwake.’ Anda bhando bhang'ahite nenga, na mangota nabhang'aha helahela, anda mughakamwii mabholo ghango, helahela nabhaghakamula mabholo ghino.
15.21: Nambo nabhahengela gheniya ghoha nhwalo mangota mabhando bhango, nhwalo bhaumanyitii jhe jhola jwandumita nenga.
15.22: Nakuhika jhe na kulonge nabho, ngabhabhii ndeka na uhakaho, nambo ngoheno bhahotola jhe kukikengelela panane jha uhakaho.
15.23: Mundo jwanjimwa nenga, helahela anchimwa Tate gwango.
15.24: Anda nakuhenga jhe nginyililo inatendwa jhe na mundo jhonge, ngohe ngabhabhii jhe na uhakaho. Nambo ngoheno bhalolite nginyililo indehila nambo bhamela bhanjimwa nenga na Tate gwango.
15.25: Nambo ipitile nhwalo ghala ghighajhandikwe Mulilaghalikilo lyabhe ghabhii chakaka, ‘Nabhanjimwa jhajhe.’
15.26: “Nambo papala kuhika jwenio Ntumiche jhunimpala kuntuma kwino kuhumii kwa Tate, jwenio ndi Uhuke gwa Chapanga, jwenio nalongela chakaka panane jha Chapanga. Jwenio ahumi kwa Tate nannobholila malobhe ghango.
15.27: Mangota helahela namalobholela bhando malobhe panane jha nenga.

16.1: “Ninnobholile malobhe ghanga, mbala nkotoka kuhobhecha kihobholelo chino.
16.2: Bhando nabhahibhilikiya kujhingii munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude. Naghahika machiko nabhankomangana nabhahambuka bhintende Chapanga.
16.3: Bhando nabhantendela ghenagha nhwalo gwangaumanya Tate hilu nenga.
16.4: Nambo ninnobholile ghanga, lichaa pulihika nkomboke ghala ghuninnobholile. Lihengo lya Uhuke gwa Chapanga “Kutumbulii makacho nikannobholi jhe ghanga nhwalo mukibha pamonga na namwete.
16.5: Nambo ngoheno nijhenda kwa jhola jwandumita, abhii jhe hilu jhumo jwangonya pakate jhino, ‘Nijhenda kojhe?’
16.6: Nhwalo ninnobholila gheniya ghoha, ntwelile ungolongondi twe kumiojho jhino.
16.7: Nambo nenga ninnobholela gha chakaka, mbaha nenga moke, nhwalo nakubhoka jhe nenga jwenio Ntumiche nahikii jhe kwino mangota. Nambo anda nyahwii nanintuma kwino.
16.8: Jwenio papala kuhika, nabhalobholela bhando bha nnema ghongo bhamanyitii jhe uchakaka panane jha uhakaho na panane jha kuhadabulwa na Chapanga.
16.9: Bhamanyite ndeka uchakaka panane jha uhakaho, nhwalo bhanganite nenga,
16.10: bhamanyiti jhe uchakaka gwa bhando kujheketelwa palonge jha Chapanga nhwalo ndenda kukijhabhulila kwa Tate gwango. Mangota natukongane jhe kabhele,
16.11: uchakaka panane jha Chapanga kwahadabuu bhando, limbembela kilongoche jwa pannema pano bhahadabwii njwe.
16.12: “Ngwete malobhe ghamahele ghakunnobholela, nambo ngoheno uhotolo gwino gwa kuhimbilila gwandina.
16.13: Nambo Uhuke gwa Chapanga papala kuhika, nannobholela chakaka na kunnongocha panane jha muchakaka gwa Chapanga gwoha. Nhwalo nalongela ndeka kwa ukindendeke gwake jwenio, nalongela ghapala kujhoha kuhumii kwa Tate na kuntangachii mangota ghighahika.
16.14: Bhahe, jwenio nannomba nenga, kwa nhwalo nabhola ghoha ghapatite kwa nenga.
16.15: Yoha yabhii nako Tate ya nenga. Ndi nhwalo nongile kubhehe jwenio Uhuke gwa Chapanga natangachila ghighahuma kwa nenga. Ungolongonde na Kiheko
16.16: “Ghahighalike machiko ghandina mangota naumoni jhe, anda ghapetite gheniya naumona kabhele.”
16.17: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhake bhange bhajhakukonyana, “Ghahighalike nhwalo gwa nike patulobholela ghamela ‘Machiko ghandina mangota naumoni jhe kabhele?’ Anda ghapetite gheniya naumona kabhele. Helahela alonge, ‘Bho, Nhwalo nijhenda kwa Tate gwango?’
16.18: Bhene pubhajhendilila kukonyana, ‘Machiko gwandina’ nike mana jhake? Tumanyitii jhe chalonge!”
16.19: Yecho akamanyite bhapala kunkonya, bhahe, ajhakwalobholela, “Bho, mwamela mukakonyana panane jha malobhe ghunongila ghala, ghahighalike nhwalo gwa nike patulobholela ghamela ‘Machiko ghandina, mangota mwenga naumoni jhe kabhele anda ghapetite gheniya naumona kabhele?’
16.20: Ninnobholela chakaka, nannela mahole chwii mangota na kulela, nambo bhando bha pannema nabhahanganila. Nama ungolongonde nambo ungolongonde gwino naughalambuka na kubhehe kiheko.
16.21: Mwikeghe nabhaha na lipyanda lya kupapa, ulijhoha lipyanda lya kupapa nhwalo machaa gha kubhina ghahikite, nambo anda mwana abhelwikwe ghoha ajhehwite na lipyanda lyenio, nhwalo ahekelela king'enya chikibhelwike pannema.
16.22: Na mangota helahela mmii mungolongonde umwojho, nambo nanaibhona kabhele, na mangota nauhanganila, abhii jhe mundo jhojhoha nahotola kumpoka luheko lwino.”
16.23: “Mu lichiko lyenio naunyope jhe kilebhe chochoha. Ninnobholela chakaka, chochoha chimukijhopa kwa Tate kwa liina lyango nenga, Tate napelangana.
16.24: Ade ngoheno munajhopa jhe kilebhe chochoha kwa liina lyango nnyope. Mangota napelwa, na kiheko nakibhaha telatela. Yecho akaulepeli jhe nnema
16.25: “Ninnobholile mangota malobhe gheniya kwa nnandanikiho. Machiko naghahika nanongela ndeka kabhele na mangota kwa milandankiho, nambo nanongela hotuhotu panane jha Tate.
16.26: Lichiko lyenio namnyopa Tate kwa liina lyango, na nenga ninnobholela jhe anda naninyopela mangota kwa Tate,
16.27: nhwalo jwenio Tate apalangine mangota mwenga. Ampala mangota nhwalo unyeketile nenga kubhehe uhumii kunane kwa Chapanga.
16.28: Nenga humila kwa Tate, nyakuhika pannema, na ngoheno niuleka nnema nikelebhuka kwa Tate.”
16.29: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhake bhajhakunnobholela, “Oko! Ngoheno mulongela hotuhotu changa milandanikiho.
16.30: Ngoheno tubangatwike kubhehe mwenga umanye ghoha, tupala jhe mundo akonye kabhele. Ndi nhwalo tujheketile kubhehe mwenga nhumii kwa Chapanga.”
16.32: Lichaa libhii kuhika, ngoheno lihikite, ndi mangota mabhoha napechanganwa kila mundo najhenda kajhake. Nenga nauneka kanjika. Nambo chi nahighalika kanjika, nhwalo Tate gwango abhii pamonga na nenga.
16.33: Ninnobholile malobhe gheniya nipala mme na uteeke kwa kulombona na nenga. Nama mumang'ahe munnema mone. Nambo nkangamale! Nhwalo nenga niulepalile ndeka nnema!”

17.1: Yecho pajhomolila kulonge malobhe gheniya, ajhakujhinuu miho ghake kunane kwa Chapanga na ngalongila, “Tate, lichaa lyango lihikite. Munombe Mwana gwino na Mwana helahela anombe mwenga.”
17.2: Nhwalo mupekiye Mwana gwino ukindendeke panane jha bhando bhoha, abhapeke ughome gwa machiko ghoha kwa bhoha bhumupekiye.
17.3: Ghongo ndi ughome gwa machiko ghoha ghangapeta, mwenga kanjika chino ndi Chapanga jwa chakaka na bhaumanye Yecho, Kilichitu jhumutumite
17.4: Nenga ninombite mwenga pannema, kwa nhwalo nyomwile lihengo liumbekiya kuhenga.
17.5: Tate gwango! Ngoheno unombe, kwa ung'alicho palonge jhino ghoghola ghola ghunikibha nagho kabula jha kupanganwa kwa nnema.
17.6: “Nitehi umanyikane kwa bhando bhala bhumbekiye kuhumii pannema. Bhando bheniya bhakibha bhino na mwenga unyakumbeke nenga, na bheniya ndi bhalikamwile lilobhe lino.
17.7: Ngoheno bhabangatwike ghoha umbekiye ghahumii kwino mwenga.
17.8: Nhwalo umbekiye malobhe ghala na bhene bhajheketile. Bhamanya chakaka nhumii kwino, na bhanyeketele mwenga ndi jhundumita.
17.9: “Najhope bheniya. Najhope jhe bhando bha pannema nambo najhope bhando bhumbekiye, nhwalo bhando bhamba ndi bhino.
17.10: Bhando bhoha bhungwete ndi bhino, na bhando bhoha bhinkwete ndi bhango, na ung'alicho gwango ubhonikine kwa bhando bheniya bhumbekiye.
17.11: Nitama jhe kabhele pannema pano, nambo bhamba bhamela pannema. Ma Tate manyahinyahi! Mwalonde kwa likakala lya liina lino, bhatame mulilongo limo ngita nenga na mwenga chitubhii maghumba nde.
17.12: Punikibha nabho pamonga, nalondita kwa likakala lya liina lino. Abhii jhe hilu mundo jhumo pakate jhabhe jwahobhalile, nambo jhola jwahaghulilwe kuhobhelela Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghatimile.
17.13: Bhahe, ngoheno nihika kwino, nilongela malobhe ghanga namela pannema bhatwelele luheko lwango kumiojho jhabhe.
17.14: Nenga napekiye lilobhe lino, na bhando bha pannema bhajhakwachimwa, nhwalo bhene chi bhando bha nnema ghongo jhe, ngita nenga chimile jwa pannema ghongo jhe.
17.15: Nijhopa nkotoka kwakangila panja na nnema ghongo, nambo nijhopa mwalonde na Limbembela jhola.
17.16: Bhene chi bhando bha nnema ghongo, ngita nenga chimile jwa pannema ghongo jhe.
17.17: Mwatende bhabhehe bhando bhino bhanyahinyahi kwa ndela jha uchakaka. Nhwalo lilobhe lino ndi lya uchakaka.
17.18: Ngita hele nenga chiundumita pannema, na nenga helahela natuma pannema.
17.19: Kwa nhwalo jha bheniya nenga namwete nikibhoha kwa nhwalo jhabhe, na bhene bhakibhohe chakaka kwa nhwalo gwino.
17.20: “Najhope bheniya tuijhe, nambo helahela najhope bhando bhoha bhubhapala kunyeketela kwa mabholo ghango.
17.21: Nijhopa bhoha bhabhehe maghumba nde. Tate, Nijhopa bhatama nkate jhito ngita mwenga chimitama nkate jhango na nenga nkate jhino. Bhando bhoha bha pannema ghongo bhamanye chakaka undehi kunduma.
17.22: Nenga napekiye ukolongwa ghoghola ghola ghumbekiya, bhabhehe pamo ngita twenga chitubhii pamonga.
17.23: Bhahe, nenga mme nkate jhabhe, na mwenga mme nkate jhango, nijhopa bhabhaha pamonga nde. Bhando bha pannema bhamanya mwenga ndi jhundumita, na napahile ngita chiumbala nenga.
17.24: “Tate! Nijhopa bhando bhumbekiye bhamba bhatame pamonga na nenga pala punibhegha, na bhaubhone ung'alicho gwango ghola ghumbekiya kabula jha kupanganwa kwa nnema.
17.25: Tate jwaumbone, bhando bha pannema bhaumanyite jhe, nambo nenga niumanye, na bhando bhamba bhamanye mwenga ndi jhundumita.
17.26: Nitehi umanyikane kwa bhando bhoha, nanyendelela kutenda bhaumanye, upalo gwino kwa nenga utame nkate jhabhe, na nenga ndame nkate jhabhe.”

18.1: Yecho pajhomolila kunnyopa Chapanga, jwenio na bhabholwa bhake bhajhakujhomboka kwiye jha lukemba lwa ku Kedulone. Peniya pakibha na buchitane jha Michaitune, Yecho na bhabholwa bhake bhajhakujhingii mwenio.
18.2: Yuda jwanyambila Yecho jhola, akapamanye peniya, nhwalo Yecho ahwelita na bhabholwa bhake.
18.3: Peniya Yuda ajhakujhenda pabuchitane jha Michaitune pamonga na akakomana ngondo bha kilume na pamonga akalonda bha nyumba jha Chapanga bhibhatumitwe na akapiya matambiko bhakolongwa na Mapwalichayo, bhajhakuhika na lumule na limbolembole na indukwa na mikowa.
18.4: Yecho akamanyite ghoha ghimpala kunkolela, ajhakwajhendelela na kwakonya, “Bho, mangota mipalaha ghane?”
18.5: ngabhanyangwila, “Yecho jwa ku Nachalete.” Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ndi nenga.” Yuda jwanyambila Yecho akajhemite pahina na bheniya.
18.6: Yecho pabhalobholila, “Nenga ndi,” bhajhakubhujha kihenga nyuma na kugwegha pahe puuu.
18.7: Yecho ajhakwakonya kabhele, “Mangota mipalaha ghane?” Pibhajhangwila, “Yecho jwa ku Nachalete.”
18.8: Yecho pabhalongalila, “Nikanobholile kubhehe ndi nenga, na anda nenga ndi jhumumbalaha, mwaleke bhamba bhajhende.”
18.9: Alongila naha ghalongila makacho ghalenganile ghighalongila, “Tate, bhando bhumbekiya nikahobhiche ndeka hilu jhumo.”
18.10: Bhahe, Simone Petile nganholomwila upanga muchako, ajhakutondobheya na kuheketa lichikilo lya lubhoko lwalelo lya ntumiche jwa Mpiya Litambiko Nkolongwa. Ntumiche jwenio liina lyake Malukuse.
18.11: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakunnobholela Petile, “Mmujhiche upanga gwino kuntohila! Bho, mipala ngotoka kunywegha mukibaba cha malagho nganenganikiye Tate gwango?” Yecho ipelekwa kwa Anase
18.12: Bhahe, lilongo lya akakomana ngondo bha Kilume na nkolo jwabhe na akalonda bha Nyumba bha Chapanga jha Akayahude bhajhakunkamula Yecho, na kuntabha pyee,
18.13: bhajhakutumbuu kumpeleka kwa Anase. Anase akibha nkohano mundo Kayafa, Kayafa akibha Mpiya litambiko nkolo kwa chaka chenie.
18.14: Kayafa ndi jhojholajhola jwabhalongolila bhakolo bha Akayahude, mbaha mundo jhumo ahweghe kwa kwaghombokola bhando bhoha. Petile inkana Yecho Matei 26:69-70; Maluku 14:66-68; Luka 22:55-57
18.15: Simone Petile pamonga na mmolwa jhonge bhajhakunkengamila Yecho. Nhwalo mmolwa jhola jhonge akamanyikine na Mpiya Litambiko Nkolo, peniya bhajhakujhingii pamonga na Yecho pa Bwalo.
18.16: Nambo Petile ajhakujhema panja jha nnyango. Peniya mmolwa jwamanyikina na Mpiya litambiko nkolo ajhakupita panja na kulonge na mwikeghe nnonda jwa nnyango, peniya mwikeghe jhola ajhakunekekeya Petile ajhingii nkate.
18.17: Nchikana jhola nnonda jwa nnyango ajhakunkonya Petile, “Bho, mwenga chi jhumo jwa mmolwa jwa mundo jhonjo?” Petila pajhangwila, “Nahijhe nenga chi mmolwa gwake.”
18.18: Nhwalo kukibha na malile akatumiche na akalonda bhajhakukungana mwotu na kujhota. Na jwenio Petile akajhemite pamonga nabho ajhotita mwotu. Yecho palonge jha Mpiya Litambiko Matei 26:59-66; Maluku 14:55-64; Luka 22:66-71
18.19: Bhahe, Mpiya litambiko nkolo ajhakunkonya Yecho panane jha bhabholwa na mabholo ghake.
18.20: Yecho ngalongila, “Nongila hotuhotu na bhando, molita munyumba jha kukonganikii Akayahude na pa Nyumba jha Chapanga, pubhakonganika Akayahude bhoha, kibhiijhe kilebhe chindehila mungwapa.
18.21: Nhwalo ghane chiungonya nenga naha? Mwakonyekehe bhando bhala ghabhajhohine. Mwakonye chanalobhalile, nhwalo bhamanye chinongile.”
18.22: Yecho palongila malobhe gheniya, nnonda jhumo akibha pahina jhake ajhakunapula mbalamande lapu alongila, “Nhwalo ghane munyanguu Mpiya litambiko nkolo!”
18.23: Yecho pajhangwila, “Anda nyangwii mbone ndeka nnongele kilebhe chenie palonge jha bhando. Nambo anda nyangwii mbone, nhwalo gwa nike umatwii mbalamande?”
18.24: Peniya Anase ajhakuntutuhana Yecho kongo bhantabhite pyee ade kwa Kayafa ndi Mpiya litambiko nkolo. Petile ankana kabhele Yecho Matei 26:71-75; Maluku 14:69-72; Luka 22:58-62
18.25: Bhahe, Simone Petile akibha ajhemite peniya ajhota mwotu, bhando bhajhakunkonya, “Bho, na mwenga helahela chi mmolwa jwa mundo jhonjo?” Nambo Petile ajhakukana alongila, “Ne ndeka.”
18.26: Ntumiche jhumo jwa Mpiya litambiko nkolo, nnongo jwa jhola jwakapyekwitwe lichikilo na Petile, ajhakunkonya, “Bho, mbona nikamwene mundo jhonjo pamonga kubuchitane jha Micheitune kola?”
18.27: Nambo Petile ajhakukana kabhele, papalapala lijhogholo lijhakubheka. Yecho palonge jha Pilatu Matei 27:1-2; 11-14; Maluku 15:1-5; Luka 23:1-5
18.28: Pukuchila tugha putiputi bhajhakuntola Yecho kubhoka ku munyumba jha Kayafa na kunhikicha ku liboma lya nduna jwa Loma. Bhakolo bha Akayahude bhakajhingii ndeka nkate jha liboma lyenio, nhwalo bhapata bhabhehe nyahinyahi palonge jha Chapanga bhalyeghe chakulya cha Pachaka.
18.29: Bhahe, Pilatu ajhakupita panja na kwakonya, “Mundo jhonjone alemwite nike ade mtakalile?”
18.30: Ngabhajhangwila, “Anda mundo jhonjo nakulemwajhe ngatuhikiche jhe kwino mwenga.”
18.31: Pilatu ajhakwalobholela, “Mtutuhane mabhene na mukahadabule kulenganii lilaghalikilo lino.” Akayahude pibhajhangwila, “Twenga tukwete jhe ukindendeke gwa kuhadabula na kukoma mundo jhojhoha.”
18.32: Itendika naha lilobhe lya Yecho lilongila, kwalangiya chajhenda kuwegha.
18.33: Peniya Pilatu ajhakujhingii nkate jha liboma kabhele na kunkema Yecho na kunkonya, “Bho, mwenga ndi Munahota nkolongwa jwa Akayahude?”
18.34: Yecho ajhakunkonya, “Bho, malobhe gheniya ghihuma nkate jhino amu bhando bhange bhanongolile malobhe ghango?”
18.35: Pilatu ngajhangwila, “Bho, mihambuka nenga Nayahude? Bhando bha kilambo chino na akapiya matambiko ndi bhibhantutuhine kwa nenga. Bho, nnemwite nike?”
18.36: Yecho pajhangwila, “Unahota Nkolongwa gwango chi pannema pano. Unahota Nkolongwa ngaubhehe gwa pannema, bhando bhubhakibha bhibhankengima ngabhakengilile ngotoka kukamulwa na bhakolo bha Akayahude. Nambo unahota nkolongwa gwango gwapamba ndeka!”
18.37: Peniya Pilatu pankonyita, “Bho, mwenga ndi munahota nkolongwa?” Yecho ngajhangwila, “Mabhene ndi milonge nenga munahota nkolongwa. Nenga melwike kwa nhwalo gwenio na kuhika pannema pano kwalobholela bhando malobhe gha uchakaka, bhando bhibhapala uchakaka ujhokanikiya malobhe ghango.”
18.38: Bhahe, Pilatu ajhakunkonya Yecho, “Uchakaka ndi kilebhe ghane?” Yecho bhihadabuu akomwe Matei 27:15-31; Maluku 15:6-20; Luka 23:13-25 Pilatu pajhomolila kulonge gheniya ajhakupita panja kabhele kwalobholela Akayahude, “Nenga nikihwe ndeka chalemwite ade kunhadabula mundo jhonjo.
18.39: Nambo kulengana na nikayobhalikiye mangota kudindulila mpungwa jhumo machiko gha Unyagho gwa Pachaka. Bho, mipala ninyogholele jhonjo Munahota Nkolongwa jwa Akayahude?”
18.40: Peniya bhajhakutumbuu kuchobhela, “Nahi jhe jwenio ndeka! Tupala mutudindulile Balaba!” Balaba akibha apokita ilebhe ya bhando kwa makakala.

19.1: Bhahe, Pilatu ajhakwalobholela bhantole Yecho, bhankenyule yato ya limbendela lya ndomondo.
19.2: Bhene akakomana ngondo bhajhakuhinga hingo jha mibha na kuwalikiya pamuto. Helahela bhajhakuwalikiya ngholole gwa unahota nkolongwa.
19.3: Bhajhakunyendelela palonge jhake na kunyambucha bhalongila, “Mbukwa, Munahota Nkolongwa jwa Akayahude!” Bhamatwila mbalamande jha umatama lapu.
19.4: Pilatu ngapitita panja kabhele na kwalobholela Akayahude, “Dolekeya, nipiya panja na umanyengane nikihwejhe cha kunhadabula mundo jhonjo.”
19.5: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakupita panja kongo ahwalite hingo jha mibha na ngholole gwa unahota nkolongwa. Pilatu ajhakwalobholela, “Munolekehe! Mundo jwenio ndi jhonjo!”
19.6: Akapiya matambiko na akalonda bha Nyumba jha Chapanga pibhammonita Yecho, bhajhakunonoha njobhelo bhalongila, “Mumambe panchalaba! Mumambe panchalaba!” Pilatu ajhakwalobholela, “Mtolangane mabhene mukamambe panchalaba, nenga nilihwe ndeka lyalemwite lilemo lyolyoha.”
19.7: Akayahude bhajhakunnyangula, “Twenga tubhii na lilaghalikilo, lilaghalikilo lyenio lilongela limpala akomwe, nhwalo jwenio alongila Mwana jwa Chapanga.”
19.8: Pilatu pajhohina lilobhe lyenio, ajhakujhoghopa hake.
19.9: Papa ngajhingila kabhele mu liboma lyake na kunkonya Yecho, “Bho, mwenga nhumi kojhe?” Nambo Yecho akajhangwii jhe.
19.10: Nambo, Pilatu ajhakunnobholela Yecho, “Bho, umeke maghonga kulonge na nenga? Umanyite ndeka nenga ngwete ukindendeke gwa kunyogholela amu kumamba panane jha nchalaba.”
19.11: Yecho ajhakunyangula, “Mwenga ukindendeke kunhadabuu nenga nhwalo ukindendeke gwenio mpatite na Chapanga. Jhola jwanetite kwino ndi jwabhii na uhakaho twe.”
19.12: Kubhoke peniya, Pilatu apaliya ndela jha kunnekekeya Yecho. Nambo Akayahude bhajhakutumbuu kuchobhela kanonoha bhalongila, “Anda munekikiye mundo jhonjo, mwenga makoche jhe jwa munahota nkolongwa jwa ku Loma! Mundo jhojhoha jwakitenda munahota nkolongwa jwa ku Loma!”
19.13: Bhahe, Pilatu pajhohina malobhe gheniya ajhakumpiya Yecho panja, peniya Pilatu ajhakutama pa kigoda cha luhadabulo pipikemwa “Lubhanja lwa maghanga.” Kiebulaniya bhikema Gabatha.
19.14: Pihikila chaa chita jha muhe, lichiko lya kulenganikiya Pachaka. Pilatu ajhakwalobholela Akayahude, “Ndi Munahota Nkolongwa gwino jhonjo!”
19.15: Nambo Akayahude bhajhakunonoha njobhelo bhalongila, “Mukome! Mukome! Mumambe panane jha nchalaba!” Pilatu ajhakwakonya, “Mipala nimambe munahota nkolongwa gwino?” Akapiya matambiko bhakolo bhajhakujhanguu, “Twenga tukwete jhe munahota nkolongwa jhonge nambo munahota nkolongwa jwa ku Loma!”
19.16: Peniya, Pilatu ajhakwakamuha Yecho mu mabhoko gha akakomana ngondo bhamambe panane jha nchalaba. Yecho bhamamba panchalaba Matei 27:32-44; Maluku 15:21-32; Luka 23:26-43 Peniya akakomana ngondo bhajhakuntola Yecho.
19.17: Yecho ajhakubhoka pa muche kongo agheghite nchalaba gwake, ade chehemo jhikemitwa “Libhonge lya Muto,” kwa Kiebulaniya bhikema Goligota.
19.18: Peniya ndi pibhamambita Yecho panchalaba, helahela bhakabhambitwe bhando bhange bhabhele, jhumo lubhoko lwalelo na jhonge lwa ngejha, na Yecho pakate.
19.19: Pilatu ajhakujhandika litangacho na kulibheka panane jha nchalaba gwa Yecho, “Yecho jwa ku Nachalete ndi Munahota Nkolongwa jwa Akayahude.”
19.20: Pala pibhammambita Yecho panchalaba pakibha pahina na muche. Bhahe, Akayahude bhamahele bhahwelita kuchoma majhandiko gha litangacho lyenio, na ghakajhandikwe kwa Kiebulaniya na Kilatine na Kigilike.
19.21: Bhahe, akapiya matambiko bhakolo bhajhakunnobholela Pilatu, “Nkotoka kujhandika naha, ‘Munahota nkolongwa jwa Akayahude,’ nambo jwenio alongila naha, ‘Nenga ndi Munahota Nkolongwa jwa Akayahude.’ ”
19.23: Akakomana ngondo pubhajhomolila kummamba Yecho panane jha panchalaba, bhajhakutola ngobho yake na bhajhakuhibhaghana malundiko ncheche, kila lipungo kwa akakomana ngondo jhumo. Helahela bhajhakutola ade likanjo lyake na lyenio lyangachonwa, jhikalokwite kuhumii kunane ade pahe.
19.24: Akakomana ngondo bhajhakulongolelana, “Tukotoka kujhepula likanjo lende, nambo tuhenge kahumbuhumbu nnobhole tumanye nalibhaha lyaghane.” Itendika naha kupala ghatimile Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghighalongila, “Bhakabhaghine ngobho yango, nambo likanjo lyango bhajhakulitendela kahumbuumbu nnobhole.” Naha ndi chibhakatenda bheniya akakomana ngondo.
19.25: Pahina jha pa nchalaba gwa Yecho bhakajhemite akamajhe mundo, majhe mundo Yecho na Maliya nhwana mundo Kiliopa na Maliya jwahumila ku kilambo cha ku Magidala.
19.26: Yecho pammonita majhe mundo na mmolwa gwake jhola jwapalita hake, ajhakunnobholela majhe mundo, “Majhe, jwenio ngoheno ndi mwana gwino.”
19.27: Peniya ajhakunnobholela mmolwa jhola, “Ngoheno, jwenio ndi majhe gwino.” Kuhumi peniya, mmolwa jwenio ajhakunghegha Maliya, ajhakutama nako kajhake. Yecho ihwegha Matei 27:45-56; Maluku 15:33-41; Luka 23:44-49
19.28: Yecho akamanyite ghoha ghakamilike, Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghabhii telatela, Yecho ajhakulonge, “Nijhoha nyota.”
19.29: Pahina jhake pakibha na kilebhe chikitwelile divaye jhibhabha. Bhahe, akakomana ngondo bhajhakuchwiya mu lidodoke mu divaye jhibhabha jhela, na kuhomeka mulundwatwabhe lwa hichopo, nakumekela Yecho pannomo.
19.30: Bhahe, Yecho papekiwa divaye jhene jhibhabhite ajhakulonge, “Ghoha ghatimile!” Peniya ajhakujhinamicha muto gwake, na kuwegha. Yecho bhanundukuu nkowa mu lubhaho
19.31: Lichiko lyenio likibha lichiko lya kukilenganikiya, na lichiko lilikengima likibha lichiko lya Kupomolela lya Akayahude. Nhwalo ghongo bhakolo bha Kiyahude bhakapahi jhe malelo ghahighalike panane pa nchalaba mulichiko lya Kupomolela, nhwalo Lichiko lya Kupomolela likibha lichiko likolongwa kwabhe. Akayahude bhajhakunyopa Pilatu makongono gha bhando bhubhabhambitwe imetulwanwe na malelo ghabhe ghanhuluhwe.
19.32: Bhahe, akakomana ngondo bhajhakujhenda, bhajhakung'onyolana makongono gha mundo jwalongolile kubhambwa na Yecho peniya bhajhakung'onyola magholo gha mundo jhuubhele bhubhakabhambitwe pamonga na Yecho panane jha panchalaba.
19.33: Nambo pubhanhikila Yecho, bhankolila ahwii njwe, bhakang'onywii jhe magholo ghake.
19.34: Nambo nkomana ngondo jhumo ajhakunyundukula Yecho nkowa gwa mu lubhaho, papalapala ijhakupita miyahe na mache.
19.35: Mundo jwalolita chenie chikipitila, ndi jwatulongolila na chalongila chakaka. Na chenie chaghalongila ndi chakaka, na mangota nnyeketele.
19.36: Itendika naha Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghabhehe telatela, “Kibhii jhe kihupa chake chikipalwa kumetulwa.”
19.37: Peniya Majhandiko gha Chapanga ghilonge kabhele, “Nabhanolekeya mundo jhola jhubhanywundukwile nkowa.” Yecho ighonechwa mumambe Matei 27:57-61; Maluku 15:42-47; Luka 23:50-56
19.38: Pughajhomokila gheniya, Uchupo jwa ku kilambo cha Alimataya, ajhakunyopa Pilatu yegha jha Yecho atole. Uchupo akibha mmolwa gwa Yecho jwa kukihiya hiya nhwalo abhajhogwipa bhakolo bha Akayahude. Pilatu ajhakunnobholela Uchupo ahuluwe yegha jha Yecho panane jha nchalaba, bhahe, Uchupo ajhakujhenda kuhuluwa yegha jha Yecho.
19.39: Uchupo akalongohine na Nikodemo, mundo jhola peniya makacho akanyendilila Yecho lichiko limo uhiko. Nikodemo akaletite piche nhwano jha ntela ghukemitwa manemane ghuhangalwine na ubane.
19.40: Bhahe, bhoha bhabhele bhajhakutola yegha jha Yecho bhajhakubhilingilila ngobho jha malelo pamonga na mahuta ngita chibhayobhalile Akayahude pakuchika.
19.41: Pala pubhamambita Yecho pakibha na kijhongo, mu kijhongo chenio pakibha na mambe yono, abhii jhe mundo jwakaghonikwe mwenio.
19.42: Nhwalo ikibha Lichiko lya Akayahude lya Kupomolela, na nhwalo mambe ikibha pahina, bhajhakubheka mwenio yegha jha Yecho.

20.1: Lichiko lya jumapile putiputi kwamela kunakongola jhe maha, Maliya jwahumii ku kilambo chaku Magidala ajhakujhenda ku mambe na kuikolela lighanga lela liliyekelile mambe likangitwe.
20.2: Bhahe, ajhakubhutuka ade kwa Simone Petile na mmolwa jhonge jhola jwapalitwa hake na Yecho na kwalobholela, “Bhayungite yegha jha Bhambo umambe, na tumanyii jhe bhamekite kojhe!”
20.3: Peniya Simone Petile na mmolwa nnyake jhola bhajhakujhenda ku mambe.
20.4: Bhoha bhabhele bhabhutwika, nambo mmolwa jhonge ajhakuchocha kulubheya kuliku Petile, ajhakulongolela kuhika ku mambe.
20.5: Pahikita ajhakujhinama na kulingukiya nkate jha mambe, ajhakuhibhona ngobho jha malelo, nambo akajhingii ndeka nkate.
20.6: Bhahe, Simone Petile jwankengima unyuma, ajhakuhika ajhakujhingii mu mambe. Ajhakuhibhona ngobho jhela jha malelo.
20.7: Helahela ajhakuibhona chanda na chanda jhela jhakabhilingililwe Yecho kumuto. Ngobho jhene jhikibha pakanjika, nambo kikabhilwingwe maha na kubhekwa pakanjika.
20.8: Peniya mmolwa jwakatumbwii kuhika ku mambe, helahela ngajhingila mwenio, ajhakujheketela.
20.9: Bhakamanyitii jhe Majhandiko gha Chapanga chighalongila, Yecho ipala ayoke.
20.10: Bhahe, bhabholwa bhajhakukelebhuka ukajha. Yecho apitii Maliya jwa kilambo cha Magidala Matei 28:9-10; Maluku 16:9-11
20.11: Maliya akajhemite panja jha mambe kongo abhii mahole chwii. Pakibha alelita, ajhakulita na kulingulila nkate jha umambe,
20.12: ajhakwabhona akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga bhabhele bhubhahwalita ngobho nhuo ya mbumbumbu, bhakibha pala pukabhekwite yegha jha Yecho, jhumo upandi gwa ku muto na jhonge upandi gwa ku magholo.
20.13: Bhahe, akatumiche bha kunane kwa Chapanga bhala bhajhakunkonya Maliya, “Majhe, milela nike?” Maliya ajhakwajhanguu, “Bhayungite Bhambo gwango, na kwale bhamekite kojhe!”
20.14: Maliya palongila malobhe gheniya, ajhakughalambuka kuyeto na ajhakummona Yecho ajhemite peniya, nambo akaumanyi ndeka ngita akibha ndi Yecho.
20.15: Yecho pankonyita, “Majhe, nhwalo gwa nike milela? Mipalaha ghane?” Maliya ahambwika alonge na ntunja buchitane, ajhakunnobholela, “Munahota, anda mutoile, unnobholele, kojhe kumumekite, nyende nikantole.”
20.16: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Maliya!” Maliya ajhakughalambuka ajhakunnobholela kwa Kiebulaniya, “Rabone!” Mana jhake, “Mmola.”
20.17: Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Ungotoka kungamula, nhwalo namela ninajhenda jhe kunane kwa Tate gwango. Nambo nnyende kwa akalongo bhango na makalobholele, nijhenda kunane kwa Chapanga kwa Tate gwango na mangota helahela Tate gwino, Chapanga gwango helahela Chapanga gwino.”
20.18: Bhahe, Maliya jwa ku kilambo chaku Magidala ajhakukelebhuka na kwalobholela bhabholwa anda akongine na Bhambo, akabhalobhalile ngita chela Yecho channobholile. Yecho abhapitii bhabholwa bhake Matei 28:16-20; Maluku 16:14-18; Luka 24:36-49
20.19: Kimiye jhela lichiko lya jumapile, bhabholwa bhakakonganike munyumba na kongo milyango idinditwe, nhwalo bhajhogwipa bhakolo bha Akayahude, Yecho ajhakupitila pwitu na kujhema pakate jhabhe, ajhakwalobholela, “Uteeke ubhaha kwino.”
20.20: Pajhomolila kulonge malobhe gheniya, Yecho ajhakwalangiya mabhanga gha mu mabhoko na gha mu lubhaho lwake. Bhabholwa bhajhakuhangana hake nhwalo bhamwene Bhambo.
20.21: Yecho ajhakwalobholela kabhele, “Uteeke ubhaha kwino. Ngita Tate chandumite nenga, na nenga helahela nitumangana mangota.”
20.22: Palongila malobhe gheniya, ngabhapulichila na kulonge, “Mupokele Uhuke gwa Chapanga.
20.23: Anda mundo mumohikiye uhakaho gwake, mundo jwenie abhohikilwe uhakaho, na changamohekeya uhakaho mundo jwenie nahotojhe kubhohekelwa uhakaho.” Yecho na Tomache
20.24: Tomache ndi jhumo jwa bhabholwa kome na bhabhele jwankemitwa Mabhela, akibha jhe pahikita Yecho.
20.25: Bhahe, bhabholwa ajhake bhajhakunnobholela, “Tumwene Bhambo!” Nambo Tomache ajhakwalobholela, “Changalola mabhanga gha michumale gha mu mabhoko ghake na kubheka lukonji lwango mu mabhanga gheniya, na kubheka lubhoko lwango mu lubhaho lwake, nijhekete ndeka.”
20.26: Pighapetita machiko nane bhabholwa bhajhakukongana kabhele munyumba jhejhe jhene, na Tomache akibha pamonga na bhene. Pamonga na milyango kudindwa, nambo Yecho ajhakwapitila pwitu na kujhema pakate jhabhe, ajhakulonge, “Uteeke ubhaha kwino.”
20.27: Peniya Yecho ajhakunnobholela Tomache, “Tola lukonji lwino mmeke pamba, nninge mabhoko ghango, peniya tondobheya lubhoko lwino mumeke mu lubhaho lwango. Nkotoka kubhehe na kiholo pange nnyeketele!”
20.28: Tomache pajhangwila, “Bhambo gwango na Chapanga gwango!”
20.29: Yecho pankonyita, “Bho, nnyeketile nhwalo umwene? Bhina mota bhando bhala bhubhajheketela kongo bhanalola jhe!” Nhwalo gha kujhandika kitabo chenje
20.30: Yecho akatehi nginyililo twe palonge pakibha na bhabholwa bhake, nambo yoha ikajhandikwe ndeka mukitabo mwenio.
20.31: Nambo ilebhe henge ijhandikwe tujhendelele kunyeketele kubhehe Yecho ndi Kilichitu Nkomboche, Mwana gwa Chapanga na kwa kunnyeketela jwenio mme na ughome gwa chakaka kwa likakala lya liina lyake.

21.1: Pighapetita mambu gheniya, Yecho ajhakwapitila kabhele kwa bhabholwa mupele jha lilabha lya ku Tibeliya. Akapitii naha,
21.2: Simone Petile, na Tomache jwakemitwa Mabhela, na Natanaele jwabhelwikilwe ku Kana jha ku Galilaya, na yana ibhele ya Zebedayo, na bhabholwa bhange bhoha bhakibha pamonga na Yecho.
21.3: Bhahe, Simone Petile, ajhakwalobholela ajhake, “Nijhenda kupyeya homba.” Na bhene bhajhakunnobholela, “Na twenga tupala tulongohane koko kukupyeya.” Bhahe, bhajhakujhenda kuhobhokela ngalabha bhoha, nambo kilo choha chibhakelwiya kibhii jhe chibhakajhambulile.
21.4: Putiputi, Yecho ajhemite chakutale paupele jha lilabha, nambo bhabholwa bhake bhakaumanyite ndeka kubhehe ndi Yecho jwenio.
21.5: Bhahe, Yecho ajhakwakonya, “Makoche bhango, mupongite homba yenio?” Bhanyanguu, “Kilebhe nacho, tupatite jhe homba.”
21.6: Peniya Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Ntaghile lwaho lwino lubhoko lwalelo lwa ngalabha, naponga homba.” Bhajhakutaghila lwaho umache na bhakahotwi ndeka kuhuta lwaho nhwalo gwa kuhindimana kwa homba.
21.7: Peniya mmolwa, jwapalitwa na Yecho ajhakunnobholela Petile, “Jhonjo ndi Bhambo!” Papalapala Simone Petile pajhohina malobhe kubhehe jhola ndi Bhambo, ajhakuhwala likanjo lyake lya panja nhwalo akibha ahulite. Peniya ajhakuhombela umache.
21.8: Bhabholwa bhange bhajhakuhika na ngalabha, kongo bhahutita lwaho luluhindimine homba, nhwalo bhakibha kutale jhe kuhika pandumba, bhakahighalile pandina ngita kilomita itato kuhika kwenio.
21.9: Pubhahikita pandumba jha lilabha, bhajhakubhona mwotu gwa makalakala na homba na libumunda panane jhake.
21.11: Peniya Simone Petile ajhakujhingila mungalabha, na kuluhuta lwaho loha ade pandumba jha lilabha, lwaho lukapongite homba ya mpapakacha 150. Nambo pamonga na kuhindamana kwa homba lwaho lukakenjwike ndeka.
21.12: Yecho ajhakwalobholela, “Nhwike nnabhukane hote.” Akapitii ndeka hilu mmolwa jhumo jwankonyite, “Mwe maghane?” Nhwalo bhakaumanye ndi Bhambo.
21.13: Yecho ajhakuhika na kutola libumunda kwapela na helahela ajhakutenda kwa homba na kwapekeya.
21.14: Jhenje ndi jhutato kwa Yecho kwapitila bhabholwa bhake kuhumii mukuyoka kwake. Yecho na Petile
21.15: Pubhajhomolila kulyegha, Yecho ajhakunkonya Simone Petile, “Ma Simone mwana gwa Yohane, bho, umbahile nenga kuliku bhambano?” Simone Petile ajhakunyanguu, “Chakaka, Bhambo umanye mwenga nipahile.” Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nnyemelele matohe gha mambelele ghango.”
21.16: Yecho ngankonyita kabhele, “Simone mwana gwa Yohane, bho, umbahile?” Petile ngajhangwila, “Chakaka, Bhambo umanye mwenga nipahile.” Yecho ajhakunnobholela, “Nnyemelele mambelele ghango.”
21.17: Peniya Yecho ajhakunkonya mala jhutato, “Simone Petile mwana gwa Yohane umbahile?” Peniya Simone Petile ajhakubhehe ngolongonde nhwalo Yecho ankonyite mala jhutato na akannobholile, “Bho, umbahile?” Ajhakunnyanguu, “Bhambo, mwenga umanyite ilebhe yoha, umanye kubhehe nimpahile!” Yecho ngalongila kabhele, “Nnyemelele mambelele ghango.
21.18: Ninnobholela chakaka, punikibha kangombo mukahyobhalile kukikonga nkunge pyee mabhene na kubheghela kokoha kupalita, nambo pumughogholoka nanhatambula mabhoko ghino na mundo jhonge nakonga na kunchindikicha pangapala kujhenda.”
21.19: Yecho alongila naha, kunangii Petile chapala kuwegha na kunnomba Chapanga. Peniya Yecho ajhakunnobholela Petile, “Ungengame!” Yecho na jhola mmolwa jhonge
